title: Accountants and auditors
exposure_rationale: Accountancy is a fundamentally digital occupation centered on data analysis, regulatory compliance, and reporting, all of which are highly susceptible to AI and robotic process automation. While high-level advisory roles and complex forensic audits require human judgment and relationship management, the core tasks of data organization, tax computation, and anomaly detection are increasingly being automated, significantly increasing worker productivity and restructuring the entry-level labor market.
exposure_rationale_cn: 会计从根本上来说是一种数字化职业，以数据分析、监管合规和报告为中心，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能和机器人流程自动化的影响。虽然高级咨询角色和复杂的法证审计需要人工判断和关系管理，但数据组织、税务计算和异常检测等核心任务正日益自动化，从而显着提高了工人的生产力并重组了入门级劳动力市场。

title: Actors
exposure_rationale: While live theater and physical presence on set remain human-centric, the occupation is highly exposed due to AI's ability to generate digital likenesses, synthesize voices, and replace background extras or voiceover artists. The core work product—audio and video—is increasingly susceptible to generative AI, leading to significant industry restructuring and potential displacement in digital media productions.
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然现场戏剧和现场的实际存在仍然以人为中心，但由于人工智能具有生成数字相似性、合成声音以及替换背景演员或配音艺术家的能力，该职业受到高度暴露。核心工作产品——音频和视频——越来越容易受到生成式人工智能的影响，导致重大的行业重组和数字媒体制作的潜在替代。

title: Actuaries
exposure_rationale: Actuarial work is fundamentally digital, involving the analysis of large datasets, statistical modeling, and financial forecasting—all areas where AI and machine learning excel. While the profession requires high-level human judgment and the ability to explain complex risks to stakeholders, the core technical tasks of data compilation and probability estimation are highly susceptible to automation and significant productivity gains through AI.
exposure_rationale_cn: 精算工作从根本上来说是数字化的，涉及大型数据集分析、统计建模和财务预测——所有这些都是人工智能和机器学习擅长的领域。虽然该行业需要高水平的人类判断力以及向利益相关者解释复杂风险的能力，但数据编译和概率估计的核心技术任务非常容易实现自动化，并通过人工智能显着提高生产力。

title: Administrative services and facilities managers
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical site management. While AI can significantly automate administrative tasks like recordkeeping, supply procurement, and energy pattern analysis, the role requires a physical presence to inspect facilities, oversee manual labor (janitors, repair workers), and manage real-world safety and security compliance.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是数字知识工作和物理站点管理的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化记录保存、供应采购和能源模式分析等管理任务，但该角色需要亲自检查设施、监督体力劳动（门卫、维修工人）以及管理现实世界的安全和安保合规性。

title: Adult basic and secondary education and ESL teachers
exposure_rationale: The core work product—language instruction, literacy training, and test preparation—is fundamentally digital and information-based, making it highly susceptible to AI-driven tutoring and translation tools. While the role requires significant cultural sensitivity and interpersonal motivation, AI can now provide personalized lesson plans, real-time feedback, and adaptive learning paths that significantly increase teacher productivity or replace routine instructional tasks.
title_cn: 成人基础和中等教育及ESL教师
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心工作产品——语言教学、读写能力培训和考试准备——基本上是数字化和信息化的，因此非常容易受到人工智能驱动的辅导和翻译工具的影响。虽然该角色需要显着的文化敏感性和人际动机，但人工智能现在可以提供个性化的课程计划、实时反馈和自适应学习路径，从而显着提高教师的生产力或取代常规教学任务。

title: Advertising sales agents
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves digital knowledge work such as analyzing sales statistics, preparing media kits, and drafting contracts, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation. While the role requires interpersonal relationship building, the shift toward programmatic advertising and AI-driven ad placement is already reducing the need for human intermediaries in the sales process, as reflected in the projected employment decline.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及数字知识工作，例如分析销售统计数据、准备媒体工具包和起草合同，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能自动化的影响。虽然该职位需要建立人际关系，但向程序化广告和人工智能驱动的广告投放的转变已经减少了销售过程中对人工中介的需求，正如预计的就业下降所反映的那样。

title: Advertising, promotions, and marketing managers
exposure_rationale: This occupation is predominantly digital and information-based, involving market research, data analysis, and content strategy—all areas where AI is rapidly advancing. While high-level strategic decision-making and stakeholder management provide some insulation, AI can now automate significant portions of campaign planning, creative drafting, and consumer data processing, leading to major restructuring of the role.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业主要是数字化和信息化的，涉及市场研究、数据分析和内容策略——所有这些都是人工智能快速发展的领域。虽然高层战略决策和利益相关者管理提供了一些隔离，但人工智能现在可以自动化活动规划、创意起草和消费者数据处理的重要部分，从而导致角色的重大重组。

title: Aerospace engineering and operations technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of physical labor, such as building test facilities, installing instruments, and maintaining hardware, which provides a buffer against AI automation. However, the role also includes substantial digital tasks like recording data, running computer simulations, and calibrating systems—areas where AI is rapidly improving and can significantly enhance productivity or automate data analysis.
title_cn: 航空航天工程和运营技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量体力劳动，例如建造测试设施、安装仪器和维护硬件，这为人工智能自动化提供了缓冲。然而，该角色还包括大量的数字任务，例如记录数据、运行计算机模拟和校准系统——人工智能正在快速改进这些领域，可以显着提高生产力或自动进行数据分析。

title: Aerospace engineers
exposure_rationale: Aerospace engineering is a high-level knowledge occupation where core tasks like aerodynamic modeling, structural analysis, and propulsion design are increasingly performed using digital simulation and AI-driven optimization tools. While the role requires critical human judgment for safety, regulatory compliance, and physical inspection of prototypes, the heavy reliance on computer-aided design (CAD) and complex data analysis makes it highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and task automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 航空航天工程是一个高水平知识职业，空气动力学建模、结构分析和推进设计等核心任务越来越多地使用数字仿真和人工智能驱动的优化工具来执行。虽然该角色需要对原型的安全性、法规遵从性和物理检查进行关键的人工判断，但对计算机辅助设计 (CAD) 和复杂数据分析的严重依赖使其极易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高和任务自动化的影响。

title: Agricultural and food science technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of physical labor, such as collecting biological samples, maintaining farm equipment, and operating laboratory hardware, which provides a buffer against full automation. However, AI will heavily impact the data-heavy portions of the job, including compiling test results, analyzing chemical properties, and generating reports, making technicians more productive but potentially reducing the number of workers needed for data processing.
title_cn: 农业和食品科学技术员
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量体力劳动，例如收集生物样本、维护农场设备和操作实验室硬件，这为完全自动化提供了缓冲。然而，人工智能将严重影响工作中数据密集的部分，包括编译测试结果、分析化学性质和生成报告，提高技术人员的工作效率，但可能会减少数据处理所需的工人数量。

title: Agricultural and food scientists
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, including data analysis, research synthesis, and report writing, which are highly susceptible to AI enhancement. However, the role is anchored by physical requirements such as field sampling, laboratory experiments, and on-site inspections at farms or processing plants that AI cannot currently replicate.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量的数字知识工作，包括数据分析、研究综合和报告撰写，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。然而，这一角色是由物理要求所决定的，例如现场采样、实验室实验以及农场或加工厂的现场检查，而人工智能目前无法复制这些要求。

title: Agricultural engineers
exposure_rationale: Agricultural engineering is a hybrid role that combines digital design and data analysis with physical site visits and hardware testing. While AI will significantly automate core tasks like CAD modeling, environmental simulation, and precision farming data analysis, the requirement for physical oversight of construction, equipment testing in the field, and real-world troubleshooting provides a buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 农业工程是一个混合角色，将数字设计和数据分析与实地考察和硬件测试相结合。虽然人工智能将显着自动化 CAD 建模、环境模拟和精准农业数据分析等核心任务，但对施工的物理监督、现场设备测试和实际故障排除的要求为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Agricultural workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, animal handling, and operating machinery in unpredictable outdoor environments, which provides a strong natural barrier to AI. While AI and robotics are increasingly used for precision agriculture and automated harvesting, the high cost of hardware and the need for manual dexterity in varied conditions mean human workers remain essential for the majority of tasks.
category_cn: 农业、渔业和林业类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及体力劳动、动物处理以及在不可预测的户外环境中操作机械，这为人工智能提供了强大的天然屏障。虽然人工智能和机器人技术越来越多地用于精准农业和自动收割，但硬件的高成本以及在不同条件下对手工灵活性的需求意味着人类工人对于大多数任务仍然至关重要。

title: Air traffic controllers
exposure_rationale: The core work is fundamentally digital and data-driven, involving the monitoring of radar screens and the processing of complex spatial information to ensure aircraft separation. While the high-stakes nature of safety and the need for real-time human communication with pilots provide a buffer, AI and automated systems (like NextGen) are already increasing productivity and handling more traffic per controller, leading to a very low projected growth in human employment.
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心工作从根本上来说是数字化和数据驱动的，涉及雷达屏幕监控和复杂空间信息的处理，以确保飞机分离。虽然安全的高风险性质以及与飞行员进行实时人类通信的需求提供了缓冲，但人工智能和自动化系统（如 NextGen）已经在提高生产力并每个控制器处理更多的流量，导致人类就业的预计增长非常低。

title: Aircraft and avionics equipment mechanics and technicians
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and real-time troubleshooting in a physical environment, which provides a strong barrier against AI automation. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic capabilities, predictive maintenance, and the interpretation of flight data, the actual repair, assembly, and FAA-regulated physical inspections must still be performed by human technicians.
title_cn: 飞机和航空电子设备机械师和技术员
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及物理环境中的体力劳动、手工灵巧度和实时故障排除，这为人工智能自动化提供了强大的壁垒。虽然人工智能将显着增强诊断能力、预测性维护和飞行数据的解释，但实际的维修、组装和美国联邦航空局监管的物理检查仍然必须由技术人员执行。

title: Airline and commercial pilots
exposure_rationale: The occupation is a hybrid of high-level digital information processing and critical physical presence. While AI and advanced automation can handle navigation, flight planning, and system monitoring, the role requires real-time human intervention for physical emergencies, complex sensory awareness in unpredictable weather, and the legal/ethical responsibility of passenger safety in the physical world.
title_cn: 航空公司和商业飞行员
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是高级数字信息处理和关键物理存在的混合体。虽然人工智能和先进的自动化可以处理导航、飞行计划和系统监控，但该角色需要对物理紧急情况进行实时人工干预、不可预测的天气中的复杂感官意识以及物理世界中乘客安全的法律/道德责任。

title: Animal care and service workers
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are physical and require real-time presence, such as feeding, grooming, cleaning, and physically training animals. AI may assist with peripheral administrative tasks like scheduling or monitoring animal health data, but it cannot replace the manual labor or the empathetic human-animal interaction required for the job.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责是体力劳动，需要实时存在，例如喂养、梳理、清洁和训练动物。人工智能可以协助执行外围管理任务，例如安排或监控动物健康数据，但它无法取代体力劳动或工作所需的人与动物的同理心互动。

title: Announcers and DJs
exposure_rationale: The occupation is split between highly exposed digital work and less exposed physical work. Broadcast and radio roles are under significant threat from AI-generated voices and automated content curation, whereas live event DJs and emcees retain a physical and interpersonal barrier that is harder to automate.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业分为高度暴露的数字工作和较少暴露的体力工作。广播和广播角色受到人工智能生成的声音和自动内容管理的重大威胁，而现场活动 DJ 和主持人则保留着更难实现自动化的身体和人际障碍。

title: Anthropologists and archeologists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital knowledge work. While AI can significantly automate data analysis, pattern recognition in artifacts, and report writing, it cannot replace the physical requirements of excavation, site surveying, and in-person ethnographic observation.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是实地考察和数字知识工作的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化数据分析、文物中的模式识别和报告编写，但它无法取代挖掘、现场勘察和亲自人种学观察的物理要求。

title: Arbitrators, mediators, and conciliators
exposure_rationale: This occupation is primarily digital and information-based, involving the analysis of legal documents, evidence, and the drafting of settlement agreements—tasks where AI is rapidly achieving high proficiency. While the role requires significant interpersonal skills and emotional intelligence to manage confrontational parties, the core analytical and administrative functions are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and partial automation.
title_cn: 仲裁员、调解员和调停人
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业主要是数字化和信息化的，涉及法律文件、证据的分析以及和解协议的起草——人工智能正在迅速实现高熟练度的任务。虽然该角色需要强大的人际交往能力和情商来管理对抗各方，但核心分析和管理功能非常容易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高和部分自动化的影响。

title: Architects
exposure_rationale: Architects perform high-level knowledge work that is increasingly digital, utilizing CADD and BIM software which is highly susceptible to AI-driven automation in generative design and technical documentation. While the role requires physical site visits and complex client negotiations, a significant portion of the core work—drafting, specification writing, and regulatory compliance—is moving toward high AI integration.
exposure_rationale_cn: 建筑师利用 CADD 和 BIM 软件执行日益数字化的高水平知识工作，这些软件在生成设计和技术文档中极易受到人工智能驱动的自动化的影响。虽然该角色需要实地考察和复杂的客户谈判，但核心工作的很大一部分（起草、规范编写和法规遵从）正在朝着高度人工智能集成的方向发展。

title: Architectural and engineering managers
exposure_rationale: This occupation is predominantly knowledge-based and digital, involving project planning, budgeting, and technical oversight that can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While the role requires high-level human judgment, leadership, and physical site visits, the core tasks of analyzing technical data, scheduling, and coordinating complex engineering workflows are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业主要是基于知识和数字化的，涉及项目规划、预算和技术监督，人工智能工具可以显着增强这些功能。虽然该角色需要高水平的人类判断、领导力和实地考察，但分析技术数据、调度和协调复杂工程工作流程的核心任务非常容易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提升和自动化的影响。

title: Archivists, curators, and museum workers
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical preservation. AI will significantly automate archival tasks like cataloging, metadata generation, and electronic record management, while also assisting curators with research and exhibit design. However, the physical requirements of handling artifacts, restoring delicate items, and managing in-person public interactions provide a substantial buffer against full automation.
title_cn: 档案管理员、策展人和博物馆工作人员
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业是数字知识工作和实物保存的混合体。人工智能将显着自动化档案任务，如编目、元数据生成和电子记录管理，同时还协助策展人进行研究和展览设计。然而，处理文物、恢复精致物品和管理面对面的公共互动的物理要求为完全自动化提供了巨大的缓冲。

title: Art directors
exposure_rationale: Art directors work in a fundamentally digital domain where AI is rapidly advancing in image generation, layout design, and video synthesis. While the role requires high-level human judgment, leadership, and client communication, the core work product can be heavily augmented or automated by AI, significantly increasing productivity and potentially reducing the number of directors needed to oversee creative projects.
exposure_rationale_cn: 艺术总监在一个基本的数字领域工作，人工智能在图像生成、布局设计和视频合成方面正在迅速发展。虽然该角色需要高水平的人类判断、领导力和客户沟通，但核心工作产品可​​以通过人工智能大幅增强或自动化，从而显着提高生产力，并有可能减少监督创意项目所需的总监数量。

title: Assemblers and fabricators
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical manipulation, manual dexterity, and real-time adjustments in a physical environment, which provides a significant buffer against AI. While AI and robotics are increasing efficiency and automating some repetitive tasks, a substantial portion of the work—especially in complex assembly, prototyping, and custom fabrication—still requires human presence and tactile skill.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及物理操作、手动灵活性以及物理环境中的实时调整，这为对抗人工智能提供了重要的缓冲。虽然人工智能和机器人技术正在提高效率并自动化一些重复性任务，但很大一部分工作（尤其是复杂的组装、原型设计和定制制造）仍然需要人类的存在和触觉技能。

title: Athletes and sports competitors
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is physical performance, manual dexterity, and real-time human presence in the physical world, which AI cannot replicate. While AI is used as a peripheral tool for performance analytics, strategy optimization, and diet planning, it does not replace the athlete's physical labor or the entertainment value of human competition.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业的核心是身体表现、手动灵巧性以及人类在物理世界中的实时存在，这是人工智能无法复制的。虽然人工智能被用作成绩分析、策略优化和饮食规划的外围工具，但它并不能取代运动员的体力劳动或人类比赛的娱乐价值。

title: Athletic trainers
exposure_rationale: The core duties of athletic trainers—such as applying tape/braces, providing emergency first aid on the field, and performing manual rehabilitation—require physical presence and tactile skills that AI cannot replicate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like injury analysis, record-keeping, and designing recovery protocols, the job remains fundamentally grounded in real-time human interaction and physical healthcare delivery.
exposure_rationale_cn: 运动训练师的核心职责——例如使用胶带/支架、在场上提供紧急急救以及进行手动康复——需要人工智能无法复制的物理存在和触觉技能。虽然人工智能可以协助完成损伤分析、记录保存和设计恢复方案等外围任务，但这项工作从根本上仍然基于实时人机交互和身体保健服务。

title: Atmospheric scientists, including meteorologists
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves analyzing digital data, running computer models, and writing code, all of which are highly susceptible to AI advancement. Machine learning is already revolutionizing weather forecasting by outperforming traditional numerical models in speed and efficiency, potentially reducing the number of human forecasters needed for routine data processing and report generation.
title_cn: 大气科学家（包括气象学家）
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及分析数字数据、运行计算机模型和编写代码，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能进步的影响。机器学习在速度和效率方面超越了传统的数值模型，已经彻底改变了天气预报，有可能减少日常数据处理和报告生成所需的人类预报员数量。

title: Audiologists
exposure_rationale: Audiology is a clinical healthcare profession that requires physical presence for examinations, wax removal, and fitting hardware like hearing aids or cochlear implants. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy, signal processing in hearing devices, and automated testing, the core of the job involves interpersonal counseling, physical patient interaction, and complex clinical judgment that cannot be fully digitized.
exposure_rationale_cn: 听力学是一门临床医疗保健专业，需要亲自到场进行检查、除蜡以及安装助听器或人工耳蜗等硬件。虽然人工智能将显着提高诊断准确性、听力设备中的信号处理和自动化测试，但这项工作的核心涉及人际咨询、患者身体互动以及无法完全数字化的复杂临床判断。

title: Automotive body and glass repairers
exposure_rationale: The core tasks are highly physical, involving manual dexterity, welding, and the use of pneumatic tools in unpredictable repair environments that are difficult to automate. AI's primary impact is limited to peripheral administrative tasks like cost estimation and damage assessment via computer vision, but the physical restoration of vehicles remains a human-centric trade.
title_cn: 汽车车身和玻璃维修工
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心任务是高度体力的，涉及手工灵巧性、焊接以及在难以自动化的不可预测的维修环境中使用气动工具。人工智能的主要影响仅限于外围管理任务，例如通过计算机视觉进行成本估算和损坏评估，但车辆的物理修复仍然是一项以人为中心的行业。

title: Automotive service technicians and mechanics
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and real-time mechanical repair in a physical environment, which provides a strong barrier against AI automation. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic capabilities and predictive maintenance software, the actual physical replacement of parts and hands-on troubleshooting remains a human-centric task.
title_cn: 汽车维修技师和机械师
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及物理环境中的体力劳动、手工灵巧度和实时机械修复，这为人工智能自动化提供了强大的壁垒。虽然人工智能将显着增强诊断能力和预测维护软件，但实际的零件更换和手动故障排除仍然是一项以人为中心的任务。

title: Bakers
exposure_rationale: The core duties of a baker are physical and sensory, involving manual dexterity for shaping dough and real-time monitoring of physical products in high-heat environments. While AI can optimize recipes or assist with inventory management and scheduling, the fundamental work of kneading, decorating, and handling equipment remains a physical task resistant to digital automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 面包师的核心职责是身体和感官，涉及面团成型的手工灵巧性以及高温环境下对实物产品的实时监控。虽然人工智能可以优化配方或协助库存管理和调度，但揉捏、装饰和处理设备的基本工作仍然是一项难以实现数字自动化的物理任务。

title: Barbers, hairstylists, and cosmetologists
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves manual dexterity and physical interaction in a highly unpredictable environment (human hair and skin). While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like appointment scheduling, marketing, or visualizing hairstyles for clients, the physical act of cutting, coloring, and styling hair remains a significant barrier to automation.
title_cn: 理发师、发型师和美容师
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及高度不可预测的环境（人类头发和皮肤）中的手工灵活性和身体互动。虽然人工智能可以协助完成预约安排、营销或为客户可视化发型等外围任务，但剪发、染色和造型的物理行为仍然是自动化的一个重大障碍。

title: Bartenders
exposure_rationale: The core of bartending involves physical manipulation of objects, manual cleaning, and real-time social interaction in a physical environment. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like inventory management or automated ordering, the primary value of the role lies in human presence, physical service, and the social 'hospitality' aspect which remains difficult to automate.
category_cn: 食品准备和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 调酒的核心涉及对物体的物理操作、手动清洁以及物理环境中的实时社交互动。虽然人工智能可以协助执行库存管理或自动订购等外围任务，但该角色的主要价值在于人类存在、实体服务以及仍然难以自动化的社交“招待”方面。

title: Bill and account collectors
exposure_rationale: This occupation is almost entirely digital, consisting of data analysis, skip tracing, and communication via phone or computer. AI and automated systems are already driving a projected 10% decline in employment by handling routine notifications and payment processing, while advanced LLMs are increasingly capable of managing the negotiation and customer service aspects of debt collection.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业几乎完全是数字化的，包括数据分析、跳跃追踪以及通过电话或计算机进行通信。人工智能和自动化系统通过处理日常通知和付款处理，预计就业率将下降 10%，而高级法学硕士越来越有能力管理追债的谈判和客户服务方面。

title: Biochemists and biophysicists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is heavily centered on knowledge work, data analysis, and complex modeling, all of which are being revolutionized by AI (e.g., AlphaFold for protein structure prediction). While physical laboratory work and team management provide a buffer, a significant portion of the role involves literature review, grant writing, and data interpretation—tasks where AI can exponentially increase productivity or automate core analytical functions.
title_cn: 生物化学家和生物物理学家
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业主要集中在知识工作、数据分析和复杂建模，所有这些都正在被人工智能彻底改变（例如，用于蛋白质结构预测的 AlphaFold）。虽然物理实验室工作和团队管理提供了缓冲，但该角色的很大一部分涉及文献综述、资助写作和数据解释——人工智能可以成倍提高生产力或自动化核心分析功能的任务。

title: Bioengineers and biomedical engineers
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves heavy digital knowledge work, including software design, statistical modeling, and technical writing, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation and automation. While physical tasks like equipment maintenance and clinical collaboration provide a buffer, the core engineering and research functions are increasingly driven by AI-enhanced simulations and data analysis.
title_cn: 生物工程师和生物医学工程师
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及繁重的数字知识工作，包括软件设计、统计建模和技术写作，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强和自动化的影响。虽然设备维护和临床协作等物理任务提供了缓冲，但核心工程和研究功能越来越多地由人工智能增强的模拟和数据分析驱动。

title: Biological technicians
exposure_rationale: The role is a hybrid of physical laboratory work and digital data analysis. While AI can significantly automate data interpretation, report writing, and experimental modeling, the core duties involve manual tasks like setting up equipment, preparing biological samples, and conducting physical experiments that require a human presence in a lab or field environment.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色是物理实验室工作和数字数据分析的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化数据解释、报告撰写和实验建模，但其核心职责涉及手动任务，例如设置设备、准备生物样本以及进行需要人类在实验室或现场环境中存在的物理实验。

title: Boilermakers
exposure_rationale: The core work is highly physical, involving manual assembly, welding, and repair in unpredictable and cramped environments like boilers and tanks. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like blueprint analysis or maintenance scheduling, the primary duties require human dexterity and physical presence that current AI and robotics cannot replicate in non-factory settings.
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心工作是高度体力工作，涉及在锅炉和储罐等不可预测且狭窄的环境中进行手动组装、焊接和维修。虽然人工智能可以协助完成蓝图分析或维护计划等外围任务，但主要职责需要人类的灵活性和物理存在，而当前的人工智能和机器人技术无法在非工厂环境中复制。

title: Bookkeeping, accounting, and auditing clerks
exposure_rationale: This occupation is almost entirely digital and involves routine information processing, data entry, and mathematical verification—tasks that AI and automated software already perform with high accuracy. The BLS already projects a decline in employment due to technological change, and the shift toward 'analytical and advisory' roles is increasingly being encroached upon by advanced LLMs and specialized financial AI agents.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业几乎完全是数字化的，涉及日常信息处理、数据输入和数学验证——人工智能和自动化软件已经可以高精度地执行这些任务。美国劳工统计局已经预测，由于技术变革，就业人数将会下降，而向“分析和咨询”角色的转变正越来越多地被高级法学硕士和专业金融人工智能代理所取代。

title: Broadcast, sound, and video technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical labor (setting up hardware, rigging lights, running cables) and digital knowledge work (mixing sound, editing video, managing broadcast signals). While the physical installation tasks are resistant to AI, the digital components—such as sound leveling, video editing, and signal monitoring—are being rapidly automated by AI tools, leading to higher productivity and a projected decline in specialized roles like sound and broadcast technicians.
title_cn: 广播、音响和视频技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是体力劳动（设置硬件、安装灯光、铺设电缆）和数字知识工作（混合声音、编辑视频、管理广播信号）的混合体。虽然物理安装任务对人工智能有抵抗力，但数字组件（例如声级调节、视频编辑和信号监控）正在通过人工智能工具快速实现自动化，从而提高生产力，并预计声音和广播技术人员等专业角色的减少。

title: Budget analysts
exposure_rationale: Budget analysts perform work that is almost entirely digital, involving data analysis, financial modeling, and report writing—all areas where AI is highly capable. While the role requires human negotiation and communication with stakeholders, the core tasks of consolidating budgets, identifying discrepancies, and performing cost-benefit analyses are highly susceptible to automation and significant productivity gains through AI.
exposure_rationale_cn: 预算分析师的工作几乎完全数字化，涉及数据分析、财务建模和报告撰写——人工智能在所有领域都具有强大的能力。虽然该角色需要与利益相关者进行人工谈判和沟通，但合并预算、识别差异和执行成本效益分析等核心任务非常容易受到自动化的影响，并通过人工智能显着提高生产力。

title: Bus drivers
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology is a direct long-term threat to the core task of vehicle operation, the role involves significant physical and interpersonal responsibilities that AI cannot yet replicate. School bus drivers must manage student behavior and safety, while transit and charter drivers assist passengers with disabilities and handle physical luggage, creating a substantial barrier to full automation in the near term.
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然自动驾驶技术对车辆操作的核心任务构成直接的长期威胁，但该角色涉及人工智能尚无法复制的重大身体和人际责任。校车司机必须管理学生的行为和安全，而公交和包车司机则协助残疾乘客并搬运行李，这对短期内的全面自动化造成了巨大障碍。

title: Butchers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves manual dexterity, physical strength, and real-time interaction with physical products in a cold, unpredictable environment. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like inventory tracking and sales forecasting, the primary duties of cutting, deboning, and handling meat are resistant to digital automation and require specialized robotics rather than AI software.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及手工灵巧性、体力以及在寒冷、不可预测的环境中与实体产品的实时交互。虽然人工智能可以协助完成库存跟踪和销售预测等外围任务，但切割、剔骨和处理肉类的主要职责难以实现数字自动化，并且需要专门的机器人而不是人工智能软件。

title: Calibration technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant physical component, requiring manual dexterity to adjust hardware and presence in industrial or laboratory environments. While AI can automate data recording, scheduling, and the analysis of calibration deviations, the core tasks of physical inspection, maintenance, and hands-on equipment manipulation provide a natural barrier to full automation.
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及重要的物理组成部分，需要灵活的手动调整工业或实验室环境中的硬件和存在。虽然人工智能可以实现数据记录、调度和校准偏差分析的自动化，但物理检查、维护和实际设备操作等核心任务为全面自动化设置了天然障碍。

title: Cardiovascular technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: The role requires significant physical presence for tasks like positioning patients, attaching electrodes, and assisting in invasive surgical procedures. While AI will heavily automate the analysis of EKG and pulmonary data, the core requirements of patient care, physical stamina, and real-time technical assistance in a clinical environment provide a strong barrier to full automation.
title_cn: 心血管技术员和技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职位需要大量人员在场，以完成患者定位、连接电极和协助侵入性外科手术等任务。虽然人工智能将高度自动化心电图和肺部数据的分析，但临床环境中患者护理、体力和实时技术援助的核心要求为完全自动化提供了强大的障碍。

title: Career and technical education teachers
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate lesson planning, grading, and the delivery of theoretical knowledge, the core of this occupation involves supervising hands-on activities in physical environments like workshops and labs. Teaching students to safely use physical tools for trades like welding, culinary arts, or auto repair requires real-time human presence and physical intervention that AI cannot currently replicate.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然人工智能可以显着自动化课程计划、评分和理论知识的传递，但该职业的核心涉及监督车间和实验室等物理环境中的实践活动。教导学生安全地使用物理工具进行焊接、烹饪或汽车维修等行业需要实时的人类存在和物理干预，而人工智能目前无法复制。

title: Carpenters
exposure_rationale: Carpentry is a highly physical occupation requiring manual dexterity, strength, and real-time problem-solving in unpredictable physical environments. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like blueprint analysis, material estimation, or business management, the core work of cutting, fitting, and installing materials remains resistant to automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 木工是一项高度体力的职业，需要手工灵活性、力量以及在不可预测的物理环境中实时解决问题的能力。虽然人工智能可以协助完成蓝图分析、材料估算或业务管理等外围任务，但切割、装配和安装材料的核心工作仍然难以实现自动化。

title: Cartographers and photogrammetrists
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of collecting, analyzing, and visualizing geospatial data are fundamentally digital and highly susceptible to AI-driven automation. Computer vision and machine learning are already significantly faster than humans at interpreting satellite imagery, LiDAR, and survey data, while generative AI can increasingly automate the design and production of both static and interactive maps.
exposure_rationale_cn: 收集、分析和可视化地理空间数据的核心任务从根本上来说是数字化的，并且非常容易受到人工智能驱动的自动化的影响。计算机视觉和机器学习在解释卫星图像、激光雷达和测量数据方面已经明显快于人类，而生成式人工智能可以越来越自动化地设计和制作静态和交互式地图。

title: Cashiers
exposure_rationale: While the job has physical components like bagging and stocking, the core function of processing transactions is highly susceptible to automation through computer vision and AI-driven self-checkout systems. The BLS already projects a significant decline in employment due to these technological shifts, as AI can increasingly handle age verification, fraud detection, and customer inquiries.
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然这项工作具有装袋和库存等物理组成部分，但处理交易的核心功能非常容易通过计算机视觉和人工智能驱动的自助结账系统实现自动化。美国劳工统计局已经预测，由于这些技术变革，就业人数将大幅下降，因为人工智能可以越来越多地处理年龄验证、欺诈检测和客户查询。

title: Chefs and head cooks
exposure_rationale: The core of the job is highly physical and sensory, requiring manual dexterity, real-time human leadership in a fast-paced kitchen, and the use of taste and smell. While AI can significantly assist with peripheral digital tasks like menu planning, inventory management, and recipe generation, it cannot replace the physical oversight and hands-on food preparation essential to the role.
category_cn: 食品准备和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项工作的核心是高度体力和感官的工作，需要手工灵巧、快节奏厨房中的实时人类领导以及味觉和嗅觉的运用。虽然人工智能可以显着协助外围数字任务，例如菜单规划、库存管理和菜谱生成，但它无法取代该角色所必需的物理监督和亲自准备食物。

title: Chemical engineers
exposure_rationale: Chemical engineering involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, including process simulation, CAD design, and data analysis, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven optimization. However, the role is anchored by the need for physical presence in laboratories and industrial plants to monitor equipment, ensure safety compliance, and troubleshoot hardware in the real world.
exposure_rationale_cn: 化学工程涉及大量数字知识工作，包括过程模拟、CAD 设计和数据分析，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能驱动优化的影响。然而，该角色的基础是需要在实验室和工厂中实际存在，以监控设备、确保安全合规性并对现实世界中的硬件进行故障排除。

title: Chemical technicians
exposure_rationale: The role is a hybrid of physical laboratory work and digital data analysis. While AI can significantly automate the compilation of results, report generation, and predictive modeling of chemical properties, the core duties of setting up equipment, preparing physical solutions, and maintaining laboratory instruments require a human presence in a physical environment.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色是物理实验室工作和数字数据分析的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化结果编译、报告生成和化学性质的预测建模，但设置设备、准备物理解决方案和维护实验室仪器的核心职责需要人类在物理环境中的存在。

title: Chemists and materials scientists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a high-level blend of digital knowledge work and physical laboratory experimentation. AI is already revolutionizing the digital aspects—such as molecular modeling, predictive simulation, and technical reporting—allowing scientists to screen millions of compounds in silico before ever entering a lab. While the physical requirement of conducting experiments and handling chemicals provides a buffer, the massive productivity gains in research and analysis mean AI will fundamentally restructure how these scientists spend their time.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是数字知识工作和物理实验室实验的高水平融合。人工智能已经彻底改变了数字化方面，例如分子建模、预测模拟和技术报告，使科学家能够在进入实验室之前通过计算机筛选数百万种化合物。虽然进行实验和处理化学品的物理要求提供了缓冲，但研究和分析中生产力的巨大提高意味着人工智能将从根本上改变这些科学家如何度过他们的时间。

title: Childcare workers
exposure_rationale: The core responsibilities of this role—physical care, safety monitoring, hygiene, and emotional support—require a physical presence and human empathy that AI cannot replicate. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like lesson planning, record-keeping, or parent communication, the fundamental nature of the work is hands-on and occurs in the physical world.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一角色的核心职责——身体护理、安全监控、卫生和情感支持——需要人工智能无法复制的身体存在和人类同理心。虽然人工智能可以协助完成课程计划、记录保存或家长沟通等外围任务，但这项工作的基本性质是动手操作，并且发生在现实世界中。

title: Chiropractors
exposure_rationale: The core of chiropractic work is highly physical, requiring manual dexterity for spinal adjustments and real-time physical assessment of a patient's musculoskeletal system. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like medical imaging analysis, diagnostic suggestions, and administrative business management, it cannot replace the essential hands-on therapeutic interventions that define the profession.
exposure_rationale_cn: 脊椎按摩疗法的核心是高度体力劳动，需要灵活的手法来调整脊柱，并对患者的肌肉骨骼系统进行实时身体评估。虽然人工智能可以协助完成医学影像分析、诊断建议和行政业务管理等外围任务，但它无法取代定义该职业的基本实践治疗干预措施。

title: Civil engineering technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical field work. While AI and advanced CAD software are significantly automating drafting, cost estimation, and data analysis tasks, the role still requires physical site visits, material testing, and real-world inspections that AI cannot currently perform.
title_cn: 土木工程技术员和技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是数字知识工作和实地工作的混合体。虽然人工智能和先进的 CAD 软件正在显着自动化绘图、成本估算和数据分析任务，但该角色仍然需要人工智能目前无法执行的物理现场访问、材料测试和实际检查。

title: Civil engineers
exposure_rationale: Civil engineering involves significant digital knowledge work, including CAD design, data analysis, and cost estimation, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains. However, the role is anchored by the necessity for physical site inspections, real-world surveying, and the legal accountability of a Professional Engineer (PE) license, which requires human judgment and liability that AI cannot currently replace.
exposure_rationale_cn: 土木工程涉及重要的数字知识工作，包括 CAD 设计、数据分析和成本估算，这些工作极易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高的影响。然而，该角色的基础是物理现场检查、现实世界测量以及专业工程师（PE）许可证的法律责任的必要性，这需要人工智能目前无法取代的人类判断和责任。

title: Claims adjusters, appraisers, examiners, and investigators
exposure_rationale: This occupation is heavily focused on information processing, document review, and data-driven decision-making, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation. While physical inspections and interpersonal negotiations provide some protection, the BLS already projects a decline in employment due to AI's ability to analyze photos of damage and automate claim calculations.
title_cn: 理赔调整员、评估师、审查员和调查员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业主要关注信息处理、文档审查和数据驱动的决策，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能自动化的影响。虽然实物检查和人际谈判提供了一些保护，但美国劳工统计局已经预测，由于人工智能分析损坏照片和自动计算索赔的能力，就业率将会下降。

title: Clinical laboratory technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical laboratory work and digital data analysis. While AI and computer vision are rapidly automating the interpretation of slides and test results (high exposure), the physical requirements of preparing specimens, maintaining complex hardware, and interacting with patients provide a significant barrier to full automation.
title_cn: 临床实验室技师和技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是物理实验室工作和数字数据分析的混合体。虽然人工智能和计算机视觉正在快速自动解释载玻片和测试结果（高曝光），但准备标本、维护复杂硬件以及与患者互动的物理要求为完全自动化提供了重大障碍。

title: Coaches and scouts
exposure_rationale: While AI is significantly impacting the analytical side of the job—such as processing player data, optimizing game strategy, and analyzing opponent film—the core of the occupation remains deeply physical and interpersonal. Coaches must provide real-time motivation, physical instruction, and human leadership on the field, which cannot be replicated by digital tools.
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然人工智能对工作的分析方面产生了重大影响，例如处理玩家数据、优化游戏策略和分析对手影片，但该职业的核心仍然是深度的身体和人际交往。教练必须在场上提供实时激励、身体指导和人类领导力，这是数字工具无法复制的。

title: Community health workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is built on trust, cultural sensitivity, and physical presence within specific communities, which AI cannot replicate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like data collection, report writing, and resource matching, the primary duties involve home visits, hands-on advocacy, and real-time interpersonal coaching for vulnerable populations.
category_cn: 社区和社会服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这种职业的核心是建立在特定社区内的信任、文化敏感性和实际存在之上，这是人工智能无法复制的。虽然人工智能可以协助完成数据收集、报告撰写和资源匹配等外围任务，但主要职责包括对弱势群体进行家访、实际宣传和实时人际辅导。

title: Compensation and benefits managers
exposure_rationale: This occupation is primarily digital and data-driven, involving the analysis of wage trends, benefits structures, and regulatory compliance—tasks where AI excels. While the role requires high-level human judgment for vendor negotiations and strategic decision-making, AI can automate significant portions of the data analysis, reporting, and routine employee communication, leading to higher productivity and potential workforce consolidation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业主要是数字化和数据驱动的，涉及工资趋势、福利结构和监管合规性分析——人工智能擅长的任务。虽然该角色需要对供应商谈判和战略决策进行高水平的人类判断，但人工智能可以自动执行数据分析、报告和日常员工沟通的重要部分，从而提高生产力和潜在的劳动力整合。

title: Compensation, benefits, and job analysis specialists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is fundamentally digital and data-driven, involving core tasks like market research, cost analysis, and report generation that align perfectly with AI's strengths. AI can automate the drafting of job descriptions, perform complex compensation benchmarking, and monitor regulatory changes, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the need for manual data processing.
title_cn: 薪酬、福利和工作分析专员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业从根本上来说是数字化和数据驱动的，涉及市场研究、成本分析和报告生成等核心任务，这些任务与人工智能的优势完美契合。人工智能可以自动起草职位描述、执行复杂的薪酬基准测试并监控监管变化，从而显着提高个人生产力并减少手动数据处理的需求。

title: Compliance officers
exposure_rationale: Compliance work is primarily digital and involves analyzing vast amounts of regulatory text, auditing data, and generating reports—all areas where LLMs and automated systems excel. While high-level judgment and interpersonal investigations provide some insulation, the core tasks of monitoring, risk assessment, and documentation are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and productivity gains.
exposure_rationale_cn: 合规工作主要是数字化的，涉及分析大量监管文本、审计数据和生成报告——所有领域都是法学硕士和自动化系统擅长的领域。虽然高层判断和人际调查提供了一些隔离，但监控、风险评估和记录等核心任务非常容易受到人工智能驱动的自动化和生产力提高的影响。

title: Computer and information research scientists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is fundamentally digital, involving high-level coding, algorithm design, and data analysis—all areas where AI is rapidly advancing. While these scientists are the ones building AI, the tools they create are increasingly capable of automating their own core tasks, such as writing code, simplifying algorithms, and analyzing experimental results, leading to extreme productivity gains and role restructuring.
title_cn: 计算机和信息研究科学家
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业从根本上来说是数字化的，涉及高级编码、算法设计和数据分析——所有这些都是人工智能快速发展的领域。虽然这些科学家是人工智能的构建者，但他们创建的工具越来越能够自动化自己的核心任务，例如编写代码、简化算法和分析实验结果，从而极大地提高生产力和角色重组。

title: Computer and information systems managers
exposure_rationale: This occupation is predominantly digital and knowledge-based, involving strategic planning, analysis, and technical oversight that AI can significantly augment. While high-level leadership, vendor negotiation, and personnel management provide a buffer of human judgment, the core tasks of assessing IT needs, monitoring security, and directing technical workflows are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and automation.
title_cn: 计算机和信息系统经理
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业主要是数字化和基于知识的，涉及人工智能可以显着增强的战略规划、分析和技术监督。虽然高层领导、供应商谈判和人事管理为人类判断提供了缓冲，但评估 IT 需求、监控安全和指导技术工作流程等核心任务非常容易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提升和自动化的影响。

title: Computer hardware engineers
exposure_rationale: The core work of designing schematics, analyzing circuits, and testing components is increasingly performed using digital Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tools that are highly susceptible to AI-driven optimization and automation. While there is a physical component to testing and manufacturing oversight, the vast majority of the engineering lifecycle is digital and benefits significantly from AI's ability to optimize complex systems and generate code/hardware descriptions.
exposure_rationale_cn: 设计原理图、分析电路和测试组件等核心工作越来越多地使用数字电子设计自动化 (EDA) 工具来执行，这些工具非常容易受到人工智能驱动的优化和自动化的影响。虽然测试和制造监督有物理组成部分，但工程生命周期的绝大多数都是数字化的，并且从人工智能优化复杂系统和生成代码/硬件描述的能力中受益匪浅。

title: Computer network architects
exposure_rationale: The core work of designing, documenting, and configuring networks is fundamentally digital and data-driven, making it highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and optimization tools. While physical hardware deployment and complex stakeholder management provide a slight buffer, AI is rapidly advancing in automated network topology design, security configuration, and predictive troubleshooting, which will significantly increase individual productivity and restructure the role.
exposure_rationale_cn: 设计、记录和配置网络的核心工作从根本上来说是数字化和数据驱动的，因此非常容易受到人工智能驱动的自动化和优化工具的影响。虽然物理硬件部署和复杂的利益相关者管理提供了轻微的缓冲，但人工智能在自动化网络拓扑设计、安全配置和预测性故障排除方面正在快速进步，这将显着提高个人生产力并重组角色。

title: Computer programmers
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of writing, testing, and debugging code are entirely digital and align perfectly with the strengths of Large Language Models, which are already highly proficient in these domains. The BLS specifically projects a decline in this occupation due to automation and AI, as these tools allow fewer workers to produce the same volume of code and shift higher-level logic to software developers.
exposure_rationale_cn: 编写、测试和调试代码的核心任务完全是数字化的，并且与大型语言模型的优势完美契合，而大型语言模型已经在这些领域非常精通。美国劳工统计局特别预测，由于自动化和人工智能，这一职业将出现下降，因为这些工具允许更少的工人生成相同数量的代码，并将更高级别的逻辑转移给软件开发人员。

title: Computer support specialists
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of diagnosing technical issues, documenting problems, and guiding users through digital workflows are highly susceptible to AI automation via advanced chatbots and LLM-driven troubleshooting. While some physical hardware setup and complex onsite networking remain, the vast majority of the work is digital information processing that AI can increasingly handle, as evidenced by the BLS's projected decline in employment due to automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 诊断技术问题、记录问题和指导用户完成数字工作流程的核心任务非常容易通过高级聊天机器人和法学硕士驱动的故障排除而受到人工智能自动化的影响。虽然一些物理硬件设置和复杂的现场网络仍然存在，但绝大多数工作是人工智能可以越来越多地处理的数字信息处理，劳工统计局预计自动化导致的就业下降就证明了这一点。

title: Computer systems analysts
exposure_rationale: This occupation is fundamentally digital, involving data modeling, system design, and technical analysis that can be performed entirely on a computer. AI is highly capable of automating core tasks such as writing technical documentation, generating system diagrams, analyzing cost-benefit data, and assisting with the programming and debugging aspects of the role.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业从根本上来说是数字化的，涉及数据建模、系统设计和技术分析，可以完全在计算机上执行。人工智能非常有能力实现核心任务的自动化，例如编写技术文档、生成系统图、分析成本效益数据以及协助角色的编程和调试。

title: Concierges
exposure_rationale: The role is a hybrid of digital information processing and physical hospitality. While AI can automate core tasks like making reservations, providing local recommendations, and answering emails, the job still requires a physical presence for greeting guests, handling packages, and providing high-touch interpersonal service that is central to the luxury and residential experience.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色是数字信息处理和实体接待的混合体。虽然人工智能可以自动执行预订、提供本地推荐和回复电子邮件等核心任务，但这项工作仍然需要亲自到场迎接客人、处理包裹以及提供对豪华和住宅体验至关重要的高接触人际服务。

title: Conservation scientists and foresters
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of physical field work, such as fire suppression, planting trees, and navigating difficult terrain, which provides a natural barrier to AI automation. However, a substantial portion of the role involves data analysis, GIS mapping, and regulatory compliance—tasks where AI can significantly enhance productivity and decision-making. While AI will reshape the information-processing aspects of the job, the requirement for real-world presence and manual intervention keeps exposure moderate.
title_cn: 保护科学家和林业人员
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量的体力现场工作，例如灭火、植树和穿越困难地形，这为人工智能自动化提供了天然障碍。然而，该角色的很大一部分涉及数据分析、GIS 绘图和监管合规性等人工智能可以显着提高生产力和决策的任务。虽然人工智能将重塑工作的信息处理方面，但对现实世界的存在和手动干预的要求使暴露程度保持适度。

title: Construction and building inspectors
exposure_rationale: The occupation is a hybrid of physical site visits and digital knowledge work. AI and computer vision can significantly automate the 'plans examiner' and report-writing functions, while remote inspection technology is already projected to reduce labor demand. However, the core requirement for physical presence to navigate tight spaces, use manual testing equipment, and verify real-world conditions provides a substantial barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是实地考察和数字知识工作的混合体。人工智能和计算机视觉可以显着自动化“计划审查员”和报告编写功能，而远程检查技术预计将减少劳动力需求。然而，物理存在以导航狭小空间、使用手动测试设备并验证现实世界条件的核心要求为完全自动化提供了巨大障碍。

title: Construction equipment operators
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical operation of heavy machinery in unpredictable, outdoor environments that require real-time human coordination and manual maintenance. While AI and automation are increasingly integrated into equipment via GPS and computerized controls, the physical nature of the work and the need for on-site safety judgment provide a significant barrier to full automation in the near term.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及在不可预测的户外环境中对重型机械进行物理操作，需要实时的人类协调和手动维护。虽然人工智能和自动化越来越多地通过 GPS 和计算机控制集成到设备中，但工作的物理性质和现场安全判断的需要为短期内的全面自动化设置了重大障碍。

title: Construction laborers and helpers
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are almost entirely physical, involving manual labor, tool operation, and site preparation in unpredictable outdoor environments. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like scheduling or specialized robotic equipment control, the vast majority of the work requires human presence, physical strength, and real-time adaptation to physical obstacles.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责几乎完全是体力劳动，涉及体力劳动、工具操作以及在不可预测的户外环境中进行场地准备。虽然人工智能可能会协助完成调度或专门的机器人设备控制等外围任务，但绝大多数工作需要人类的存在、体力和对物理障碍的实时适应。

title: Construction managers
exposure_rationale: Construction management is a hybrid role that combines digital knowledge work—such as cost estimation, scheduling, and contract analysis—with essential physical presence. While AI can significantly automate budgeting and logistical planning, the core of the job requires real-world site inspections, physical problem-solving, and high-stakes interpersonal negotiation with tradesworkers and inspectors that cannot be replicated digitally.
exposure_rationale_cn: 施工管理是一个混合角色，它将数字知识工作（例如成本估算、调度和合同分析）与必要的物理存在结合起来。虽然人工智能可以显着实现预算和后勤规划的自动化，但这项工作的核心需要现实世界的现场检查、实际问题的解决以及与工人和检查员进行高风险的人际谈判，而这些都是无法以数字方式复制的。

title: Cooks
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical dexterity, sensory judgment (taste and smell), and real-time adaptation in a high-heat, unpredictable kitchen environment. While AI-driven automation is already impacting fast food and routine institutional cooking, high-end restaurant and private household cooking remain protected by the need for complex manual skills and human creativity.
category_cn: 食品准备和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项工作的核心涉及身体的灵活性、感官判断（味觉和嗅觉）以及在高温、不可预测的厨房环境中的实时适应。虽然人工智能驱动的自动化已经影响了快餐和日常机构烹饪，但高端餐厅和私人家庭烹饪仍然受到对复杂手工技能和人类创造力的需求的保护。

title: Correctional officers and bailiffs
exposure_rationale: The core duties are physical and interpersonal, requiring real-time human presence to maintain security, conduct searches, and physically restrain individuals. AI exposure is limited to peripheral administrative tasks like report writing and log entry, or enhancing surveillance systems, but it cannot replace the physical oversight and intervention required in correctional and courtroom environments.
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心职责是身体和人际交往，需要实时人员在场以维持安全、进行搜查和对个人进行身体约束。人工智能的暴露仅限于外围管理任务，例如报告编写和日志输入，或增强监视系统，但它不能取代惩教和法庭环境中所需的物理监督和干预。

title: Cost estimators
exposure_rationale: Cost estimation is a data-intensive, digital-first occupation centered on analyzing blueprints, technical documents, and historical databases to predict costs. AI and advanced software are already driving a projected decline in employment by automating routine calculations and simulations, though human oversight remains necessary for complex site-specific variables and high-stakes negotiations.
exposure_rationale_cn: 成本估算是一项数据密集型、数字优先的职业，主要通过分析蓝图、技术文档和历史数据库来预测成本。人工智能和先进软件已经通过自动化日常计算和模拟来推动预计的就业下降，尽管对于复杂的特定地点变量和高风险谈判仍然需要人工监督。

title: Court reporters and simultaneous captioners
exposure_rationale: The core product of this occupation is a verbatim digital transcript, a task where AI speech-to-text and natural language processing are already highly proficient. While legal requirements for human oversight and the need to clarify inaudible speech provide a temporary buffer, the rapid advancement of AI in transcription and real-time captioning creates extreme pressure for automation and massive productivity gains that reduce the need for human workers.
title_cn: 法庭记录员和同声字幕员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心产品是逐字数字转录，这是人工智能语音转文本和自然语言处理已经非常熟练的任务。虽然对人类监督的法律要求和澄清听不见的语音的需要提供了暂时的缓冲，但人工智能在转录和实时字幕方面的快速发展给自动化带来了极大的压力，并大幅提高了生产力，从而减少了对人类工人的需求。

title: Craft and fine artists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical craftsmanship and digital creation. While craft artists (potters, glassblowers) and sculptors have low exposure due to the physical nature of their work, digital artists and illustrators face very high exposure as AI can now generate high-quality imagery and complex designs from text prompts. The overall score reflects this split, as AI significantly impacts the commercial and digital segments of the field while leaving traditional physical mediums largely intact.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业是实体工艺和数字创作的混合体。虽然手工艺艺术家（陶艺家、玻璃吹制工）和雕塑家由于其工作的物理性质而曝光度较低，但数字艺术家和插画家却面临着非常高的曝光度，因为人工智能现在可以根据文本提示生成高质量的图像和复杂的设计。总体得分反映了这种分裂，因为人工智能对该领域的商业和数字领域产生了重大影响，同时传统的物理媒体基本完好无损。

title: Credit counselors
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of credit counseling—analyzing financial data, creating budgets, and explaining debt management options—are fundamentally digital and information-based, making them highly susceptible to AI automation. While the role requires interpersonal skills and emotional support for clients in financial distress, AI can already perform the complex calculations and personalized recommendation generation that constitute the bulk of the technical work.
exposure_rationale_cn: 信用咨询的核心任务——分析财务数据、制定预算和解释债务管理选项——基本上是数字化和信息化的，这使得它们极易受到人工智能自动化的影响。虽然该角色需要人际交往能力和为陷入财务困境的客户提供情感支持，但人工智能已经可以执行复杂的计算和个性化推荐生成，这构成了大部分技术工作。

title: Customer service representatives
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this role—answering questions, processing orders, and resolving complaints—are fundamentally digital and information-based, making them highly susceptible to AI-driven automation. Large Language Models and AI agents are already capable of handling complex natural language interactions, and the BLS specifically projects a decline in employment due to automation in this sector.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色的核心职责——回答问题、处理订单和解决投诉——基本上是数字化和信息化的，这使得他们非常容易受到人工智能驱动的自动化的影响。大型语言模型和人工智能代理已经能够处理复杂的自然语言交互，美国劳工统计局特别预测该领域的自动化会导致就业人数下降。

title: Dancers and choreographers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is physical performance, athleticism, and real-time human interaction in physical spaces, which AI cannot replicate. While AI may assist choreographers with music selection or administrative tasks, the fundamental value of the work lies in the human body's movement and live artistic expression.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项职业的核心是身体表现、运动能力以及物理空间中的实时人际互动，这是人工智能无法复制的。虽然人工智能可以协助编舞者完成音乐选择或管理任务，但这项工作的根本价值在于人体的运动和现场艺术表达。

title: Data scientists
exposure_rationale: Data science is a fully digital occupation centered on coding, statistical modeling, and data analysis—all areas where AI is rapidly achieving parity or superiority. While human judgment is still needed for business context and ethical oversight, AI can now automate significant portions of the data pipeline, including cleaning raw data, generating complex code, and even suggesting optimal model architectures.
exposure_rationale_cn: 数据科学是一种以编码、统计建模和数据分析为中心的全数字化职业——人工智能正在迅速实现与这些领域的平等或优势。虽然商业环境和道德监督仍然需要人类判断，但人工智能现在可以自动化数据管道的重要部分，包括清理原始数据、生成复杂代码，甚至建议最佳模型架构。

title: Database administrators and architects
exposure_rationale: This occupation is entirely digital, involving coding (SQL), system architecture, and data management—all areas where AI is exceptionally proficient. AI can already automate routine DBA tasks like performance tuning, query optimization, and security monitoring, while LLMs are highly capable of generating and debugging the complex schemas and scripts used by database architects.
title_cn: 数据库管理员和架构师
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业完全是数字化的，涉及编码（SQL）、系统架构和数据管理——所有这些都是人工智能异常精通的领域。人工智能已经可以自动执行 DBA 的日常任务，例如性能调优、查询优化和安全监控，而法学硕士则非常有能力生成和调试数据库架构师使用的复杂模式和脚本。

title: Delivery truck drivers and driver/sales workers
exposure_rationale: While AI and autonomous vehicle technology are advancing, the core of this job involves significant physical labor, such as loading/unloading cargo and navigating unpredictable 'last-mile' environments. AI may optimize routing and assist with sales communication, but the physical requirement to move goods from a vehicle to a customer's door remains a major barrier to full automation.
title_cn: 送货卡车司机和司机/销售员
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然人工智能和自动驾驶汽车技术不断进步，但这项工作的核心涉及大量的体力劳动，例如装卸货物以及在不可预测的“最后一英里”环境中航行。人工智能可以优化路线并协助销售沟通，但将货物从车辆转移到客户家门口的物理要求仍然是全面自动化的主要障碍。

title: Dental and ophthalmic laboratory technicians and medical appliance technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical craftsmanship and digital design, with AI and automation already driving a projected decline in dental technician roles. While the physical assembly, polishing, and repair of medical devices require manual dexterity, the 'knowledge' phase of the job—interpreting prescriptions and designing appliances—is rapidly shifting toward AI-integrated CAD/CAM software and 3D printing.
title_cn: 牙科和眼科实验室技术员及医疗器械技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业是物理工艺和数字设计的混合体，人工智能和自动化已经导致牙科技师职位的预计下降。虽然医疗设备的物理组装、抛光和维修需要熟练的手工操作，但工作的“知识”阶段（解释处方和设计器具）正在迅速转向人工智能集成的 CAD/CAM 软件和 3D 打印。

title: Dental assistants
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical, hands-on tasks such as sterilizing instruments, assisting in surgeries, and providing direct patient care that requires human presence and manual dexterity. While AI can significantly automate the administrative and digital aspects of the role—such as scheduling, billing, and preliminary X-ray analysis—the majority of the workday is spent in the physical dental operatory where AI cannot currently replace human labor.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该工作的核心涉及体力、动手任务，例如对器械进行消毒、协助手术以及提供需要人员在场和手动灵巧的直接患者护理。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化该角色的管理和数字方面（例如调度、计费和初步 X 射线分析），但工作日的大部分时间都花在物理牙科手术室中，而人工智能目前无法取代人类劳动力。

title: Dental hygienists
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves high-precision manual dexterity and physical procedures performed on patients in a clinical setting, which AI cannot replicate. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like analyzing X-rays or automating patient documentation, the primary work of cleaning teeth and conducting physical exams remains insulated from automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心涉及在临床环境中对患者进行高精度的手工操作和物理程序，这是人工智能无法复制的。虽然人工智能可以协助分析 X 射线或自动化患者记录等外围任务，但清洁牙齿和进行体检的主要工作仍然与自动化无关。

title: Dentists
exposure_rationale: The core of dentistry involves highly precise physical procedures, manual dexterity, and real-time patient interaction in a clinical setting, which are resistant to AI automation. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy through X-ray analysis and streamline administrative practice management, the physical requirement of performing surgery and restorative work creates a strong barrier to high exposure.
exposure_rationale_cn: 牙科的核心涉及临床环境中高度精确的物理程序、手工灵巧性和实时患者互动，这些都对人工智能自动化产生了抵制。虽然人工智能将通过 X 射线分析显着提高诊断准确性并简化行政实践管理，但进行手术和恢复工作的物理要求对高暴露造成了强大的障碍。

title: Desktop publishers
exposure_rationale: The work product is entirely digital and involves routine information processing, layout design, and basic editing—all areas where AI is highly proficient. Generative AI and automated layout tools can now handle text integration, image adjustment, and formatting with minimal human intervention, leading to a projected decline in the occupation as these tasks are automated or absorbed by other roles using AI tools.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 工作产品完全是数字化的，涉及日常信息处理、布局设计和基本编辑——所有这些都是人工智能高度精通的领域。生成式人工智能和自动布局工具现在可以在最少的人工干预下处理文本集成、图像调整和格式化，从而导致职业预计下降，因为这些任务被自动化或被使用人工智能工具的其他角色吸收。

title: Diagnostic medical sonographers
exposure_rationale: The occupation is a hybrid of physical and digital work; while AI is rapidly advancing in image analysis and diagnostic assistance, the role requires significant physical presence to position patients and manipulate transducers with high hand-eye coordination. Furthermore, the interpersonal aspect of patient care and the real-time physical adjustments needed during a scan provide a substantial barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是体力工作和数字工作的混合体；虽然人工智能在图像分析和诊断辅助方面正在迅速发展，但该角色需要大量的物理存在来定位患者并以高度手眼协调性操作传感器。此外，患者护理的人际关系以及扫描期间所需的实时身体调整为完全自动化提供了巨大的障碍。

title: Diesel service technicians and mechanics
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is highly physical, requiring manual dexterity, strength, and real-time problem-solving in a hands-on environment. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic software and technical manuals used by technicians, it cannot perform the physical repairs, parts replacement, or tool manipulation that define the job.
title_cn: 柴油维修技师和机械师
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心是高度体力劳动，需要动手能力、力量以及在动手环境中实时解决问题的能力。虽然人工智能将显着增强技术人员使用的诊断软件和技术手册，但它无法执行定义工作的物理维修、零件更换或工具操作。

title: Dietitians and nutritionists
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of analyzing nutritional data, interpreting research, and creating personalized meal plans are highly digital and data-driven, making them susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. However, the role requires significant interpersonal counseling, empathy, and clinical judgment in medical settings, which provides a buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 分析营养数据、解释研究和创建个性化膳食计划的核心任务是高度数字化和数据驱动的，这使得它们容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。然而，该角色需要在医疗环境中进行大量的人际咨询、同理心和临床判断，这为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Drafters
exposure_rationale: Drafters perform work that is almost entirely digital, converting conceptual sketches into technical CAD and BIM models. AI is rapidly advancing in generative design and automated technical drawing, allowing for the immediate translation of engineering specifications into precise models, which significantly reduces the human labor required for these tasks.
exposure_rationale_cn: 绘图员的工作几乎完全数字化，将概念草图转换为技术 CAD 和 BIM 模型。人工智能在生成设计和自动化技术绘图方面正在迅速发展，可以将工程规范立即转化为精确的模型，从而显着减少这些任务所需的人力。

title: Drywall installers, ceiling tile installers, and tapers
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of this occupation are entirely physical, involving manual labor, dexterity, and movement in unpredictable construction environments. While AI might assist with peripheral administrative tasks or material estimation, it cannot perform the physical installation, cutting, or finishing of drywall and ceiling tiles.
title_cn: 石膏板和天花板瓷砖安装工
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心任务完全是体力劳动，涉及体力劳动、灵活性以及在不可预测的建筑环境中的移动。虽然人工智能可能有助于外围管理任务或材料估算，但它无法执行干墙和天花板瓷砖的物理安装、切割或修整。

title: Economists
exposure_rationale: Economists perform work that is almost entirely digital, involving data analysis, mathematical modeling, and technical writing. AI is exceptionally proficient at the core tasks of this role, including processing large datasets, identifying statistical patterns, and generating reports, which significantly increases productivity and reduces the number of human workers needed for routine analysis.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 经济学家从事的工作几乎完全数字化，包括数据分析、数学建模和技术写作。人工智能非常精通该角色的核心任务，包括处理大型数据集、识别统计模式和生成报告，这显着提高了生产力并减少了日常分析所需的人力数量。

title: Editors
exposure_rationale: Editing is a fully digital occupation centered on language processing, a core strength of Large Language Models. AI can already perform high-level copy editing, fact-checking, and rewriting, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total number of human editors required for routine content management.
exposure_rationale_cn: 编辑是一种以语言处理为中心的全数字化职业，这是大语言模型的核心优势。人工智能已经可以执行高级文本编辑、事实检查和重写，从而显着提高个人生产力并减少日常内容管理所需的人工编辑总数。

title: Electrical and electronic engineering technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of physical labor, such as assembling prototypes, soldering circuitry, and repairing hardware, which provides a buffer against full automation. However, a substantial portion of the role involves digital tasks like drafting schematics, analyzing test data, and writing technical reports—all areas where AI is becoming highly proficient. AI will likely augment their troubleshooting capabilities and automate the documentation aspects of the job, increasing individual productivity but potentially reducing overall demand.
title_cn: 电气和电子工程技术员和技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项职业涉及大量的体力劳动，例如组装原型、焊接电路和维修硬件，这为完全自动化提供了缓冲。然而，该角色的很大一部分涉及数字任务，例如起草原理图、分析测试数据和撰写技术报告——人工智能正在变得高度熟练的所有领域。人工智能可能会增强他们的故障排除能力，并使工作的文档方面自动化，从而提高个人生产力，但可能会降低总体需求。

title: Electrical and electronics engineers
exposure_rationale: The core work of designing circuits, modeling systems, and writing documentation is digital and highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and optimization. While physical testing, site visits, and manufacturing supervision provide a buffer, the rapid advancement of AI in CAD, simulation, and coding significantly increases the productivity and exposure of the knowledge-work components.
exposure_rationale_cn: 设计电路、建模系统和编写文档的核心工作是数字化的，并且非常容易受到人工智能驱动的自动化和优化的影响。虽然物理测试、现场考察和制造监督提供了缓冲，但人工智能在 CAD、模拟和编码领域的快速发展显着提高了知识工作组件的生产力和曝光度。

title: Electrical and electronics installers and repairers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical manipulation of hardware, manual troubleshooting in unpredictable environments, and the use of hand tools, which are highly resistant to AI automation. While AI can significantly enhance diagnostic software and predictive maintenance schedules, the physical acts of disassembling, repairing, and reassembling complex electrical components require human dexterity and presence.
title_cn: 电气和电子安装和维修工
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及对硬件的物理操作、在不可预测的环境中进行手动故障排除以及手动工具的使用，这些对人工智能自动化具有很强的抵抗力。虽然人工智能可以显着增强诊断软件和预测性维护计划，但拆卸、维修和重新组装复杂电气元件的物理行为需要人类的灵活性和存在。

title: Electrical power-line installers and repairers
exposure_rationale: The core work is highly physical, involving climbing towers, operating heavy machinery, and manual repair in unpredictable outdoor environments. While AI can assist with remote monitoring and diagnostic data analysis, it cannot perform the high-risk physical labor required to install or repair high-voltage infrastructure.
title_cn: 电力线路安装和维修工
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心工作是高度体力的工作，包括爬塔、操作重型机械以及在不可预测的户外环境中进行手动维修。虽然人工智能可以协助远程监控和诊断数据分析，但它无法执行安装或维修高压基础设施所需的高风险体力劳动。

title: Electricians
exposure_rationale: The core work of an electrician is highly physical, involving manual installation, repair, and navigation of complex, unpredictable physical environments like construction sites and crawl spaces. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like blueprint analysis, diagnostic calculations, or scheduling, it cannot perform the tactile labor or real-time physical problem-solving required for the job.
exposure_rationale_cn: 电工的核心工作是高度体力的工作，涉及手动安装、维修以及在复杂、不可预测的物理环境（例如建筑工地和狭窄空间）中进行导航。虽然人工智能可以协助完成蓝图分析、诊断计算或调度等外围任务，但它无法执行工作所需的触觉劳动或实时物理问题解决。

title: Electro-mechanical and mechatronics technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of physical labor, including soldering, operating metalworking machinery, and repairing hydraulic systems, which provides a strong barrier against full AI automation. However, AI will increasingly assist with the knowledge-based aspects of the job, such as analyzing test results, interpreting complex schematics, and diagnosing faults in the very robotic systems these technicians maintain.
title_cn: 机电和机电一体化技术员和技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量体力劳动，包括焊接、操作金属加工机械和修理液压系统，这为全面人工智能自动化提供了强大的障碍。然而，人工智能将越来越多地协助工作中基于知识的方面，例如分析测试结果、解释复杂的原理图以及诊断这些技术人员维护的机器人系统中的故障。

title: Elementary, middle, and high school principals
exposure_rationale: Principals perform significant knowledge work—such as curriculum development, budget management, and data analysis of student performance—that is highly susceptible to AI augmentation and automation. However, the core of the role requires physical presence for school safety, real-time crisis management, and high-stakes interpersonal interactions with students, parents, and staff that AI cannot currently replicate.
exposure_rationale_cn: 校长执行重要的知识工作，例如课程开发、预算管理和学生表现的数据分析，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能增强和自动化的影响。然而，该角色的核心需要物理存在以确保学校安全、实时危机管理以及与学生、家长和工作人员的高风险人际互动，而人工智能目前无法复制这些。

title: Elevator and escalator installers and repairers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves highly physical, manual labor in unpredictable environments, such as elevator shafts and machine rooms, which provides a strong barrier against AI automation. While AI can significantly enhance diagnostic troubleshooting and predictive maintenance through computerized control systems, the actual installation, repair, and physical manipulation of heavy mechanical components still require a human presence. AI acts as a sophisticated tool for the technician rather than a replacement for the physical work.
title_cn: 电梯和自动扶梯安装和维修工
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心是在电梯井、机房等不可预测的环境中进行高度体力的体力劳动，这为人工智能自动化提供了强大的屏障。虽然人工智能可以通过计算机控制系统显着增强诊断故障排除和预测性维护，但重型机械部件的实际安装、维修和物理操作仍然需要人工参与。人工智能对于技术人员来说是一种复杂的工具，而不是体力工作的替代品。

title: Emergency management directors
exposure_rationale: The role involves significant digital knowledge work, such as analyzing hazards, drafting complex response plans, and managing federal funding applications, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, the core of the job requires high-stakes real-time decision-making, physical presence at command centers during disasters, and intense interpersonal coordination with government officials and the public, providing a buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及重要的数字知识工作，例如分析危害、起草复杂的响应计划以及管理联邦资金申请，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。然而，这项工作的核心需要高风险的实时决策、灾难期间在指挥中心的实际存在，以及与政府官员和公众的密切人际协调，为全面自动化提供缓冲。

title: EMTs and paramedics
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical intervention, manual dexterity, and real-time human presence in unpredictable environments, which are highly resistant to AI. While AI will significantly assist with peripheral tasks like EKG interpretation, diagnostic decision support, and automated documentation, the physical requirements of patient transport and hands-on emergency care remain essential human functions.
title_cn: 急救医疗技师和护理人员
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心涉及物理干预、手工灵巧性以及在不可预测的环境中实时人类存在，这些对人工智能具有很强的抵抗力。虽然人工智能将极大地协助完成心电图解释、诊断决策支持和自动记录等外围任务，但患者运输和实际紧急护理的物理要求仍然是人类的基本功能。

title: Entertainment and recreation managers
exposure_rationale: This role involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, such as budgeting, scheduling, and strategic planning, which is highly susceptible to AI optimization. However, the core of the job requires physical presence to inspect facilities, manage real-time emergencies, and provide high-touch interpersonal leadership and customer service in physical environments like parks and fitness centers.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及大量数字知识工作，例如预算、日程安排和战略规划，非常容易受到人工智能优化的影响。然而，这项工作的核心需要亲自到场检查设施、管理实时紧急情况，并在公园和健身中心等物理环境中提供高接触度的人际领导和客户服务。

title: Environmental engineering technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital knowledge work. While AI can significantly automate data analysis, report reviewing, and regulatory compliance checks, it cannot physically collect soil and water samples, maintain field equipment, or perform on-site hazardous material disposal. The BLS already notes that automated testing is increasing productivity, which limits job growth even as the core physical tasks remain human-centric.
title_cn: 环境工程技术员和技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是实地考察和数字知识工作的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化数据分析、报告审查和监管合规性检查，但它无法物理收集土壤和水样本、维护现场设备或执行现场有害物质处置。美国劳工统计局已经指出，自动化测试正在提高生产力，这限制了就业增长，即使核心物理任务仍然以人为中心。

title: Environmental engineers
exposure_rationale: Environmental engineering involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, including data analysis, system design, and report writing, which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, the role is insulated by the necessity for physical site inspections, regulatory compliance monitoring in the field, and the legal accountability associated with Professional Engineer (PE) licensure.
exposure_rationale_cn: 环境工程涉及大量的数字知识工作，包括数据分析、系统设计和报告撰写，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。然而，该角色因物理现场检查、现场监管合规性监控以及与专业工程师 (PE) 执照相关的法律责任的必要性而被隔离。

title: Environmental science and protection technicians
exposure_rationale: The core of this role involves physical fieldwork, such as collecting soil and water samples and inspecting facilities, which AI cannot perform. However, AI will significantly impact the digital aspects of the job, including data analysis, the preparation of reports and charts, and the modeling of environmental impacts.
title_cn: 环境科学和保护技术员
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一角色的核心涉及物理实地工作，例如收集土壤和水样本以及检查设施，这是人工智能无法执行的。然而，人工智能将极大地影响工作的数字化方面，包括数据分析、报告和图表的准备以及环境影响的建模。

title: Environmental scientists and specialists
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, including data analysis, report writing, and regulatory compliance, which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, the role is anchored by a physical component involving fieldwork, site inspections, and laboratory sample analysis that AI cannot currently replicate. AI will likely serve as a powerful tool for modeling environmental impacts and drafting technical documents, increasing individual productivity while leaving the physical data collection and stakeholder relationship management to humans.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量数字知识工作，包括数据分析、报告撰写和监管合规，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。然而，该角色是由涉及实地工作、现场检查和实验室样本分析的物理组成部分所固定的，而人工智能目前无法复制这些物理组成部分。人工智能可能会成为环境影响建模和起草技术文件的强大工具，提高个人生产力，同时将物理数据收集和利益相关者关系管理留给人类。

title: Epidemiologists
exposure_rationale: Epidemiology is a data-intensive knowledge profession where core tasks like statistical analysis, pattern recognition in large datasets, and literature reviews are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. While the role requires human judgment for policy-making, community outreach, and field investigations, the shift toward digital health records and automated surveillance systems significantly increases the productivity and exposure of the occupation.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 流行病学是一个数据密集型知识专业，统计分析、大型数据集中的模式识别和文献综述等核心任务非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。虽然该角色需要人类对政策制定、社区外展和现场调查进行判断，但向数字健康记录和自动监控系统的转变显着提高了该职业的生产力和暴露程度。

title: Exercise physiologists
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical presence, including conducting stress tests, measuring vital signs with medical equipment, and providing hands-on rehabilitative care. While AI can highly automate the digital aspects of the job—such as analyzing medical history, processing biometric data, and generating personalized exercise regimens—the core requirement for real-time human interaction, physical assessment, and clinical supervision in a medical setting limits its total exposure.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及大量的身体活动，包括进行压力测试、使用医疗设备测量生命体征以及提供实际的康复护理。虽然人工智能可以高度自动化工作的数字化方面，例如分析病史、处理生物特征数据和生成个性化的锻炼方案，但医疗环境中实时人机交互、身体评估和临床监督的核心要求限制了其总暴露程度。

title: Farmers, ranchers, and other agricultural managers
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical labor, equipment maintenance, and real-time management of biological systems that cannot be digitized. However, AI will heavily impact the management side of the job, including crop yield prediction, financial planning, and automated resource allocation, making individual managers significantly more productive and contributing to further farm consolidation.
title_cn: 农民、牧场主和其他农业管理者
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及大量的体力劳动、设备维护以及无法数字化的生物系统的实时管理。然而，人工智能将严重影响工作的管理方面，包括作物产量预测、财务规划和自动化资源分配，使单个管理者的生产力显着提高，并有助于进一步的农场整合。

title: Fashion designers
exposure_rationale: Fashion design is increasingly digital, utilizing CAD and graphics software for sketching, trend analysis, and virtual modeling—all areas where generative AI is rapidly advancing. While the physical aspects of selecting fabrics, creating prototypes, and overseeing production provide a buffer, the core creative and analytical tasks are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and productivity gains.
exposure_rationale_cn: 时装设计日益数字化，利用 CAD 和图形软件进行草图绘制、趋势分析和虚拟建模，这些领域都是生成式 AI 快速发展的领域。虽然选择面料、创建原型和监督生产的物理方面提供了缓冲，但核心创意和分析任务非常容易受到人工智能驱动的自动化和生产力提升的影响。

title: Film and video editors and camera operators
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical camera operation and digital video editing. While camera operators have a physical barrier to AI due to the need for on-site equipment management and real-world positioning, editors work entirely in digital environments where AI is rapidly automating tasks like color grading, sound syncing, and even rough-cut generation. The rise of generative video and AI-driven post-production tools significantly increases the productivity of each worker, potentially reducing the total number of editors needed for complex projects.
title_cn: 电影和视频编辑及摄像师
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业是物理相机操作和数字视频编辑的混合体。虽然由于需要现场设备管理和现实世界定位，摄像机操作员对人工智能存在物理障碍，但剪辑师完全在数字环境中工作，人工智能正在快速自动化任务，如颜色分级、声音同步，甚至粗剪生成。生成视频和人工智能驱动的后期制作工具的兴起显着提高了每个工人的生产力，有可能减少复杂项目所需的剪辑师总数。

title: Financial analysts
exposure_rationale: Financial analysts perform work that is almost entirely digital, involving the processing of large datasets, trend analysis, and the generation of reports—all areas where AI excels. While high-level strategy and client relationships provide some insulation, the core tasks of data evaluation, risk assessment, and financial modeling are being rapidly automated or significantly enhanced by AI, leading to major restructuring of the occupation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 金融分析师的工作几乎完全数字化，涉及大型数据集的处理、趋势分析和报告生成——这些都是人工智能擅长的领域。虽然高层战略和客户关系提供了一定的隔离性，但数据评估、风险评估和财务建模等核心任务正在通过人工智能迅速实现自动化或显着增强，从而导致职业的重大重组。

title: Financial clerks
exposure_rationale: Financial clerks perform routine, digital-first tasks such as data entry, record updating, and basic financial calculations that are highly susceptible to AI automation. While some roles involve customer interaction, the core functions—processing claims, verifying credit, and managing payroll—are increasingly handled by AI-driven software, leading to a projected decline in employment.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 财务职员执行日常的、数字优先的任务，例如数据输入、记录更新和基本财务计算，这些任务非常容易受到人工智能自动化的影响。虽然某些角色涉及客户互动，但核心功能——处理索赔、验证信用和管理工资——越来越多地由人工智能驱动的软件处理，导致就业人数预计下降。

title: Financial examiners
exposure_rationale: Financial examiners perform work that is almost entirely digital, involving the analysis of balance sheets, loan documentation, and regulatory text. AI is exceptionally well-suited for automating the core tasks of this role, such as identifying anomalies in financial data, summarizing meeting minutes, and checking compliance against complex legal frameworks, though human judgment remains necessary for final risk assessments and high-level management evaluations.
exposure_rationale_cn: 财务审查员的工作几乎完全数字化，包括资产负债表、贷款文件和监管文本的分析。人工智能非常适合自动化该角色的核心任务，例如识别财务数据中的异常、总结会议记录以及检查复杂法律框架的合规性，尽管最终风险评估和高层管理评估仍然需要人工判断。

title: Financial managers
exposure_rationale: Financial management is a predominantly digital knowledge-work occupation focused on data analysis, reporting, and forecasting, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. While the role requires significant human judgment, strategic advisory, and leadership, the core technical tasks of monitoring financial details and preparing statements are being rapidly transformed by AI tools.
exposure_rationale_cn: 财务管理是一种主要是数字化知识工作的职业，专注于数据分析、报告和预测，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。虽然该角色需要大量的人类判断、战略咨询和领导力，但监控财务细节和准备报表的核心技术任务正在被人工智能工具迅速改变。

title: Fire inspectors
exposure_rationale: The role requires a significant physical presence for onsite inspections, evidence collection in debris, and forest patrolling, which provides a natural barrier to AI. However, AI can substantially assist with digital tasks such as reviewing building blueprints, analyzing fire scene data, and automating the documentation of code violations and legal reports.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色需要大量的实际存在来进行现场检查、碎片中的证据收集以及森林巡逻，这为人工智能提供了天然屏障。然而，人工智能可以极大地协助数字任务，例如审查建筑蓝图、分析火灾现场数据以及自动记录违规行为和法律报告。

title: Firefighters
exposure_rationale: The core duties of firefighting are intensely physical and require real-time presence in unpredictable, hazardous environments where AI cannot currently operate.
