While AI may enhance peripheral tasks like incident reporting, equipment maintenance scheduling, and predictive wildfire modeling, the essential work of rescuing victims and extinguishing fires remains a human-centric manual task.
exposure_rationale_cn: 消防的核心职责是高度体力的，需要在人工智能目前无法操作的不可预测的危险环境中实时存在。虽然人工智能可以增强事件报告、设备维护计划和预测野火建模等外围任务，但营救受害者和灭火的基本工作仍然是以人为中心的手动任务。

title: Fishing and hunting workers
exposure_rationale: The core duties are highly physical and take place in unpredictable outdoor environments, requiring manual labor, mechanical repair, and real-time physical coordination. AI's impact is limited to peripheral enhancements in fish-finding sonar, GPS navigation, and regulatory data processing, but it cannot replace the physical act of hauling nets, trapping animals, or maintaining vessels.
category_cn: 农业、渔业和林业类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心职责是高度体力劳动，并且发生在不可预测的户外环境中，需要体力劳动、机械维修和实时身体协调。人工智能的影响仅限于探鱼声纳、GPS导航和监管数据处理等外围增强功能，但它无法取代拖网、诱捕动物或维护船只的物理行为。

title: Fitness trainers and instructors
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation requires physical presence to demonstrate exercises, correct form in real-time to prevent injury, and provide high-touch motivational support. While AI can automate peripheral tasks like workout programming, nutrition planning, and social media marketing, it cannot replace the physical safety monitoring and interpersonal accountability that define the role.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项职业的核心要求是现场演示练习、实时纠正姿势以防止受伤，并提供高接触性的激励支持。虽然人工智能可以自动执行锻炼计划、营养计划和社交媒体营销等外围任务，但它无法取代定义角色的人身安全监控和人际责任。

title: Flight attendants
exposure_rationale: The core responsibilities of flight attendants are physical and interpersonal, involving safety enforcement, emergency medical response, and manual service tasks that AI cannot perform. While AI may assist with peripheral digital tasks like report writing or passenger manifest management, the role is largely defined by a physical presence required by law for passenger safety.
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 空乘人员的核心职责是体力和人际交往，涉及安全执法、紧急医疗响应以及人工智能无法完成的人工服务任务。虽然人工智能可以协助完成报告撰写或乘客清单管理等外围数字任务，但该角色在很大程度上是由法律要求的乘客安全物理存在来定义的。

title: Flooring installers and tile and stone setters
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are entirely physical, involving manual dexterity, heavy lifting, and real-time adaptation to irregular physical surfaces in unpredictable environments. While AI might assist with minor administrative tasks or design visualization, it cannot perform the tactile labor of cutting, laying, and finishing materials on-site.
title_cn: 地板安装工和瓷砖石材安装工
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责完全是体力劳动，涉及灵巧的手工操作、搬运重物以及在不可预测的环境中实时适应不规则的物理表面。虽然人工智能可以协助完成较小的管理任务或设计可视化，但它无法执行现场切割、铺设和整理材料的触觉劳动。

title: Floral designers
exposure_rationale: The core of the job is a physical craft involving the handling of perishable biological materials and manual assembly, which AI cannot perform. However, AI can significantly assist with peripheral digital tasks such as generating design concepts for customers, managing inventory, and automating customer service for online orders.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项工作的核心是物理工艺，涉及处理易腐烂的生物材料和手动组装，这是人工智能无法完成的。然而，人工智能可以极大地协助外围数字任务，例如为客户生成设计概念、管理库存以及自动化在线订单客户服务。

title: Food and beverage serving and related workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, such as clearing tables, carrying heavy trays, and cleaning, which are difficult to automate with current robotics. However, AI is increasingly handling digital peripheral tasks like order-taking via kiosks or voice-AI drive-thrus and managing reservations, which reduces the need for human staff in front-of-house roles.
title_cn: 食品和饮料服务及相关人员
category_cn: 食品准备和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心涉及体力劳动，例如清理桌子、搬运沉重的托盘和清洁，这些工作很难用当前的机器人技术实现自动化。然而，人工智能越来越多地处理数字外围任务，例如通过自助服务终端或语音人工智能得来速接订单以及管理预订，这减少了对前台工作人员的需求。

title: Food preparation workers
exposure_rationale: The core duties are highly physical and require manual dexterity in unpredictable kitchen environments, which are difficult for AI to automate directly. While AI might optimize inventory management or scheduling, the primary tasks of washing, cutting, and preparing food remain resistant to digital replacement, though some labor may be displaced by industrial food processing automation.
category_cn: 食品准备和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心职责是高度体力的，需要在不可预测的厨房环境中灵活地进行手工操作，而人工智能很难直接实现自动化。虽然人工智能可能会优化库存管理或调度，但清洗、切割和准备食物的主要任务仍然难以数字化替代，尽管工业食品加工自动化可能会取代一些劳动力。

title: Food processing equipment workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, such as loading ingredients, cleaning machinery, and manual quality checks, which are resistant to AI. While AI can optimize recipes, monitor sensor data, and automate some equipment controls, the requirement for human presence in a physical manufacturing environment to handle unpredictable mechanical issues and sanitation limits overall exposure.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业的核心是体力劳动，比如装载原料、清洁机械、人工质检等，对人工智能有抵抗力。虽然人工智能可以优化配方、监控传感器数据并自动化某些设备控制，但在物理制造环境中需要人类存在来处理不可预测的机械问题和卫生问题，这限制了整体暴露。

title: Food service managers
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate administrative tasks like staff scheduling, inventory ordering, and payroll management, the core of the job requires physical presence and real-time human interaction. Managers must physically inspect facilities for safety, handle unpredictable interpersonal conflicts with staff and customers, and perform manual labor during peak hours, which provides a strong buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然人工智能可以显着自动化管理任务，如员工调度、库存订购和工资管理，但工作的核心需要物理存在和实时人机交互。管理人员必须亲自检查设施的安全性，处理与员工和客户不可预测的人际冲突，并在高峰时段进行体力劳动，这为全面自动化提供了强有力的缓冲。

title: Forensic science technicians
exposure_rationale: The role is a hybrid of physical evidence collection and digital analysis. While AI can significantly automate pattern recognition (fingerprints, ballistics) and statistical reporting, the job requires physical presence at crime scenes to collect samples and the human credibility necessary to testify in court as an expert witness.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色是物理证据收集和数字分析的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化模式识别（指纹、弹道）和统计报告，但这项工作需要亲自到犯罪现场收集样本，以及作为专家证人在法庭上作证所需的人类可信度。

title: Forest and conservation workers
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are highly physical and performed in unpredictable outdoor environments, such as planting seedlings, clearing brush, and suppressing forest fires. While AI and remote sensing can assist with peripheral tasks like tree counting and health monitoring, the primary labor-intensive functions cannot be automated by digital AI systems.
category_cn: 农业、渔业和林业类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责是高度体力劳动，并在不可预测的户外环境中执行，例如植苗、清理灌木丛和扑灭森林火灾。虽然人工智能和遥感可以协助完成树木计数和健康监测等外围任务，但主要的劳动密集型功能无法通过数字人工智能系统实现自动化。

title: Fundraisers
exposure_rationale: Fundraising involves significant digital work including donor research, data analysis, and the creation of promotional messaging, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. While major gift solicitation and event management require high-level interpersonal skills and physical presence, the majority of the administrative, analytical, and communication-based tasks are moving toward AI-driven workflows.
exposure_rationale_cn: 筹款涉及重要的数字工作，包括捐助者研究、数据分析和促销信息的创建，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。虽然主要的礼品征集和活动管理需要高水平的人际交往能力和实际存在，但大多数基于管理、分析和沟通的任务正在转向人工智能驱动的工作流程。

title: Funeral service workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical tasks like preparing remains and transporting the deceased, alongside high-stakes interpersonal work providing grief counseling and comfort. While AI can streamline administrative duties like filing death certificates, scheduling, and writing obituaries, it cannot replace the physical presence and emotional intelligence required for funeral services.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心包括准备遗体和运送死者等体力任务，以及提供悲伤咨询和安慰的高风险人际工作。虽然人工智能可以简化提交死亡证明、安排时间和撰写讣告等行政职责，但它无法取代葬礼服务所需的实际存在和情商。

title: Gambling services workers
exposure_rationale: The occupation is a hybrid of physical hospitality and digital-adjacent information processing. While AI and automation are significantly impacting sports book writers and slot operations through online platforms and automated betting, the core of the job for dealers and managers involves physical presence, manual dexterity, and real-time human interaction to ensure a 'pleasant experience' and monitor for physical rule violations.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是实体接待和数字信息处理的混合体。虽然人工智能和自动化通过在线平台和自动投注对体育博彩作家和老虎机运营产生了重大影响，但荷官和经理的工作核心涉及到现场、手动灵巧性和实时人机交互，以确保“愉快的体验”并监控身体违规行为。

title: General maintenance and repair workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and real-time problem-solving in unpredictable physical environments, which are currently beyond the reach of AI and robotics. AI may assist with peripheral tasks like diagnosing equipment issues via computer vision or managing supply orders, but the primary work of repairing buildings and machinery remains a hands-on human requirement.
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心涉及体力劳动、手工灵巧性以及在不可预测的物理环境中实时解决问题，这是目前人工智能和机器人技术无法企及的。人工智能可以协助完成外围任务，例如通过计算机视觉诊断设备问题或管理供应订单，但修复建筑物和机器的主要工作仍然需要人类亲自动手。

title: General office clerks
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this role—data entry, document formatting, scheduling, and information processing—are almost entirely digital and routine, making them highly susceptible to AI automation. While some physical tasks like handling mail or greeting visitors remain, the vast majority of the workload can be absorbed by AI agents and automated software, as reflected in the BLS's projected decline for the occupation.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色的核心职责——数据输入、文档格式化、日程安排和信息处理——几乎完全是数字化和例行公事的，这使得他们非常容易受到人工智能自动化的影响。虽然处理邮件或问候访客等一些体力任务仍然存在，但绝大多数工作量可以由人工智能代理和自动化软件来承担，正如劳工统计局预计该职业的下降所反映的那样。

title: Genetic counselors
exposure_rationale: Genetic counselors perform high-level knowledge work, including analyzing complex DNA data and medical histories, which is highly susceptible to AI optimization. However, the core of the role involves providing psychological support and navigating sensitive ethical decisions with patients, requiring a level of empathy and human connection that limits full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 遗传咨询师从事高水平的知识工作，包括分析复杂的 DNA 数据和病史，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能优化的影响。然而，该角色的核心涉及提供心理支持并与患者一起做出敏感的道德决策，需要一定程度的同理心和人际联系，这限制了完全自动化。

title: Geographers
exposure_rationale: Geographers primarily perform digital knowledge work, including data analysis, GIS modeling, and report writing, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. While some fieldwork exists, the core of the profession involves processing satellite imagery and census data—tasks where AI and machine learning are rapidly becoming more efficient than humans.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 地理学家主要从事数字知识工作，包括数据分析、GIS 建模和报告撰写，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。虽然存在一些实地工作，但该专业的核心涉及处理卫星图像和人口普查数据——人工智能和机器学习正在迅速变得比人类更高效的任务。

title: Geological and hydrologic technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital data analysis. While AI and automation (like drones and remote sensors) are increasingly handling data collection and mapping, the role still requires significant physical presence for equipment maintenance, manual sample collection, and laboratory testing that cannot be fully digitized.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是实地考察和数字数据分析的混合体。虽然人工智能和自动化（如无人机和远程传感器）越来越多地处理数据收集和绘图，但该角色仍然需要大量的物理存在来进行设备维护、手动样本收集和无法完全数字化的实验室测试。

title: Geoscientists
exposure_rationale: Geoscientists have a balanced mix of physical and digital work. While AI is highly effective at analyzing seismic data, GIS mapping, and predictive modeling, the core of the job requires physical fieldwork, sample collection in remote environments, and laboratory testing that AI cannot perform. Consequently, AI will significantly enhance their analytical productivity but cannot replace the essential physical presence and real-world data gathering required for the profession.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 地球科学家平衡地兼顾了物理工作和数字工作。虽然人工智能在分析地震数据、GIS 测绘和预测建模方面非常有效，但这项工作的核心需要物理现场工作、远程环境中的样本采集以及人工智能无法执行的实验室测试。因此，人工智能将显着提高他们的分析生产力，但无法取代该行业所需的基本物理存在和现实世界数据收集。

title: Glaziers
exposure_rationale: The core work of a glazier is highly physical, requiring manual dexterity, strength, and real-time problem-solving in unpredictable construction environments. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like blueprint analysis or precision measurements, the actual installation, cutting, and securing of glass in the physical world remain well beyond current AI and robotic capabilities.
exposure_rationale_cn: 玻璃工的核心工作是高度体力的工作，需要手工灵巧、力量以及在不可预测的施工环境中实时解决问题的能力。虽然人工智能可能有助于完成蓝图分析或精确测量等外围任务，但物理世界中玻璃的实际安装、切割和固定仍然远远超出了当前人工智能和机器人的能力。

title: Graphic designers
exposure_rationale: Graphic design is a fundamentally digital occupation where core tasks—image generation, layout creation, and photo editing—are being rapidly transformed by generative AI. While high-level creative direction and client management remain human-centric, the automation of production tasks significantly increases individual productivity, likely reducing the total number of designers needed for routine commercial work.
exposure_rationale_cn: 平面设计本质上是一种数字化职业，其中的核心任务——图像生成、布局创建和照片编辑——正在被生成人工智能迅速改变。虽然高层创意指导和客户管理仍然以人为本，但生产任务的自动化显着提高了个人生产力，可能会减少日常商业工作所需的设计师总数。

title: Grounds maintenance workers
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are almost entirely physical and performed in unpredictable outdoor environments, which provides a strong natural barrier against AI. While autonomous mowers or drones may assist with specific tasks, the majority of the work—such as planting, tree climbing, and complex manual maintenance—requires human dexterity and physical presence that AI cannot replicate.
category_cn: 建筑和场地清洁类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责几乎完全是体力劳动，并且在不可预测的户外环境中执行，这为人工智能提供了强大的天然屏障。虽然自动割草机或无人机可以协助完成特定任务，但大多数工作（例如种植、爬树和复杂的手动维护）需要人类的灵活性和物理存在，而人工智能无法复制。

title: Hand laborers and material movers
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are fundamentally physical, involving the manual movement, cleaning, and packing of heavy materials in unpredictable real-world environments. While AI can optimize logistics, routing, and inventory tracking, the physical labor itself is resistant to AI and requires advanced robotics rather than software-based intelligence to automate.
title_cn: 手工劳动者和物料搬运工
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责基本上是体力工作，包括在不可预测的现实环境中手动移动、清洁和包装重型材料。虽然人工智能可以优化物流、路线和库存跟踪，但体力劳动本身对人工智能是有抵抗力的，需要先进的机器人技术而不是基于软件的智能来实现自动化。

title: Hazardous materials removal workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor in unpredictable environments, such as scrubbing surfaces, constructing containment areas, and operating heavy machinery. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like record-keeping, regulatory compliance checks, or analyzing sensor data for radiation levels, the primary work requires a physical human presence to navigate complex, hazardous sites.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及不可预测的环境中的体力劳动，例如擦洗表面、建造收容区域和操作重型机械。虽然人工智能可以协助完成记录保存、监管合规性检查或分析辐射水平传感器数据等外围任务，但主要工作需要人类在复杂、危险的场所进行导航。

title: Health and safety engineers
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant mix of digital knowledge work and physical presence. While AI can assist in reviewing equipment plans, analyzing accident data, and interpreting complex safety regulations, the core duties require physical inspections of facilities, interviewing employees for investigations, and directing the hands-on installation of safety devices.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及数字知识工作和实际存在的重要结合。虽然人工智能可以协助审查设备计划、分析事故数据和解释复杂的安全法规，但其核心职责需要对设施进行物理检查、采访员工进行调查以及指导安全设备的实际安装。

title: Health education specialists
exposure_rationale: A significant portion of the role involves digital knowledge work such as analyzing community health data, writing grant proposals, and creating educational materials, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, the core requirements of community advocacy, empathetic interpersonal interaction, and physical presence for local events and training provide a buffer against full automation.
category_cn: 社区和社会服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色的很大一部分涉及数字知识工作，例如分析社区健康数据、撰写拨款提案和创建教育材料，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。然而，社区宣传、同理心的人际互动以及当地活动和培训的实际存在等核心要求为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Health information technologists and medical registrars
exposure_rationale: This occupation is almost entirely digital, involving the analysis, organization, and validation of clinical data within computerized systems. AI is exceptionally well-suited for core tasks like data abstraction, classification coding, and generating reports from large datasets, which significantly increases the risk of automation and restructuring.
title_cn: 健康信息技术员和医疗登记员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业几乎完全数字化，涉及计算机系统内临床数据的分析、组织和验证。人工智能非常适合数据抽象、分类编码和从大型数据集生成报告等核心任务，这显着增加了自动化和重组的风险。

title: Heating, air conditioning, and refrigeration mechanics and installers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and real-time problem solving in unpredictable physical environments, which are highly resistant to AI. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like diagnostic software, scheduling, or energy load calculations, it cannot perform the physical installation, repair, or handling of hazardous materials required for the job.
title_cn: 暖气、空调和制冷机械师和安装工
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及体力劳动、手工灵巧性以及在不可预测的物理环境中实时解决问题，对人工智能具有很强的抵抗力。虽然人工智能可以协助诊断软件、调度或能源负载计算等外围任务，但它无法执行工作所需的物理安装、维修或危险材料的处理。

title: Heavy and tractor-trailer truck drivers
exposure_rationale: While the core task of driving is physical and occurs in a complex real-world environment, it is a primary target for autonomous vehicle AI, which could eventually automate long-haul highway segments. However, the job still requires significant physical presence for non-driving tasks like securing cargo, conducting inspections, and navigating 'last-mile' urban environments that remain challenging for current AI.
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然驾驶的核心任务是物理性的，并且发生在复杂的现实环境中，但它是自动驾驶汽车人工智能的主要目标，它最终可以实现长途高速公路路段的自动化。然而，这项工作仍然需要大量的人员在场来执行非驾驶任务，例如保护货物、进行检查以及在“最后一英里”城市环境中导航，这些对于当前的人工智能来说仍然具有挑战性。

title: Heavy vehicle and mobile equipment service technicians
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is highly physical, involving manual dexterity, strength, and real-world troubleshooting in unpredictable environments like farms and construction sites. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic software and predictive maintenance logs, it cannot perform the physical disassembly, repair, and reassembly of heavy mechanical components.
title_cn: 重型车辆和移动设备维修技师
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心是高度体力的，涉及手工灵活性、力量以及在农场和建筑工地等不可预测的环境中进行现实世界的故障排除。虽然人工智能将显着增强诊断软件和预测性维护日志，但它无法执行重型机械部件的物理拆卸、维修和重新组装。

title: High school teachers
exposure_rationale: High school teachers are heavily exposed because core digital tasks like lesson planning, content creation, and grading are highly susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. While the physical requirement of classroom management and interpersonal mentorship provides a buffer, AI's ability to provide personalized tutoring and automated feedback significantly reshapes the instructional delivery and administrative workload of the profession.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 高中教师面临很大的风险，因为课程规划、内容创建和评分等核心数字任务非常容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。虽然课堂管理和人际指导的物理要求提供了缓冲，但人工智能提供个性化辅导和自动反馈的能力显着重塑了该专业的教学交付和管理工作量。

title: Historians
exposure_rationale: Historians perform high-level knowledge work—researching, analyzing, and writing—that is increasingly digital and highly susceptible to AI-driven efficiency gains in document processing and synthesis. While the job requires human judgment and physical interaction with artifacts or archives, the core output of reports and articles faces significant restructuring as AI tools become capable of parsing vast historical datasets and drafting complex narratives.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 历史学家从事高水平的知识工作——研究、分析和写作——这些工作越来越数字化，并且非常容易受到人工智能驱动的文档处理和合成效率提升的影响。虽然这项工作需要人类判断以及与文物或档案的物理交互，但随着人工智能工具变得能够解析大量历史数据集并起草复杂的叙述，报告和文章的核心输出面临重大重组。

title: Home health and personal care aides
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are fundamentally physical and interpersonal, involving manual tasks like bathing, dressing, and lifting patients in unpredictable home environments. While AI may assist with peripheral administrative tasks like scheduling or monitoring vital signs, it cannot replace the essential human presence and physical labor required for personal care.
title_cn: 家庭健康和个人护理助理
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责基本上是身体和人际交往，涉及体力劳动，例如在不可预测的家庭环境中洗澡、穿衣和抬起病人。虽然人工智能可以协助执行调度或监测生命体征等外围管理任务，但它无法取代个人护理所需的基本人类存在和体力劳动。

title: Human resources managers
exposure_rationale: Human resources management is a digital-heavy knowledge occupation where AI can significantly automate recruitment screening, payroll processing, and regulatory compliance reporting. While the role requires high-level interpersonal skills for dispute mediation and strategic leadership, the vast majority of the administrative and analytical tasks are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and restructuring.
exposure_rationale_cn: 人力资源管理是一个数字化程度较高的知识职业，人工智能可以显着自动化招聘筛选、工资单处理和监管合规报告。虽然该角色需要高水平的人际交往能力来调解纠纷和战略领导，但绝大多数行政和分析任务非常容易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高和重组的影响。

title: Human resources specialists
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of recruiting, screening, and administrative record-keeping are highly digital and data-driven, making them prime targets for AI automation and augmentation. While the role requires significant interpersonal interaction and human judgment for interviewing and employee relations, AI can now handle complex scheduling, initial candidate vetting, and policy inquiries, significantly increasing individual worker productivity and reducing the need for entry-level administrative staff.
exposure_rationale_cn: 招聘、筛选和行政记录保存的核心任务是高度数字化和数据驱动的，这使得它们成为人工智能自动化和增强的主要目标。虽然该职位需要大量的人际互动和人为判断来进行面试和员工关系，但人工智能现在可以处理复杂的日程安排、初始候选人审查和政策查询，从而显着提高个体员工的生产力并减少对入门级管理人员的需求。

title: Hydrologists
exposure_rationale: Hydrologists have a high exposure to AI because a significant portion of their work involves data analysis, computer modeling, and report writing—tasks where AI is rapidly advancing. However, the physical requirement of field work, such as collecting water samples and measuring streamflow in remote locations, provides a substantial buffer against full automation.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 水文学家对人工智能的接触程度很高，因为他们的工作很大一部分涉及数据分析、计算机建模和报告撰写——人工智能正在迅速推进的任务。然而，现场工作的物理要求，例如收集水样和测量偏远地区的水流，为完全自动化提供了很大的缓冲。

title: Industrial designers
exposure_rationale: Industrial design is a predominantly digital occupation where core tasks like sketching, 3D modeling, and rendering are being rapidly transformed by generative AI and advanced CAD automation. While the role requires physical prototyping and cross-functional collaboration, the vast majority of the design process is computer-based, making it highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and workflow restructuring.
exposure_rationale_cn: 工业设计是一个以数字化为主的职业，其中草图绘制、3D 建模和渲染等核心任务正在通过生成式 AI 和先进的 CAD 自动化快速转变。虽然该角色需要物理原型设计和跨职能协作，但绝大多数设计过程都是基于计算机的，因此非常容易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高和工作流程重组的影响。

title: Industrial engineering technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of digital work, such as analyzing production costs, using CAD/CAM software, and conducting statistical studies, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation. However, the role also requires physical presence on the manufacturing floor to observe workers, assess machinery performance, and evaluate physical layouts, which provides a partial buffer against full automation.
title_cn: 工业工程技术员和技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量数字化工作，例如分析生产成本、使用 CAD/CAM 软件以及进行统计研究，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能自动化的影响。然而，该角色还需要亲自到制造车间观察工人、评估机械性能并评估物理布局，这为完全自动化提供了部分缓冲。

title: Industrial engineers
exposure_rationale: Industrial engineering is heavily focused on data analysis, systems design, and process optimization—tasks where AI and machine learning excel. While the role requires physical site visits and human collaboration to understand workflows, the core work product is digital analysis and modeling, making the occupation highly susceptible to significant productivity gains and restructuring through AI-driven automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 工业工程主要关注数据分析、系统设计和流程优化——人工智能和机器学习擅长的任务。虽然该职位需要实地考察和人工协作来了解工作流程，但其核心工作产品是数字分析和建模，这使得该职业极易通过人工智能驱动的自动化实现生产力的显着提高和重组。

title: Industrial machinery mechanics, machinery maintenance workers, and millwrights
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and real-time troubleshooting in unpredictable physical environments, which provides a strong barrier against AI automation. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic capabilities and predictive maintenance scheduling, the actual repair, installation, and physical manipulation of heavy machinery still require human presence and mechanical skill.
title_cn: 工业机械师、机械维护工和装配工
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及体力劳动、手工灵巧度以及在不可预测的物理环境中实时排除故障，这为人工智能自动化提供了强大的障碍。虽然人工智能将显着增强诊断能力和预测性维护计划，但重型机械的实际维修、安装和物理操作仍然需要人类的存在和机械技能。

title: Industrial production managers
exposure_rationale: This role is a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical oversight. AI will significantly enhance the analytical aspects of the job, such as production scheduling, budget optimization, and predictive maintenance data analysis, but the core requirements of physical plant presence, personnel management, and real-time problem-solving in a manual environment provide a buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一角色是数字知识工作和物理监督的混合体。人工智能将显着增强工作的分析能力，例如生产调度、预算优化和预测性维护数据分析，但物理工厂存在、人员管理和手动环境中实时问题解决的核心要求为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Information clerks
exposure_rationale: This occupation is highly exposed because its core tasks—processing routine data, answering inquiries, and maintaining records—are fundamentally digital and information-based. While some roles like hotel desk clerks or airport agents require a physical presence, the majority of the work involves routine information processing that is increasingly being automated by AI-driven self-service systems, chatbots, and automated data entry tools.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的暴露程度很高，因为其核心任务——处理日常数据、回答查询和维护记录——从根本上来说是数字化和信息化的。虽然酒店前台服务员或机场代理等某些职位需要亲自到场，但大多数工作涉及日常信息处理，这些信息处理越来越多地通过人工智能驱动的自助服务系统、聊天机器人和自动数据输入工具实现自动化。

title: Information security analysts
exposure_rationale: This occupation is entirely digital, involving tasks like monitoring networks, analyzing vulnerabilities, and writing reports that are highly susceptible to AI automation. While AI increases the demand for security to counter AI-driven threats, it also significantly automates the core functions of threat detection, log analysis, and incident response, drastically increasing individual worker productivity.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业完全是数字化的，涉及监控网络、分析漏洞和编写报告等高度容易受到人工智能自动化影响的任务。虽然人工智能增加了应对人工智能驱动的威胁的安全需求，但它也显着实现了威胁检测、日志分析和事件响应等核心功能的自动化，从而大幅提高了个体员工的生产力。

title: Instructional coordinators
exposure_rationale: Instructional coordinators perform high-level knowledge work including curriculum development, data analysis, and educational material review, all of which are digital-first tasks highly susceptible to AI augmentation. While the role requires significant interpersonal interaction for teacher coaching and stakeholder management, the core 'product'—curricula and instructional strategies—can be generated and optimized much faster using generative AI and advanced analytics.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 教学协调员执行高水平的知识工作，包括课程开发、数据分析和教育材料审查，所有这些都是数字优先的任务，非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。虽然该角色需要大量的人际互动来进行教师指导和利益相关者管理，但核心“产品”——课程和教学策略——可以使用生成人工智能和高级分析更快地生成和优化。

title: Insulation workers
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are highly physical and require manual dexterity in unpredictable, confined environments like attics and crawl spaces. AI has minimal impact on the physical installation of materials, though it may slightly assist with peripheral tasks like blueprint analysis or material estimation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责是高度体力劳动，需要在不可预测的、狭窄的环境（如阁楼和狭小空间）中灵活操作。人工智能对材料的物理安装影响很小，尽管它可能对蓝图分析或材料估算等外围任务略有帮助。

title: Insurance sales agents
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of analyzing policies, customizing insurance programs, and maintaining records are digital and data-driven, making them highly susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. While the role requires interpersonal trust and persuasive sales skills, AI-powered chatbots and recommendation engines are increasingly capable of handling routine inquiries and policy comparisons, significantly increasing individual agent productivity and reducing the need for human intervention in simple transactions.
exposure_rationale_cn: 分析保单、定制保险计划和维护记录的核心任务是数字化和数据驱动的，这使得它们非常容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。虽然该角色需要人际信任和有说服力的销售技巧，但人工智能驱动的聊天机器人和推荐引擎越来越有能力处理日常查询和政策比较，从而显着提高个体代理的生产力并减少简单交易中人为干预的需要。

title: Insurance underwriters
exposure_rationale: Underwriting is a fundamentally digital occupation centered on routine information processing, risk modeling, and data analysis—all areas where AI excels. The BLS already projects a decline in employment due to automation, and the shift from traditional software to advanced AI will likely automate even complex, non-standard risk assessments that previously required human judgment.
exposure_rationale_cn: 承保从根本上来说是一种数字化职业，以日常信息处理、风险建模和数据分析为中心，这些都是人工智能擅长的领域。美国劳工统计局已经预测，自动化将导致就业率下降，而从传统软件向先进人工智能的转变可能会实现以前需要人类判断的复杂、非标准风险评估的自动化。

title: Interior designers
exposure_rationale: Interior design is heavily reliant on digital tools like CAD and BIM, which are being rapidly transformed by generative AI capable of creating photorealistic renderings and floor plans from text prompts. While the job requires physical site visits, material inspections, and complex interpersonal coordination with contractors, the core creative and technical drafting tasks are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and productivity gains.
exposure_rationale_cn: 室内设计严重依赖 CAD 和 BIM 等数字工具，生成式人工智能正在迅速改变这些工具，能够根据文本提示创建逼真的渲染图和平面图。虽然这项工作需要实地考察、材料检查以及与承包商进行复杂的人际协调，但核心创意和技术起草任务非常容易受到人工智能驱动的自动化和生产力提升的影响。

title: Interpreters and translators
exposure_rationale: The core work product is purely digital information (text and speech) in a domain where Large Language Models already demonstrate near-human proficiency. While high-stakes interpreting (legal, medical) and sign language still require human presence and nuanced judgment, the vast majority of translation and routine interpreting tasks are being rapidly automated or shifted to 'post-editing' roles, significantly reducing the total human labor required per unit of work.
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心工作产品是纯数字信息（文本和语音），大型语言模型已经表现出接近人类的熟练程度。虽然高风险的口​​译（法律、医学）和手语仍然需要人工参与和细致入微的判断，但绝大多数翻译和日常口译任务正在迅速自动化或转移到“译后编辑”角色，从而大大减少了每个工作单元所需的总人力。

title: Ironworkers
exposure_rationale: Ironworking is a highly physical occupation performed in unpredictable, outdoor environments and at great heights, which provides a significant natural barrier to AI and robotics. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like blueprint analysis or site scheduling, the core duties of manual welding, bolting, and balancing on structural beams require real-time human dexterity and physical presence that cannot be automated with current or near-future technology.
exposure_rationale_cn: 钢铁加工是一项高度体力的职业，需要在不可预测的户外环境和高空进行，这为人工智能和机器人技术提供了重要的天然屏障。虽然人工智能可能会协助完成蓝图分析或现场调度等外围任务，但结构梁上的手动焊接、螺栓连接和平衡等核心职责需要实时的人类灵活性和物理存在，而当前或近期的技术无法实现自动化。

title: Janitors and building cleaners
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are almost entirely physical, involving manual labor in unpredictable and varied environments like schools, hospitals, and construction sites. While AI might assist with minor administrative tasks like supply ordering or scheduling, the primary work of cleaning, disinfecting, and making physical repairs remains a significant barrier to AI and robotic automation.
category_cn: 建筑和场地清洁类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责几乎完全是体力劳动，涉及在学校、医院和建筑工地等不可预测的多变环境中进行体力劳动。虽然人工智能可能有助于完成供应订购或调度等次要管理任务，但清洁、消毒和物理维修等主要工作仍然是人工智能和机器人自动化的重大障碍。

title: Jewelers and precious stone and metal workers
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical dexterity, manual repair, and hands-on craftsmanship that AI cannot replicate. However, AI and automation are significantly impacting the design and appraisal phases through generative CAD tools and automated gemstone grading, contributing to a projected decline in total employment.
title_cn: 珠宝商和宝石及金属工人
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项工作的核心涉及身体的灵巧性、手工修理以及人工智能无法复制的手工技艺。然而，人工智能和自动化通过生成 CAD 工具和自动化宝石分级对设计和评估阶段产生了重大影响，导致总就业人数预计下降。

title: Judges and hearing officers
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of researching legal issues, evaluating documents, and writing opinions are highly digital and susceptible to AI automation, which can significantly increase productivity and reduce the need for human staff. However, the role requires high-stakes human judgment, presiding over physical courtrooms, and maintaining public trust, which creates a significant barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 研究法律问题、评估文件和撰写意见等核心任务高度数字化，容易受到人工智能自动化的影响，这可以显着提高生产力并减少对人力的需求。然而，这一角色需要高风险的人类判断、主持实体法庭并维护公众信任，这对全面自动化造成了重大障碍。

title: Kindergarten and elementary school teachers
exposure_rationale: AI will significantly automate back-end knowledge work such as lesson planning, grading, and administrative communication, which currently occupy a large portion of a teacher's time. However, the core of the role involves physical supervision, emotional support, and real-time behavioral management of young children, which creates a substantial barrier to full automation.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 人工智能将显着自动化后端知识工作，例如备课、评分和管理沟通，这些工作目前占用了教师的大部分时间。然而，该角色的核心涉及幼儿的身体监督、情感支持和实时行为管理，这对全面自动化造成了很大的障碍。

title: Labor relations specialists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is predominantly digital and knowledge-based, involving the drafting of contracts, policy development, and legal compliance—all areas where AI excels. While the high-stakes interpersonal negotiation and dispute resolution provide a buffer, AI will significantly automate the research, document generation, and investigative analysis components of the role.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业主要是数字化和知识型的，涉及合同起草、政策制定和法律合规——这些都是人工智能擅长的领域。虽然高风险的人际谈判和争议解决提供了缓冲，但人工智能将显着自动化该角色的研究、文档生成和调查分析部分。

title: Landscape architects
exposure_rationale: Landscape architecture is a predominantly digital knowledge-based occupation where core tasks like CADD modeling, site analysis, and cost estimation are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. While the role requires physical site visits and interpersonal client management, the generative design capabilities of AI can significantly accelerate the creative and technical drafting phases, potentially reducing the total human hours required per project.
exposure_rationale_cn: 景观设计是一个主要以数字知识为基础的职业，其中 CADD 建模、场地分析和成本估算等核心任务非常容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。虽然该角色需要实地考察和人际客户管理，但人工智能的生成设计功能可以显着加速创意和技术起草阶段，从而有可能减少每个项目所需的总工时。

title: Lawyers
exposure_rationale: Lawyers perform high-level knowledge work that is almost entirely digital, involving document drafting, legal research, and complex data analysis—all areas where LLMs excel. While courtroom advocacy and high-stakes interpersonal negotiation provide a protective barrier, the vast majority of billable hours are spent on tasks that AI can now significantly accelerate or automate, leading to major structural changes in the profession.
exposure_rationale_cn: 律师从事几乎完全数字化的高水平知识工作，包括文件起草、法律研究和复杂的数据分析——这些都是法学硕士擅长的领域。虽然法庭辩护和高风险的人际谈判提供了保护性屏障，但绝大多数计费时间都花在人工智能现在可以显着加速或自动化的任务上，从而导致该行业发生重大结构性变化。

title: Librarians and library media specialists
exposure_rationale: Librarianship is fundamentally about information retrieval, organization, and research—domains where LLMs and AI search engines excel. While the physical presence in schools and public libraries provides a buffer through community programming and interpersonal support, the core technical tasks of cataloging, database management, and reference assistance are highly exposed to AI automation and displacement.
title_cn: 图书管理员和图书馆媒体专员
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 图书馆学从根本上讲是关于信息检索、组织和研究——法学硕士和人工智能搜索引擎擅长的领域。虽然学校和公共图书馆的实体存在通过社区规划和人际支持提供了缓冲，但编目、数据库管理和参考协助等核心技术任务高度暴露于人工智能自动化和替代。

title: Library technicians and assistants
exposure_rationale: A significant portion of this role involves routine information processing, cataloging, and answering reference questions, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation. While physical tasks like reshelving books and interpersonal community programming provide some protection, the core digital and clerical functions are increasingly being handled by automated systems and AI-driven search tools.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色的很大一部分涉及日常信息处理、编目和回答参考问题，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能自动化的影响。虽然重新上架书籍和人际社区编程等物理任务提供了一些保护，但核心数字和文书功能越来越多地由自动化系统和人工智能驱动的搜索工具处理。

title: Licensed practical and licensed vocational nurses
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical tasks such as bathing, dressing, and wound care, which are currently beyond the reach of AI and robotics. However, AI will significantly impact the information-processing aspects of the job, including documenting patient care, monitoring vitals, and assisting with diagnostic reporting, leading to moderate overall exposure.
title_cn: 执业实用护士和职业护士
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心涉及洗澡、穿衣和伤口护理等体力任务，目前这些任务超出了人工智能和机器人技术的能力范围。然而，人工智能将显着影响工作的信息处理方面，包括记录患者护理、监测生命体征和协助诊断报告，从而导致适度的整体暴露。

title: Loan officers
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of loan officers—analyzing financial data, verifying documentation, and assessing risk—are fundamentally digital and highly susceptible to AI automation. While complex commercial loans and relationship-based mortgage sales still require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the rapid advancement of automated underwriting and AI-driven customer service significantly reduces the need for human intervention in routine loan processing.
exposure_rationale_cn: 信贷员的核心任务——分析财务数据、验证文件和评估风险——基本上是数字化的，并且非常容易受到人工智能自动化的影响。虽然复杂的商业贷款和基于关系的抵押贷款销售仍然需要人类判断和人际交往能力，但自动化承保和人工智能驱动的客户服务的快速发展大大减少了常规贷款处理中人工干预的需要。

title: Lodging managers
exposure_rationale: Lodging managers perform a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical site management. While AI can automate back-office tasks like revenue management, dynamic pricing, and staff scheduling, the core role requires physical inspections of facilities and high-stakes interpersonal conflict resolution with guests and staff that cannot be fully digitized.
exposure_rationale_cn: 酒店经理将数字知识工作和实体场地管理结合起来。虽然人工智能可以自动化后台任务，如收入管理、动态定价和员工调度，但其核心作用需要对设施进行物理检查，并解决与客人和员工之间的高风险人际冲突，而这些是无法完全数字化的。

title: Logging workers
exposure_rationale: The core work is highly physical, involving the operation of heavy machinery and manual labor in unpredictable outdoor environments. While AI may improve peripheral tasks like log grading through computer vision or optimize harvest planning, the physical requirements of felling and transporting timber provide a strong barrier to AI replacement.
category_cn: 农业、渔业和林业类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心工作是高度体力的工作，涉及在不可预测的户外环境中操作重型机械和体力劳动。虽然人工智能可以通过计算机视觉改善原木分级等外围任务或优化采伐计划，但砍伐和运输木材的物理要求为人工智能的替代提供了强大的障碍。

title: Logisticians
exposure_rationale: Logisticians perform high-level knowledge work that is primarily digital, involving data analysis, forecasting, and supply chain optimization—tasks where AI excels. While the role requires human-to-human negotiation and real-world problem-solving for physical disruptions, the core functions of inventory management and route optimization are increasingly being automated or enhanced by sophisticated AI algorithms.
exposure_rationale_cn: 物流师从事的高水平知识工作主要是数字化的，包括数据分析、预测和供应链优化——人工智能擅长这些任务。虽然该角色需要人与人之间的谈判和解决现实世界中的物理中断问题，但库存管理和路线优化的核心功能正日益自动化或通过复杂的人工智能算法得到增强。

title: Machinists and tool and die makers
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant physical component, including manual dexterity, machine setup, and material handling in a factory environment. However, AI and advanced automation are increasingly capable of optimizing CNC programming, interpreting CAD designs, and monitoring machine health, which increases worker productivity and reduces the demand for traditional tool and die making skills.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及重要的物理组成部分，包括工厂环境中的手工灵活性、机器设置和物料搬运。然而，人工智能和先进自动化越来越能够优化 CNC 编程、解释 CAD 设计和监控机器运行状况，从而提高工人的生产力并减少对传统工具和模具制造技能的需求。

title: Management analysts
exposure_rationale: Management analysts perform high-level knowledge work—including data analysis, report writing, and financial modeling—that is highly susceptible to AI augmentation and automation. While the role requires significant interpersonal skills for client interviews and stakeholder management, the core 'back-office' tasks of synthesizing information and developing efficiency recommendations are increasingly being streamlined by AI tools.
exposure_rationale_cn: 管理分析师执行高级知识工作，包括数据分析、报告撰写和财务建模，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能增强和自动化的影响。虽然该职位在客户访谈和利益相关者管理方面需要大量的人际交往能力，但人工智能工具正在日益简化综合信息和制定效率建议的核心“后台”任务。

title: Manicurists and pedicurists
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves high-precision physical labor, tactile sensitivity, and real-time human interaction in a physical environment. While AI can assist with peripheral business tasks like scheduling or inventory management, the primary service of cleaning, shaping, and decorating nails remains a manual task that is difficult to automate with current robotics.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及高精度的体力劳动、触觉敏感度以及物理环境中的实时人机交互。虽然人工智能可以协助完成调度或库存管理等外围业务任务，但清洁、塑造和装饰指甲等主要服务仍然是一项手动任务，很难用当前的机器人技术实现自动化。

title: Marine engineers and naval architects
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves digital design, complex mathematical modeling, and technical report writing, all of which are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and automation. While physical site visits to shipyards and offshore platforms provide a buffer, the shift toward AI-integrated CAD, automated performance testing, and generative design for hulls and machinery significantly reshapes the workflow.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及数字设计、复杂的数学建模和技术报告撰写，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高和自动化的影响。虽然对造船厂和海上平台的实地考察提供了缓冲，但向人工智能集成 CAD、自动化性能测试以及船体和机械生成设计的转变显着重塑了工作流程。

title: Market research analysts
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this role—data collection, statistical analysis, trend forecasting, and report generation—are fundamentally digital and align perfectly with AI's strengths in processing large datasets and generating insights. While human judgment is still needed for high-level strategy and client relationships, AI can now automate the vast majority of the technical and administrative tasks that define the daily work of an analyst.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色的核心职责——数据收集、统计分析、趋势预测和报告生成——基本上是数字化的，并且与人工智能在处理大型数据集和生成见解方面的优势完美契合。虽然高层战略和客户关系仍然需要人类判断，但人工智能现在可以自动化定义分析师日常工作的绝大多数技术和管理任务。

title: Marriage and family therapists
exposure_rationale: While the work is increasingly digital via telehealth and involves significant information processing, the core value of therapy lies in human-to-human empathy, trust, and the navigation of complex interpersonal dynamics. AI will likely automate administrative tasks and provide diagnostic support, but the high-stakes emotional nature of family and marriage counseling provides a significant barrier to full automation.
category_cn: 社区和社会服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然工作通过远程医疗日益数字化并涉及大量信息处理，但治疗的核心价值在于人与人之间的同理心、信任以及复杂的人际动态的导航。人工智能可能会自动化管理任务并提供诊断支持，但家庭和婚姻咨询的高风险情感本质为完全自动化设置了重大障碍。

title: Masonry workers
exposure_rationale: Masonry is a highly physical trade performed in unpredictable outdoor environments that require manual dexterity, strength, and real-time sensory feedback. While AI and robotics may assist with blueprint analysis or specialized brick-laying machines in controlled settings, the core tasks of navigating muddy sites, handling heavy materials, and finishing surfaces remain resistant to digital automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 砌石是一项在不可预测的户外环境中进行的高度体力工作，需要手工灵巧、力量和实时感官反馈。虽然人工智能和机器人技术可以在受控环境中协助蓝图分析或专用砌砖机，但在泥泞场地中行驶、搬运重型材料和精加工表面等核心任务仍然难以实现数字自动化。

title: Massage therapists
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is highly physical, requiring manual manipulation of soft tissues and real-time human empathy in a physical setting. While AI can assist with peripheral administrative tasks like scheduling, marketing, and documentation, it cannot replace the tactile skill and physical presence required for massage therapy.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心是高度体力的，需要在物理环境中手动操作软组织和实时的人类同理心。虽然人工智能可以协助完成日程安排、营销和文档等外围管理任务，但它无法取代按摩治疗所需的触觉技能和身体存在。

title: Material moving machine operators
exposure_rationale: The core of the job is physical operation of heavy machinery in dynamic environments like warehouses and construction sites, which provides a buffer against full automation. However, AI-driven computer vision and autonomous navigation are increasingly being integrated into forklifts and conveyor systems, leading to moderate exposure as these technologies augment or replace human operators in structured settings.
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项工作的核心是在仓库和建筑工地等动态环境中对重型机械进行物理操作，这为全面自动化提供了缓冲。然而，人工智能驱动的计算机视觉和自主导航越来越多地集成到叉车和输送机系统中，随着这些技术在结构化环境中增强或取代人类操作员，导致适度的暴露。

title: Material recording clerks
exposure_rationale: This occupation is highly exposed because its core functions—tracking data, scheduling, and inventory reporting—are digital information-processing tasks that AI and automated systems excel at. While some physical presence is required to inspect goods or handle packages, the rapid integration of AI-driven logistics software, RFID technology, and computer vision for quality control is already leading to a projected decline in employment.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业暴露度很高，因为其核心功能——跟踪数据、调度和库存报告——是人工智能和自动化系统擅长的数字信息处理任务。虽然检查货物或处理包裹需要一定的实际存在，但人工智能驱动的物流软件、RFID 技术和用于质量控制的计算机视觉的快速集成已经导致就业人数预计下降。

title: Materials engineers
exposure_rationale: Materials engineering is heavily reliant on digital simulation, data analysis, and computational modeling, areas where AI and machine learning are already accelerating material discovery and property prediction. While the role requires physical lab work and manufacturing oversight, a significant portion of the core value—designing alloys, analyzing failures, and writing technical reports—is increasingly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 材料工程严重依赖数字模拟、数据分析和计算建模，人工智能和机器学习已经在这些领域加速材料发现和性能预测。虽然该角色需要物理实验室工作和制造监督，但核心价值的很大一部分——设计合金、分析故障和撰写技术报告——越来越容易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高和自动化的影响。

title: Mathematicians and statisticians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is almost entirely digital, involving data analysis, mathematical modeling, and coding—all domains where AI and Large Language Models excel. While high-level theoretical research and complex interdisciplinary communication require human judgment, AI can now automate significant portions of data cleaning, statistical testing, and code generation, drastically increasing individual productivity and restructuring the workflow.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业几乎完全是数字化的，涉及数据分析、数学建模和编码——人工智能和大型语言模型擅长的所有领域。虽然高水平的理论研究和复杂的跨学科交流需要人类的判断，但人工智能现在可以自动执行数据清理、统计测试和代码生成的重要部分，从而大大提高个人生产力并重组工作流程。

title: Mechanical engineering technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical labor. While AI can significantly automate digital tasks like 3D modeling, data analysis, and cost estimation, the role still requires a substantial physical presence for assembling parts, setting up vehicle crash tests, and operating machinery like lathes and grinders.
title_cn: 机械工程技术员和技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是数字知识工作和体力劳动的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化 3D 建模、数据分析和成本估算等数字任务，但该角色仍然需要大量的实际存在来组装零件、设置车辆碰撞测试以及操作车床和磨床等机械。

title: Mechanical engineers
exposure_rationale: Mechanical engineering is heavily reliant on digital tools like CAD, simulations, and data analysis, all of which are being rapidly enhanced by AI to automate complex design iterations and predictive modeling. While the role requires physical prototyping, site visits, and hardware testing, the core intellectual work of designing and analyzing mechanical systems is increasingly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 机械工程严重依赖 CAD、模拟和数据分析等数字工具，所有这些工具都在通过人工智能快速增强，以实现复杂设计迭代和预测建模的自动化。虽然该角色需要物理原型设计、现场考察和硬件测试，但设计和分析机械系统的核心智力工作越来越容易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高和自动化的影响。

title: Medical and health services managers
exposure_rationale: This role involves a high volume of digital knowledge work, such as budgeting, scheduling, and regulatory compliance, which are highly susceptible to AI optimization. However, the core responsibilities of recruiting, supervising staff, and navigating complex interpersonal relationships within a physical healthcare facility provide a significant buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及大量数字知识工作，例如预算、日程安排和法规遵从性，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能优化的影响。然而，在实体医疗机构内招聘、监督员工和处理复杂的人际关系等核心职责为全面自动化提供了重要的缓冲。

title: Medical assistants
exposure_rationale: Medical assistants perform a hybrid of physical and digital tasks; while AI can significantly automate administrative duties like scheduling, coding, and medical record entry, it cannot perform physical clinical tasks such as drawing blood, administering injections, or taking manual vital signs. The role requires a high degree of real-time human interaction and empathy in a physical clinical setting, which serves as a natural barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 医疗助理执行物理和数字任务的混合；虽然人工智能可以显着自动化管理职责，例如安排、编码和病历输入，但它无法执行物理临床任务，例如抽血、注射或手动采集生命体征。该角色需要在物理临床环境中进行高度实时的人机交互和同理心，这是完全自动化的天然障碍。

title: Medical dosimetrists
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves complex mathematical calculations, image analysis (CT/MRI), and digital treatment planning, all of which are domains where AI and machine learning excel. While there is a minor physical component involving patient positioning and equipment calibration, the vast majority of the work is digital information processing that is highly susceptible to automation and AI-driven optimization.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及复杂的数学计算、图像分析（CT/MRI）和数字治疗计划，所有这些都是人工智能和机器学习擅长的领域。虽然有一小部分物理部分涉及患者定位和设备校准，但绝大多数工作是数字信息处理，非常容易受到自动化和人工智能驱动的优化的影响。

title: Medical equipment repairers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is physical and manual, requiring dexterity to handle tools, disassemble machinery, and work in tight physical spaces. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic software, troubleshooting, and predictive maintenance scheduling, the physical act of repairing, installing, and calibrating hardware remains a human-centric task that cannot be automated by digital AI alone.
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心是体力和体力，需要灵活地处理工具、拆卸机器以及在狭小的物理空间中工作。虽然人工智能将显着增强诊断软件、故障排除和预测性维护计划，但维修、安装和校准硬件的物理行为仍然是一项以人为中心的任务，无法仅通过数字人工智能实现自动化。

title: Medical records specialists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is almost entirely digital, involving the processing, classification, and entry of data into electronic systems. AI is already highly capable of natural language processing and automated medical coding, which directly automates the core tasks of reviewing records and assigning clinical codes, significantly reducing the need for human intervention.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业几乎完全是数字化的，涉及数据的处理、分类和输入电子系统。人工智能已经具备很强的自然语言处理和自动化医疗编码能力，可直接自动执行审查记录和分配临床代码的核心任务，显着减少人工干预的需要。

title: Medical scientists
exposure_rationale: Medical scientists perform high-level knowledge work including data analysis, grant writing, and literature reviews, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation and automation. While physical laboratory work and clinical trials provide a buffer, the core of the profession is shifting toward computational biology and AI-driven drug discovery, significantly increasing productivity and reshaping research methodologies.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 医学科学家从事高水平的知识工作，包括数据分析、资助写作和文献综述，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强和自动化的影响。虽然物理实验室工作和临床试验提供了缓冲，但该行业的核心正在转向计算生物学和人工智能驱动的药物发现，从而显着提高生产力并重塑研究方法。

title: Medical transcriptionists
exposure_rationale: Medical transcription is a purely digital, routine information-processing task that has already been heavily impacted by speech recognition. Modern AI and Large Language Models (LLMs) can now handle complex medical terminology, formatting, and summarization with high accuracy, transforming the human role into a diminishing oversight function or eliminating it entirely.
exposure_rationale_cn: 医学转录是一项纯粹数字化的常规信息处理任务，已经受到语音识别的严重影响。现代人工智能和大型语言模型 (LLM) 现在可以高精度地处理复杂的医学术语、格式和摘要，将人类角色转变为逐渐减弱的监督功能或完全消除它。

title: Meeting, convention, and event planners
exposure_rationale: A significant portion of the role involves digital tasks such as logistics planning, vendor research, contract review, and communications, which are highly susceptible to AI automation and productivity gains. However, the core of the job requires physical site inspections, real-time on-site problem solving during events, and high-stakes interpersonal negotiation and relationship management, which provide a buffer against full automation.
title_cn: 会议、大会和活动策划师
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色的很大一部分涉及数字任务，例如物流规划、供应商研究、合同审查和通信，这些任务非常容易受到人工智能自动化和生产力提高的影响。然而，这项工作的核心需要物理现场检查、活动期间实时现场解决问题以及高风险的人际谈判和关系管理，这为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Metal and plastic machine workers
exposure_rationale: The core of the work is physical and requires presence on a factory floor to handle materials and maintain machinery. However, AI and advanced automation are increasingly capable of handling the digital aspects of the job, such as CNC programming, machine monitoring, and quality inspection, which is already contributing to a projected decline in employment.
title_cn: 金属和塑料机器操作员
exposure_rationale_cn: 工作的核心是体力工作，需要在工厂车间处理材料和维护机器。然而，人工智能和先进自动化越来越有能力处理工作的数字化方面，例如数控编程、机器监控和质量检查，这已经导致就业预计下降。

title: Microbiologists
exposure_rationale: Microbiologists have a high exposure to AI because a significant portion of their work involves data analysis, pattern recognition in genetic sequences, and technical reporting—all areas where AI is rapidly advancing. However, the physical requirement to conduct laboratory experiments, maintain biological cultures, and collect field samples provides a substantial buffer against full automation.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 微生物学家对人工智能的接触程度很高，因为他们的工作很大一部分涉及数据分析、基因序列模式识别和技术报告——这些都是人工智能快速发展的领域。然而，进行实验室实验、维持生物培养物和收集现场样本的物理要求为完全自动化提供了很大的缓冲。

title: Middle school teachers
exposure_rationale: Middle school teachers have high exposure because a significant portion of their workload—lesson planning, grading, and content creation—is digital and highly susceptible to AI automation. However, the core of the job requires physical presence for classroom management, emotional support for adolescents, and real-time interpersonal interaction, which provides a substantial buffer against full automation.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 中学教师的曝光率很高，因为他们的工作量（课程规划、评分和内容创建）的很大一部分都是数字化的，并且非常容易受到人工智能自动化的影响。然而，这项工作的核心需要课堂管理的实际存在、对青少年的情感支持以及实时人际互动，这为全面自动化提供了巨大的缓冲。

title: Military careers
exposure_rationale: Military careers are a vast composite of physical combat, manual labor, and high-level digital strategy. While AI will heavily automate back-office administration, logistics, and intelligence analysis (high exposure), the core requirements of physical presence, tactical human leadership, and operation in unpredictable physical environments provide a significant buffer.
exposure_rationale_cn: 军事生涯是体力战斗、体力劳动和高级数字战略的巨大综合体。虽然人工智能将高度自动化后台管理、后勤和情报分析（高风险），但物理存在、战术人类领导以及在不可预测的物理环境中操作的核心要求提供了重要的缓冲。

title: Mining and geological engineers
exposure_rationale: Mining and geological engineering involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, including mine design, technical reporting, and data analysis, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains. However, the role also requires substantial physical presence for site evaluations, safety inspections, and supervising construction in remote, unpredictable environments, which provides a buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 采矿和地质工程涉及大量数字知识工作，包括矿山设计、技术报告和数据分析，这些工作极易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高的影响。然而，该角色还需要大量实际人员在远程、不可预测的环境中进行现场评估、安全检查和监督施工，这为全面自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Models
exposure_rationale: While runway and live event modeling require physical presence, the majority of modeling work results in digital or print imagery which is highly vulnerable to AI-generated synthetic media. AI can now create hyper-realistic virtual models or 'digital twins' of existing models, allowing brands to showcase clothing and products without physical photo shoots, significantly reducing the demand for human labor in commercial and catalog sectors.
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然跑道和现场活动建模需要物理存在，但大多数建模工作都会产生数字或印刷图像，而这些图像很容易受到人工智能生成的合成媒体的影响。人工智能现在可以创建超现实的虚拟模型或现有模型的“数字双胞胎”，使品牌无需拍摄实物照片即可展示服装和产品，从而显着减少商业和目录领域对人力的需求。

title: Music directors and composers
exposure_rationale: The occupation is a hybrid of high-exposure digital work (composing) and lower-exposure physical work (conducting). Generative AI is rapidly automating music composition, arrangement, and scoring for commercial media, while the music director role remains more resilient due to the need for live leadership, physical rehearsals, and human-to-human artistic interpretation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是高暴露数字工作（作曲）和低暴露体力工作（指挥）的混合体。生成式人工智能正在快速自动化商业媒体的音乐作曲、编曲和评分，而音乐总监的角色由于需要现场领导、现场排练和人与人之间的艺术诠释，因此仍然更具弹性。

title: Musicians and singers
exposure_rationale: While AI can generate high-quality digital music and vocals, a significant portion of this occupation involves live performance, physical presence at venues, and human-centric events like religious services and concerts. The 'human element' and the physical act of playing an instrument or singing in real-time provide a natural barrier, though AI will increasingly compete for studio/session work and background music production.
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然人工智能可以生成高质量的数字音乐和声音，但这一职业的很大一部分涉及现场表演、现场表演以及以人为本的活动，如宗教仪式和音乐会。尽管人工智能将越来越多地参与工作室/会议工作和背景音乐制作，但“人的因素”和实时演奏乐器或唱歌的身体行为提供了天然的障碍。

title: Natural sciences managers
exposure_rationale: This role is predominantly knowledge-based, involving data analysis, budgeting, and technical reporting, all of which are highly susceptible to AI enhancement and automation. While the job requires significant human-centric leadership and physical oversight of laboratories, AI will drastically increase productivity in reviewing research, drafting operational reports, and optimizing resource allocation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一角色主要以知识为基础，涉及数据分析、预算和技术报告，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强和自动化的影响。虽然这项工作需要大量以人为本的领导和对实验室的实际监督，但人工智能将大大提高审查研究、起草运营报告和优化资源分配的生产力。

title: Network and computer systems administrators
exposure_rationale: This occupation is primarily digital and involves tasks like configuration, monitoring, and troubleshooting that are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and 'infrastructure as code' practices. While some physical hardware maintenance remains, the shift toward cloud computing and AI-powered network management tools is already leading to a projected decline in employment as fewer workers can manage larger, more complex systems.
title_cn: 网络和计算机系统管理员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业主要是数字化的，涉及配置、监控和故障排除等任务，这些任务非常容易受到人工智能驱动的自动化和“基础设施即代码”实践的影响。虽然一些物理硬件维护仍然存在，但向云计算和人工智能驱动的网络管理工具的转变已经导致就业人数预计下降，因为能够管理更大、更复杂系统的工人越来越少。

title: News analysts, reporters, and journalists
exposure_rationale: The core work product is digital (text, scripts, and multimedia), and AI can already automate significant portions of research, drafting, and editing. While physical presence for field reporting and the cultivation of human sources provide a protective barrier, the overall occupation faces high exposure as AI tools drastically increase individual productivity, potentially leading to further industry consolidation and fewer required roles.
title_cn: 新闻分析师、记者和新闻工作者
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心工作产品是数字化的（文本、脚本和多媒体），人工智能已经可以自动化大部分研究、起草和编辑工作。虽然现场报告和人力资源培养的实际存在提供了保护屏障，但随着人工智能工具极大地提高了个人生产力，整个职业面临着很高的风险，可能导致进一步的行业整合和所需角色的减少。

title: Nuclear engineers
exposure_rationale: Nuclear engineering is a high-level knowledge profession where core tasks—such as reactor design, dose calculations, and safety simulations—are performed using digital tools and complex mathematical modeling. While the high-stakes regulatory environment and the need for physical inspections at power plants provide a buffer, AI is rapidly advancing in its ability to optimize designs, analyze sensor data for predictive maintenance, and automate technical documentation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 核工程是一个高水平知识职业，其核心任务（例如反应堆设计、剂量计算和安全模拟）是使用数字工具和复杂的数学模型来执行的。虽然高风险的监管环境和发电厂物理检查的需求提供了缓冲，但人工智能在优化设计、分析传感器数据以进行预测性维护以及自动化技术文档方面的能力正在迅速提高。

title: Nuclear medicine technologists
exposure_rationale: The role requires significant physical presence to prepare and administer radiopharmaceuticals, operate heavy machinery, and physically assist or position patients. While AI will likely automate the digital aspects of the job—such as optimizing image quality, calculating dosages, and streamlining record-keeping—the core clinical and manual tasks remain insulated from full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色需要大量人员在场，以准备和管理放射性药物、操作重型机械以及物理协助或定位患者。虽然人工智能可能会自动化工作的数字部分，例如优化图像质量、计算剂量和简化记录保存，但核心临床和手动任务仍然与完全自动化无关。

title: Nuclear technicians
exposure_rationale: Nuclear technicians perform a mix of digital monitoring and physical labor, such as collecting environmental samples and maintaining hardware. While AI can significantly automate the data analysis, radiation calculation, and system monitoring aspects of the role, the requirement for physical presence in hazardous environments and the manual calibration of equipment provide a buffer against full automation.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 核技术人员执行数字监控和体力劳动的混合，例如收集环境样本和维护硬件。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化数据分析、辐射计算和系统监控方面的角色，但危险环境中的物理存在要求和设备的手动校准为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Nurse anesthetists, nurse midwives, and nurse practitioners
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of high-level knowledge work, such as diagnosing conditions and analyzing test results, which is highly susceptible to AI assistance. However, the core of the job requires physical presence for exams, procedures (like delivering babies or administering anesthesia), and complex interpersonal communication that provides a strong buffer against full automation.
title_cn: 麻醉护士、助产士和执业护士
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量高水平知识工作，例如诊断病情和分析测试结果，非常容易受到人工智能的帮助。然而，这项工作的核心需要亲自参与检查、手术（如分娩或麻醉），以及复杂的人际沟通，这为完全自动化提供了强有力的缓冲。

title: Nursing assistants and orderlies
exposure_rationale: The core duties of nursing assistants and orderlies—such as bathing, dressing, and physically transferring patients—are highly manual and require real-time human presence in unpredictable physical environments. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like recording vital signs or scheduling, the primary work product is physical care and interpersonal support, which remains largely insulated from AI automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 护理助理和护理人员的核心职责（例如洗澡、穿衣和转移患者）是高度手工操作的，并且需要在不可预测的物理环境中实时有人在场。虽然人工智能可以协助完成记录生命体征或日程安排等外围任务，但主要的工作产品是身体护理和人际支持，这在很大程度上与人工智能自动化无关。

title: Occupational health and safety specialists and technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital knowledge work. While AI can significantly automate data analysis, report writing, and regulatory cross-referencing, the core duties require physical inspections of worksites, manual testing with specialized equipment, and real-time human interaction to conduct safety trainings and emergency investigations.
title_cn: 职业健康和安全专员及技术员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是实地考察和数字知识工作的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化数据分析、报告编写和监管交叉引用，但其核心职责需要对工作场所进行物理检查、使用专用设备进行手动测试以及实时人机交互以进行安全培训和紧急调查。

title: Occupational therapists
exposure_rationale: Occupational therapy is a highly physical and interpersonal profession that requires real-time observation, manual manipulation of patients, and the assessment of physical environments like homes and workplaces. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks such as treatment planning, progress documentation, and medical history analysis, the core of the job involves hands-on rehabilitation and emotional support that cannot be replicated digitally.
exposure_rationale_cn: 职业治疗是一个高度体力和人际交往的职业，需要实时观察、对患者进行手动操作以及对家庭和工作场所等物理环境进行评估。虽然人工智能可以协助完成治疗计划、进展记录和病史分析等外围任务，但这项工作的核心涉及无法以数字方式复制的实际康复和情感支持。

title: Occupational therapy assistants and aides
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical assistance, manual therapy, and real-time human interaction, such as lifting patients and guiding motor skill exercises, which AI cannot perform. While AI can streamline administrative tasks like scheduling, documentation, and billing, the primary value of the role is rooted in physical presence and empathetic interpersonal support.
title_cn: 职业治疗助理和护理员
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心涉及物理援助、手法治疗和实时人机交互，例如抬起病人和指导运动技能练习，这是人工智能无法完成的。虽然人工智能可以简化日程安排、文档和计费等管理任务，但该角色的主要价值植根于实际存在和富有同理心的人际支持。

title: Oil and gas workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves heavy physical labor, equipment maintenance, and manual operation in unpredictable outdoor environments, which provides a strong buffer against AI. However, the industry is increasingly adopting automated drilling technologies and remote monitoring systems that improve productivity, meaning fewer human workers may be required to achieve the same output.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及繁重的体力劳动、设备维护以及难以预测的户外环境中的手工操作，这为人工智能提供了强有力的缓冲。然而，该行业越来越多地采用自动化钻井技术和远程监控系统来提高生产率，这意味着实现相同产量可能需要更少的人力。

title: Operations research analysts
exposure_rationale: This occupation is almost entirely digital, involving data collection, mathematical modeling, and report writing—all areas where AI and Large Language Models excel. While analysts still provide high-level human judgment and stakeholder persuasion, AI can now automate the core technical tasks of coding analytical tools, mining data, and generating optimization simulations, significantly increasing individual productivity and restructuring the role.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业几乎完全是数字化的，涉及数据收集、数学建模和报告撰写——所有这些都是人工智能和大型语言模型擅长的领域。虽然分析师仍然提供高水平的人类判断和利益相关者说服，但人工智能现在可以自动化编码分析工具、挖掘数据和生成优化模拟的核心技术任务，从而显着提高个人生产力并重组角色。

title: Opticians
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical, hands-on work such as measuring faces, adjusting frames with tools, and teaching patients how to insert contact lenses. While AI can automate administrative tasks and assist in frame selection via virtual try-on technology, the core requirements of physical fitting, manual repairs, and real-time interpersonal healthcare guidance provide a buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职位涉及大量的体力劳动，例如测量脸部、使用工具调整镜架以及教患者如何佩戴隐形眼镜。虽然人工智能可以自动化管理任务并通过虚拟试戴技术协助镜架选择，但身体试戴、手动维修和实时人际医疗保健指导的核心要求为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Optometrists
exposure_rationale: Optometry is a hybrid of physical clinical procedures and high-level data analysis. AI is highly effective at analyzing retinal scans and diagnostic data to identify diseases, which will significantly augment the diagnostic process; however, the core role requires physical presence for eye exams, minor surgical procedures, and the fitting of corrective lenses, which provides a strong buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 验光是物理临床程序和高级数据分析的结合。人工智能在分析视网膜扫描和诊断数据以识别疾病方面非常有效，这将显着增强诊断过程；然而，核心角色需要亲临现场进行眼科检查、小型外科手术以及佩戴矫正镜片，这为完全自动化提供了强有力的缓冲。

title: Orthotists and prosthetists
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of physical, hands-on work including patient examinations, manual measurements, and the physical fabrication or adjustment of medical devices. While AI and computer-aided design (CAD) can greatly enhance the diagnostic and design phases, the core requirements of real-time human interaction, physical dexterity, and clinical judgment in a healthcare setting provide a strong barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量的体力、实践工作，包括患者检查、手动测量以及医疗设备的物理制造或调整。虽然人工智能和计算机辅助设计 (CAD) 可以极大地增强诊断和设计阶段，但医疗保健环境中实时人机交互、身体灵活性和临床判断的核心要求为完全自动化设置了强大的障碍。

title: Painters, construction and maintenance
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are entirely physical, requiring manual dexterity, mobility at heights, and real-time adaptation to unpredictable physical environments. While AI might assist with peripheral business tasks like estimating or scheduling, it cannot perform the labor-intensive tasks of surface preparation and paint application.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责完全是体力劳动，需要灵巧的双手、高处的机动性以及对不可预测的物理环境的实时适应。虽然人工智能可以协助完成估算或调度等外围业务任务，但它无法执行表面准备和油漆应用等劳动密集型任务。

title: Painting and coating workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and presence in industrial or repair environments, which provides a natural barrier to AI. While AI and computer vision can enhance automated spray systems and quality control sensors, the need for human workers to set up equipment, prepare surfaces, and perform manual touch-ups in unpredictable repair settings remains significant.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及体力劳动、手工灵活性以及工业或维修环境中的存在，这为人工智能提供了天然障碍。虽然人工智能和计算机视觉可以增强自动喷涂系统和质量控制传感器，但在不可预测的维修环境中，人工设置设备、准备表面和执行手动修补的需求仍然很大。

title: Paralegals and legal assistants
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation—legal research, document drafting, and information organization—are fundamentally digital and align perfectly with the strengths of Large Language Models. While some interpersonal and courtroom logistics remain, AI can already automate or significantly accelerate the vast majority of a paralegal's workload, leading to the BLS's projection of 0% job growth despite high demand for legal services.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责——法律研究、文件起草和信息组织——从根本上来说是数字化的，并且与大型语言模型的优势完美契合。虽然一些人际和法庭后勤工作仍然存在，但人工智能已经可以自动化或显着加速绝大多数律师助理的工作量，导致美国劳工统计局预测，尽管对法律服务的需求很高，但就业增长为 0%。

title: Personal financial advisors
exposure_rationale: The core technical tasks of this role—analyzing market data, optimizing portfolios, and tax planning—are digital and highly susceptible to AI automation, as evidenced by the rise of robo-advisors. However, the occupation is protected by a significant interpersonal component, as clients often require human trust, emotional reassurance during market volatility, and complex ethical judgment that AI cannot yet fully replicate.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色的核心技术任务——分析市场数据、优化投资组合和税务规划——都是数字化的，并且极易受到人工智能自动化的影响，机器人顾问的兴起就证明了这一点。然而，该职业受到重要的人际因素的保护，因为客户通常需要人类信任、市场波动期间的情感保证，以及人工智能尚无法完全复制的复杂道德判断。

title: Pest control workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is highly physical, requiring workers to crawl into tight spaces, set manual traps, and apply chemicals in unpredictable real-world environments. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like route optimization, pest identification from photos, or automated billing, the primary labor cannot be performed digitally or remotely.
category_cn: 建筑和场地清洁类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心是高度体力劳动，要求工人爬进狭小的空间，设置手动陷阱，并在不可预测的现实环境中使用化学品。虽然人工智能可以协助完成路线优化、从照片中识别害虫或自动计费等外围任务，但主要工作无法以数字或远程方式执行。

title: Petroleum engineers
exposure_rationale: Petroleum engineering involves significant digital knowledge work, such as reservoir modeling, data analysis, and drilling simulation, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven optimization and automation. However, the role remains anchored by the necessity of physical site visits to remote or offshore locations to oversee equipment installation and troubleshoot real-world mechanical issues that AI cannot physically address.
exposure_rationale_cn: 石油工程涉及重要的数字知识工作，例如油藏建模、数据分析和钻井模拟，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能驱动的优化和自动化的影响。然而，该角色仍然取决于对远程或离岸地点进行实际现场访问的必要性，以监督设备安装并解决人工智能无法物理解决的现实机械问题。

title: Pharmacists
exposure_rationale: Pharmacists face moderate exposure because their core knowledge-based tasks—checking drug interactions, verifying dosages, and analyzing patient records—are highly susceptible to AI automation and digital optimization. However, the role remains anchored by physical requirements such as administering immunizations, performing clinical rounds, and providing real-time, empathetic patient counseling that requires human trust and physical presence.
exposure_rationale_cn: 药剂师面临中等风险，因为他们的核心知识任务——检查药物相互作用、验证剂量和分析患者记录——非常容易受到人工智能自动化和数字优化的影响。然而，这一角色仍然以身体要求为基础，例如管理免疫接种、进行临床查房以及提供实时、富有同理心的患者咨询，这些都需要人类信任和实际存在。

title: Pharmacy technicians
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical labor, such as measuring medications, packaging prescriptions, and interacting with patients in person, which provides a buffer against full automation. However, AI and automated dispensing systems are highly capable of handling the information-processing tasks like insurance claims, inventory management, and prescription data entry, which constitute a large portion of the daily workload.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及大量的体力劳动，例如测量药物、包装处方以及亲自与患者互动，这为完全自动化提供了缓冲。然而，人工智能和自动配药系统非常有能力处理信息处理任务，例如保险索赔、库存管理和处方数据输入，这些任务构成了日常工作量的很大一部分。

title: Phlebotomists
exposure_rationale: The core of the job is a highly tactile, physical procedure (venipuncture) performed on human patients in unpredictable clinical settings, which is resistant to AI automation. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like data entry, sample tracking, and scheduling, the primary value of the role lies in manual dexterity and providing interpersonal emotional support to anxious patients.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项工作的核心是在不可预测的临床环境中对人类患者进行高度触觉的物理手术（静脉穿刺），这对人工智能自动化具有抵抗力。虽然人工智能可以协助完成数据输入、样本跟踪和调度等外围任务，但该角色的主要价值在于手动灵活性以及为焦虑的患者提供人际情感支持。

title: Photographers
exposure_rationale: Photography is a hybrid role where the physical act of capturing real-world events (weddings, news, portraits) provides a buffer, but the digital output is highly vulnerable to AI. Generative AI can now create high-quality commercial and stock imagery from scratch and automate complex post-production tasks, significantly reducing the billable hours and demand for professional photographers in commercial and creative sectors.
exposure_rationale_cn: 摄影是一种混合角色，捕捉现实世界事件（婚礼、新闻、肖像）的物理行为提供了缓冲，但数字输出非常容易受到人工智能的影响。生成式人工智能现在可以从头开始创建高质量的商业和库存图像，并自动执行复杂的后期制作任务，从而显着减少商业和创意领域专业摄影师的计费时间和需求。

title: Physical therapist assistants and aides
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical, hands-on work such as massage, stretching, and assisting patients with mobility, which AI cannot perform. While AI can streamline peripheral tasks like scheduling, documentation, and exercise plan generation, the requirement for real-time human presence and physical dexterity creates a strong barrier to automation.
title_cn: 物理治疗助理和护理员
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心涉及体力劳动，如按摩、伸展运动、协助患者活动，而这是人工智能无法完成的。虽然人工智能可以简化日程安排、文档记录和锻炼计划生成等外围任务，但对人类实时存在和身体灵活性的要求对自动化造成了强大的障碍。

title: Physical therapists
exposure_rationale: The core of physical therapy involves manual manipulation, physical assistance, and real-time observation of human movement in a physical environment, which AI cannot replicate. While AI can assist with administrative tasks, medical history review, and generating personalized exercise plans, the high level of physical dexterity and interpersonal empathy required limits its overall exposure.
exposure_rationale_cn: 物理治疗的核心涉及手动操作、物理辅助以及在物理环境中实时观察人体运动，这是人工智能无法复制的。虽然人工智能可以协助执行管理任务、病史审查和生成个性化锻炼计划，但所需的高水平身体灵活性和人际同理心限制了其整体暴露程度。

title: Physician assistants
exposure_rationale: Physician assistants perform a mix of high-level knowledge work and physical clinical tasks. While AI will significantly augment diagnostic accuracy, treatment planning, and administrative documentation, the role requires physical presence for examinations, surgical procedures, and hands-on treatments like stitching wounds, as well as complex interpersonal counseling that is difficult to automate.
exposure_rationale_cn: 医师助理执行高水平知识工作和物理临床任务的结合。虽然人工智能将显着提高诊断准确性、治疗计划和管理文档，但该角色需要亲自参与检查、外科手术和缝合伤口等实际治疗，以及难以自动化的复杂的人际咨询。

title: Physicians and surgeons
exposure_rationale: Physicians and surgeons have moderate exposure because while AI can significantly automate digital tasks like diagnostic image interpretation (radiology), medical history analysis, and treatment planning, the core of the job requires physical presence, manual dexterity for procedures, and complex interpersonal communication. The high-stakes nature of medical liability and the need for human empathy in patient care provide a natural barrier to full automation, though AI will drastically increase productivity in information-heavy specialties.
exposure_rationale_cn: 内科医生和外科医生的暴露程度适中，因为虽然人工智能可以显着自动化数字任务，如诊断图像解释（放射学）、病史分析和治疗计划，但工作的核心需要实际存在、手术操作的灵活性和复杂的人际沟通。尽管人工智能将大大提高信息密集型专业的生产力，但医疗责任的高风险性质以及患者护理中对人类同理心的需求为完全自动化提供了天然障碍。

title: Physicists and astronomers
exposure_rationale: Physicists and astronomers perform high-level knowledge work that is increasingly digital, including data analysis, mathematical modeling, and software development. While AI significantly accelerates data processing and literature review, the core requirements of original theoretical innovation, experimental design, and complex physical-world problem solving provide a buffer against full automation.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 物理学家和天文学家从事的高水平知识工作日益数字化，包括数据分析、数学建模和软件开发。虽然人工智能显着加速了数据处理和文献综述，但原始理论创新、实验设计和复杂物理世界问题解决的核心要求为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Plumbers, pipefitters, and steamfitters
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are highly physical, requiring manual dexterity, strength, and real-time problem-solving in unpredictable physical environments like crawl spaces and construction sites. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like cost estimation, blueprint analysis via BIM, and scheduling, it cannot perform the essential hands-on installation and repair work.
title_cn: 管道工、管道安装工和蒸汽管道工
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责是高度体力劳动，需要手动灵活性、力量以及在不可预测的物理环境（如狭小空间和建筑工地）中实时解决问题的能力。虽然人工智能可以协助完成成本估算、通过 BIM 进行蓝图分析和调度等外围任务，但它无法执行必要的实际安装和维修工作。

title: Podiatrists
exposure_rationale: Podiatry is a medical specialty that requires significant physical presence for exams, manual procedures, and complex surgeries that AI cannot perform. However, AI will heavily impact the knowledge-based aspects of the role, such as analyzing X-rays, diagnosing conditions from medical history, and automating clinical documentation and administrative tasks.
exposure_rationale_cn: 足病学是一门医学专业，需要大量的身体检查、手动程序和人工智能无法执行的复杂手术。然而，人工智能将严重影响该角色基于知识的方面，例如分析 X 射线、根据病史诊断病情以及自动化临床记录和管理任务。

title: Police and detectives
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical presence, emergency response, and manual tasks like making arrests and patrolling, which are resistant to AI. However, a significant portion of the work involves digital tasks such as writing detailed reports, searching databases, and analyzing evidence, all of which are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and efficiency gains.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项工作的核心涉及物理存在、紧急响应以及逮捕和巡逻等手动任务，这些任务对人工智能来说是有抵抗力的。然而，工作的很大一部分涉及数字任务，例如编写详细报告、搜索数据库和分析证据，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能驱动的自动化和效率提升的影响。

title: Political scientists
