exposure_rationale: Political science is a purely digital knowledge-work occupation centered on data analysis, research, and writing, all of which are core strengths of generative AI and LLMs. While high-level strategic judgment and interpersonal networking remain human-centric, AI can now automate the collection of public opinion data, the drafting of policy briefs, and the forecasting of political trends, leading to significant productivity gains and a projected decline in total employment.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 政治学是一种纯粹的数字知识工作职业，以数据分析、研究和写作为中心，所有这些都是生成式人工智能和法学硕士的核心优势。虽然高层战略判断和人际网络仍然以人为中心，但人工智能现在可以自动收集民意数据、起草政策简报和预测政治趋势，从而导致生产率显着提高和总就业率的预计下降。

title: Postal service workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, such as delivering parcels and navigating outdoor environments, which provides a natural barrier to AI. However, AI and advanced automation are significantly impacting the sorting and processing components of the job, while the shift toward digital communication reduces overall mail volume and labor demand.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及体力劳动，例如递送包裹和在户外环境中导航，这为人工智能提供了天然屏障。然而，人工智能和先进的自动化正在显着影响工作的分拣和处理部分，而向数字通信的转变减少了总体邮件量和劳动力需求。

title: Postsecondary education administrators
exposure_rationale: This occupation is heavily centered on digital information processing, including reviewing applications, analyzing student data, managing budgets, and maintaining academic records—all tasks where AI can significantly increase productivity or automate routine workflows. While roles like deans and student affairs officers require high-level human judgment and interpersonal relationship management, the underlying administrative and analytical work is highly susceptible to AI integration and restructuring.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业主要集中在数字信息处理，包括审查申请、分析学生数据、管理预算和维护学术记录——人工智能可以显着提高生产力或自动化日常工作流程的所有任务。虽然院长和学生事务官员等角色需要高水平的人类判断和人际关系管理，但底层的行政和分析工作非常容易受到人工智能集成和重组的影响。

title: Postsecondary teachers
exposure_rationale: Postsecondary teaching is primarily knowledge work involving research, writing, and curriculum design—all areas where AI is highly capable. While the role requires significant human interaction and mentorship, AI can automate grading, lesson planning, and literature reviews, potentially increasing individual productivity to the point of restructuring faculty needs.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 高等教育教学主要是涉及研究、写作和课程设计的知识工作——人工智能在所有领域都具有强大的能力。虽然该角色需要大量的人际互动和指导，但人工智能可以自动评分、课程计划和文献综述，从而有可能提高个人生产力，从而满足教师需求的调整。

title: Power plant operators, distributors, and dispatchers
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of monitoring data, adjusting power flows, and responding to system abnormalities are increasingly digital and data-driven, making them highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and smart-grid optimization. While the high-stakes nature of power infrastructure and the need for physical equipment inspections provide a buffer, the BLS already projects a 10% decline in employment due to technological advances and automated control rooms.
title_cn: 发电厂操作员、分配员和调度员
exposure_rationale_cn: 监测数据、调整潮流和响应系统异常等核心任务日益数字化和数据驱动，使其极易受到人工智能驱动的自动化和智能电网优化的影响。虽然电力基础设施的高风险性质和物理设备检查的需要提供了缓冲，但美国劳工统计局已经预测，由于技术进步和自动化控制室，就业人数将下降 10%。

title: Preschool and childcare center directors
exposure_rationale: This role is a hybrid of administrative knowledge work and high-stakes physical presence. While AI can significantly automate digital tasks like budgeting, scheduling, and curriculum planning, the core of the job involves physical facility oversight, staff supervision, and building trust-based relationships with parents and children that cannot be replicated by AI.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一角色是行政知识工作和高风险实际存在的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化预算、日程安排和课程规划等数字任务，但这项工作的核心涉及物理设施监督、员工监督以及与父母和孩子建立基于信任的关系，而这是人工智能无法复制的。

title: Preschool teachers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical care, emotional support, and real-time social interaction with children under age five, which AI cannot replicate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like lesson planning, curriculum design, and progress reporting, the primary job requires physical presence and human empathy to manage safety and developmental needs.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心涉及身体护理、情感支持以及与五岁以下儿童的实时社交互动，这是人工智能无法复制的。虽然人工智能可以协助完成课程规划、课程设计和进度报告等外围任务，但主要工作需要实际存在和人类同理心来管理安全和发展需求。

title: Private detectives and investigators
exposure_rationale: The occupation is a hybrid of digital research and physical field work. AI significantly enhances the digital aspects—such as background checks, social media analysis, and report writing—making investigators much more productive, but the core requirements of physical surveillance, in-person interviews, and undercover store work provide a substantial barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是数字研究和实地工作的混合体。人工智能显着增强了数字方面的功能，例如背景调查、社交媒体分析和报告撰写，使调查人员的工作效率大大提高，但物理监视、面对面访谈和秘密商店工作的核心要求为全面自动化设置了巨大障碍。

title: Probation officers and correctional treatment specialists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of high-exposure digital tasks (writing case reports, risk assessment, and data-driven monitoring) and low-exposure physical/interpersonal tasks (home visits, drug testing, and building trust with hostile clients). While AI can significantly automate documentation and predictive risk modeling, the legal requirement for human testimony and the physical necessity of community supervision provide a buffer against full automation.
title_cn: 缓刑监督官和矫正治疗专员
category_cn: 社区和社会服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是高暴露数字任务（撰写案例报告、风险评估和数据驱动监控）和低暴露身体/人际任务（家访、药物测试和与敌对客户建立信任）的混合体。虽然人工智能可以显着自动化文档记录和预测风险建模，但对人类证词的法律要求和社区监督的实际必要性为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Producers and directors
exposure_rationale: Producers and directors are highly exposed because their core work products—scripts, visual aesthetics, and edited video—are increasingly being generated or enhanced by AI tools. While the role requires significant human leadership and physical presence on set, the rapid advancement of generative AI in pre-production (scripting/storyboarding) and post-production (editing/VFX) allows a single director to do the work of a much larger team, potentially consolidating the industry.
exposure_rationale_cn: 制片人和导演的曝光率很高，因为他们的核心工作产品——剧本、视觉美学和编辑视频——越来越多地由人工智能工具生成或增强。虽然这个角色需要大量的人类领导和现场人员，但生成式人工智能在预制作（脚本/故事板）和后期制作（编辑/视觉特效）中的快速发展使单个导演能够完成更大团队的工作，从而有可能巩固整个行业。

title: Project management specialists
exposure_rationale: Project management is a digital-heavy knowledge occupation involving data analysis, scheduling, and documentation, all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation and optimization. While AI can significantly increase productivity in planning and monitoring, the role's heavy reliance on human-centric skills like stakeholder negotiation, conflict resolution, and team leadership provides a protective barrier against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 项目管理是一个数字化程度较高的知识职业，涉及数据分析、调度和文档编制，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能自动化和优化的影响。虽然人工智能可以显着提高规划和监控的生产力，但该角色严重依赖以人为本的技能，如利益相关者谈判、冲突解决和团队领导，为全面自动化设置了保护性障碍。

title: Property appraisers and assessors
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves analyzing data, comparing market trends, and generating reports, all of which are highly susceptible to Automated Valuation Models (AVMs) and AI-driven data analysis. While physical site inspections and the need to defend assessments in public hearings provide a buffer, the shift toward 'desktop appraisals' and AI-assisted mass assessments significantly reduces the human labor required per valuation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及分析数据、比较市场趋势和生成报告，所有这些都非常容易受到自动估值模型（AVM）和人工智能驱动的数据分析的影响。虽然现场检查和在公开听证会上为评估辩护的需要提供了缓冲，但向“桌面评估”和人工智能辅助大规模评估的转变大大减少了每次评估所需的人力。

title: Property, real estate, and community association managers
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of digital knowledge work and physical site management. While AI can automate significant portions of the job—such as drafting leases, financial reporting, budgeting, and coordinating maintenance requests—the role still requires physical inspections of facilities and high-stakes interpersonal conflict resolution. The exposure is high because the administrative and analytical 'office' tasks that comprise a large part of the day are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains.
title_cn: 物业、房地产和社区协会经理
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是数字知识工作和物理站点管理的混合体。虽然人工智能可以自动化工作的重要部分，例如起草租赁、财务报告、预算和协调维护请求，但该角色仍然需要对设施进行物理检查和解决高风险的人际冲突。这种风险很高，因为占一天大部分时间的行政和分析“办公室”任务非常容易受到人工智能驱动的生产力提高的影响。

title: Psychiatric technicians and aides
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical tasks such as bathing, feeding, and physically restraining patients, which AI cannot perform. While AI can assist with monitoring patient behavior and automating documentation or reporting, the high requirement for real-time human presence, physical stamina, and interpersonal compassion creates a significant barrier to automation.
title_cn: 精神科技术员和护理员
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业的核心涉及洗澡、喂食、对病人进行身体约束等体力劳动，而这些都是人工智能无法完成的。虽然人工智能可以帮助监控患者行为并自动记录或报告，但对实时人类存在、身体耐力和人际同情心的高要求为自动化造成了重大障碍。

title: Psychologists
exposure_rationale: Psychology is a knowledge-based profession where core tasks like analyzing data, writing reports, and researching are highly susceptible to AI enhancement. However, the critical requirements for human empathy, ethical judgment, and real-time interpersonal observation in clinical and school settings create a significant barrier to full automation.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 心理学是一个以知识为基础的职业，分析数据、撰写报告和研究等核心任务非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。然而，临床和学校环境中对人类同理心、道德判断和实时人际观察的关键要求为完全自动化造成了重大障碍。

title: Public relations and fundraising managers
exposure_rationale: The core digital tasks of this role—writing press releases, drafting speeches, analyzing social media trends, and creating fundraising strategies—are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. However, the role's heavy reliance on high-stakes interpersonal relationships, such as face-to-face donor meetings and managing media crises, provides a significant human-centric buffer that prevents a higher score.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色的核心数字任务——撰写新闻稿、起草演讲、分析社交媒体趋势和制定筹款策略——非常容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。然而，该角色严重依赖高风险的人际关系，例如面对面的捐助者会议和管理媒体危机，提供了重要的以人为本的缓冲，阻碍了更高的分数。

title: Public relations specialists
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of this occupation—writing press releases, drafting speeches, creating social media content, and monitoring public sentiment—are digital-first and align perfectly with the capabilities of Large Language Models. While high-level strategy and real-time interpersonal crisis management provide some protection, the vast majority of the daily work product can be generated or significantly optimized by AI, leading to high exposure and potential workforce consolidation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心任务——撰写新闻稿、起草演讲稿、创建社交媒体内容和监控公众情绪——是数字优先的，并且与大型语言模型的功能完美契合。虽然高层战略和实时人际危机管理提供了一些保护，但绝大多数日常工作产品都可以由人工智能生成或显着优化，从而导致高风险和潜在的劳动力整合。

title: Public safety telecommunicators
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of this role—receiving digital inputs (voice, text, video), processing information according to protocols, and dispatching resources—are highly susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. While the high-stakes nature and need for human empathy provide a temporary buffer, AI's ability to transcribe, translate, and prioritize emergency calls in real-time will significantly restructure the occupation and increase individual worker productivity.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色的核心任务——接收数字输入（语音、文本、视频）、根据协议处理信息以及调度资源——非常容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。虽然高风险的性质和对人类同理心的需求提供了暂时的缓冲，但人工智能实时转录、翻译和优先处理紧急呼叫的能力将显着重组职业并提高个体工人的生产力。

title: Purchasing managers, buyers, and purchasing agents
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of analyzing price proposals, monitoring inventory, and reviewing financial reports are highly susceptible to AI automation and optimization. While high-stakes negotiations and physical site visits provide a buffer, the majority of the work is digital information processing that can be significantly streamlined by AI, leading to higher productivity per worker and a restructuring of the procurement process.
title_cn: 采购经理、采购员和采购代理
exposure_rationale_cn: 分析价格建议、监控库存和审查财务报告等核心任务非常容易受到人工智能自动化和优化的影响。虽然高风险谈判和实地考察提供了缓冲，但大部分工作是数字信息处理，可以通过人工智能显着简化，从而提高每个工人的生产力并重组采购流程。

title: Quality control inspectors
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical inspection and data analysis. While AI-powered computer vision systems are rapidly automating the visual detection of defects, the role still requires significant physical presence to handle materials, operate manual gauges, and perform mechanical tests that robots cannot yet fully replicate in diverse manufacturing environments.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是物理检查和数据分析的混合体。虽然人工智能驱动的计算机视觉系统正在快速实现缺陷视觉检测的自动化，但该角色仍然需要大量的物理存在来处理材料、操作手动仪表以及执行机械测试，而机器人尚无法在不同的制造环境中完全复制这些测试。

title: Radiation therapists
exposure_rationale: The role requires a significant physical presence to position patients, operate heavy machinery, and provide empathetic interpersonal care during serious illness. While AI will heavily automate the digital aspects of the job—such as tumor localization, treatment planning, and dosage calculations—the physical and clinical safety requirements create a substantial barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色需要大量人员在场，以在严重疾病期间定位患者、操作重型机械并提供同理心的人际护理。虽然人工智能将在工作的数字方面实现高度自动化，例如肿瘤定位、治疗计划和剂量计算，但物理和临床安全要求对完全自动化造成了巨大障碍。

title: Radiologic and MRI technologists
exposure_rationale: While AI is revolutionizing image analysis and quality control, the core of this role requires physical presence to position patients, administer contrast agents, and operate heavy machinery in a clinical setting. AI will significantly enhance productivity and image evaluation, but the physical and interpersonal requirements of patient care provide a substantial barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然人工智能正在彻底改变图像分析和质量控制，但这一角色的核心需要在临床环境中亲自定位患者、管理造影剂和操作重型机械。人工智能将显着提高生产力和图像评估，但患者护理的身体和人际要求为完全自动化设置了巨大障碍。

title: Railroad workers
exposure_rationale: The occupation involves a significant amount of physical labor, mechanical adjustment, and real-world safety monitoring that AI cannot perform. However, core functions like train operation, scheduling, and signal management are increasingly susceptible to automation and AI-driven efficiency systems, which the BLS notes is already limiting employment growth.
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业涉及大量体力劳动、机械调整以及人工智能无法执行的现实世界安全监控。然而，列车运行、调度和信号管理等核心功能越来越容易受到自动化和人工智能驱动的效率系统的影响，劳工统计局指出，这已经限制了就业增长。

title: Real estate brokers and sales agents
exposure_rationale: Real estate agents perform a mix of digital knowledge work and physical/interpersonal tasks. AI can automate significant portions of their digital workload, such as market analysis, property descriptions, lead generation, and contract preparation, which increases individual productivity and may reduce the total number of agents needed. However, the core of the job still requires physical property showings, high-stakes human negotiation, and local networking, which provide a buffer against full automation.
title_cn: 房地产经纪人和销售代理
exposure_rationale_cn: 房地产经纪人执行数字知识工作和体力/人际任务的混合。人工智能可以自动化大部分数字工作负载，例如市场分析、财产描述、潜在客户开发和合同准备，这提高了个人生产力，并可能减少所需代理的总数。然而，这项工作的核心仍然需要实物展示、高风险的人工谈判和本地网络，这为完全自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Receptionists
exposure_rationale: Many core tasks such as scheduling, answering phones, and data entry are highly susceptible to automation via AI voice agents and chatbots. While the role retains a physical component for greeting and security, the BLS already projects zero growth due to automation, and the digital nature of the administrative workload makes it highly exposed to further restructuring.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 许多核心任务（例如日程安排、接听电话和数据输入）非常容易通过人工智能语音代理和聊天机器人实现自动化。虽然该角色保留了问候和安全的物理组成部分，但由于自动化，美国劳工统计局已经预计增长为零，而管理工作量的数字性质使其极有可能进一步重组。

title: Recreation workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical presence, manual instruction, and real-time interpersonal interaction in unpredictable environments like camps and community centers. While AI can assist with peripheral administrative tasks like scheduling, program planning, and creating newsletters, it cannot replace the physical supervision, safety monitoring, and emotional leadership required to manage group activities.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及在营地和社区中心等不可预测的环境中的实际存在、手动指导和实时人际互动。虽然人工智能可以协助完成日程安排、项目规划和创建新闻通讯等外围管理任务，但它无法取代管理团体活动所需的身体监督、安全监控和情感领导。

title: Recreational therapists
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical presence, manual assistance, and real-time interpersonal interaction through activities like adaptive sports, dance, and community outings. While AI can significantly assist with digital tasks like patient assessment, treatment planning, and progress documentation, it cannot replace the physical and emotional labor required to lead therapeutic interventions in person.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心包括身体存在、手动协助以及通过适应性运动、舞蹈和社区郊游等活动进行的实时人际互动。虽然人工智能可以显着协助完成患者评估、治疗计划和进展记录等数字任务，但它无法取代亲自领导治疗干预所需的体力和情感劳动。

title: Registered nurses
exposure_rationale: Registered nursing is a hybrid role that combines significant physical labor, such as administering treatments and moving patients, with complex interpersonal care and emotional support. While AI will heavily impact the knowledge-work components—such as patient monitoring, diagnostic analysis, and care planning—the core requirement for physical presence and human empathy creates a strong barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 注册护理是一种混合角色，结合了重要的体力劳动（例如实施治疗和移动患者）与复杂的人际护理和情感支持。虽然人工智能将严重影响知识工作组件（例如患者监测、诊断分析和护理计划），但对实际存在和人类同理心的核心要求为完全自动化设置了强大的障碍。

title: Rehabilitation counselors
exposure_rationale: Rehabilitation counseling involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, such as developing rehabilitation plans, maintaining records, and researching resources, which are highly susceptible to AI assistance. However, the core of the profession relies on high-stakes interpersonal interaction, empathy, and physical advocacy for clients with disabilities, creating a natural barrier to full automation.
category_cn: 社区和社会服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 康复咨询涉及大量的数字知识工作，例如制定康复计划、维护记录和研究资源，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能的帮助。然而，该职业的核心依赖于高风险的人际互动、同理心和对残疾客户的身体倡导，为全面自动化创造了天然障碍。

title: Respiratory therapists
exposure_rationale: Respiratory therapy involves a significant amount of physical, hands-on patient care, such as performing chest physiotherapy, intubating patients, and maintaining equipment in real-time clinical environments. While AI will heavily assist in diagnostic analysis, ventilator setting optimization, and patient monitoring, the core of the job requires physical presence and interpersonal interaction that cannot be digitized.
exposure_rationale_cn: 呼吸治疗涉及大量的物理、实际操作的患者护理，例如进行胸部物理治疗、为患者插管以及在实时临床环境中维护设备。虽然人工智能将在诊断分析、呼吸机设置优化和患者监测方面提供大力协助，但这项工作的核心需要物理存在和无法数字化的人际互动。

title: Retail sales workers
exposure_rationale: Retail sales involve a mix of physical tasks (stocking shelves, demonstrating products) and interpersonal interaction that provides a barrier to full automation. However, AI is increasingly handling the information-heavy aspects of the job, such as personalized product recommendations, answering technical questions via kiosks/mobile apps, and automating inventory management and checkout processes, which reduces the total human labor required per store.
exposure_rationale_cn: 零售销售涉及物理任务（货架上货、展示产品）和人际互动的混合，这为完全自动化提供了障碍。然而，人工智能越来越多地处理工作中信息密集的方面，例如个性化产品推荐、通过信息亭/移动应用程序回答技术问题以及自动化库存管理和结账流程，这减少了每家商店所需的总人力。

title: Roofers
exposure_rationale: Roofing is a highly physical occupation performed in unpredictable outdoor environments that require manual dexterity, balance, and heavy lifting. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like drone-based inspections or material estimation, the core work of installing and repairing shingles and membranes remains entirely dependent on human labor.
exposure_rationale_cn: 屋顶施工是一项在不可预测的户外环境中进行的体力劳动，需要灵巧、平衡和举重。虽然人工智能可能会协助完成无人机检查或材料估算等外围任务，但安装和修复木瓦和薄膜的核心工作仍然完全依赖于人类劳动力。

title: Sales engineers
exposure_rationale: Sales engineers perform high-level knowledge work that is increasingly digital, including technical presentations, product customization, and troubleshooting. While AI can automate technical documentation, demo generation, and data-driven customer insights, the role's heavy reliance on complex interpersonal relationships, negotiation, and trust-building provides a significant buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 销售工程师执行日益数字化的高级知识工作，包括技术演示、产品定制和故障排除。虽然人工智能可以自动化技术文档、演示生成和数据驱动的客户洞察，但该角色对复杂人际关系、谈判和信任建立的严重依赖为完全自动化提供了重要的缓冲。

title: Sales managers
exposure_rationale: Sales managers perform high-level knowledge work including data analysis, sales forecasting, and strategic planning, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. While the role requires significant interpersonal leadership and relationship management, much of the core digital workflow—such as monitoring CRM data, generating reports, and developing training materials—is being rapidly transformed by generative and analytical AI.
exposure_rationale_cn: 销售经理执行高级知识工作，包括数据分析、销售预测和战略规划，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。虽然该角色需要重要的人际领导力和关系管理，但许多核心数字工作流程（例如监控 CRM 数据、生成报告和开发培训材料）正在被生成和分析人工智能迅速转变。

title: School and career counselors and advisors
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a mix of high-touch interpersonal work and digital information processing. AI can significantly automate the 'hard' data tasks like analyzing student performance trends, matching aptitudes to career paths, and drafting résumés, but the core functions of emotional support, crisis intervention (reporting abuse), and navigating complex human relationships in a school setting provide a strong buffer against full automation.
title_cn: 学校和职业咨询师和顾问
category_cn: 社区和社会服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是高接触性的人际工作和数字信息处理的结合。人工智能可以显着自动化“硬”数据任务，例如分析学生表现趋势、将能力与职业道路相匹配以及起草简历，但情感支持、危机干预（报告虐待行为）和在学校环境中处理复杂的人际关系等核心功能为完全自动化提供了强大的缓冲。

title: Secretaries and administrative assistants
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation—scheduling, drafting correspondence, managing databases, and transcribing—are fundamentally digital and align perfectly with the capabilities of LLMs and AI agents. While some roles require physical presence for visitor greeting or office management, the vast majority of tasks are routine information processing that can be automated or significantly streamlined, leading to major restructuring and reduced headcount per organization.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责——日程安排、起草信件、管理数据库和转录——基本上都是数字化的，并且与法学硕士和人工智能代理的能力完美契合。虽然某些角色需要亲自到场进行访客问候或办公室管理，但绝大多数任务都是日常信息处理，可以自动化或显着简化，从而导致每个组织进行重大重组并减少员工人数。

title: Securities, commodities, and financial services sales agents
exposure_rationale: This occupation is almost entirely digital and information-based, involving data analysis, market monitoring, and financial modeling—all areas where AI is rapidly achieving parity with human experts. While high-level relationship management and complex negotiation (like M&A) provide some insulation, the core tasks of identifying investment opportunities, executing trades, and providing routine financial advice are highly susceptible to automation and significant productivity gains that could reduce the need for human agents.
title_cn: 证券、商品和金融服务销售代理
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业几乎完全是数字化和信息化的，涉及数据分析、市场监测和金融建模——人工智能正在迅速与人类专家平起平坐。虽然高层关系管理和复杂的谈判（如并购）提供了一定的隔离性，但识别投资机会、执行交易和提供日常财务建议等核心任务非常容易受到自动化和生产力显着提高的影响，从而减少对人工代理的需求。

title: Security guards and gambling surveillance officers
exposure_rationale: The occupation is a hybrid of physical presence and digital monitoring. While AI-powered computer vision is rapidly automating the 'surveillance' and 'monitoring' aspects of the job, the core requirements of physical patrolling, detaining suspects, and responding to real-world emergencies provide a significant barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是物理存在和数字监控的混合体。虽然人工智能驱动的计算机视觉正在快速实现工作的“监视”和“监控”方面的自动化，但物理巡逻、拘留嫌疑人和应对现实世界紧急情况的核心要求为全面自动化提供了重大障碍。

title: Semiconductor processing technicians
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant physical component, requiring presence in cleanrooms to handle wafers, maintain equipment, and perform manual inspections. However, AI and advanced automation are increasingly capable of monitoring process data, optimizing machine parameters, and performing high-precision quality control, which automates the information-processing and monitoring aspects of the job.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及重要的物理组件，需要在洁净室中处理晶圆、维护设备并执行手动检查。然而，人工智能和先进自动化越来越有能力监控过程数据、优化机器参数和执行高精度质量控制，从而实现工作的信息处理和监控方面的自动化。

title: Set and exhibit designers
exposure_rationale: The core creative process—including script analysis, conceptual sketching, and CAD modeling—is increasingly susceptible to generative AI and automated design tools that can rapidly produce 3D environments and visual concepts. While the role requires physical-world considerations like material budgets and on-site installation oversight, the shift toward digital production (such as virtual sets and LED volumes) and AI-assisted drafting significantly increases productivity and reduces the total human labor required per project.
exposure_rationale_cn: 核心创意流程（包括脚本分析、概念草图和 CAD 建模）越来越容易受到生成式 AI 和自动化设计工具的影响，这些工具可以快速生成 3D 环境和视觉概念。虽然该角色需要考虑材料预算和现场安装监督等物理世界因素，但向数字化生产（例如虚拟布景和 LED 卷）和人工智能辅助绘图的转变可显着提高生产力并减少每个项目所需的总人力。

title: Sheet metal workers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical labor, manual dexterity, and on-site installation in unpredictable construction environments, which are highly resistant to AI. While AI and computer-controlled machinery (CADD, lasers, and automated presses) are increasingly used in the fabrication phase, the majority of the work—including installation, maintenance, and complex physical maneuvering—cannot be performed by digital tools.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及体力劳动、手工灵巧性以及不可预测的施工环境中的现场安装，对人工智能具有很强的抵抗力。虽然人工智能和计算机控制机械（CADD、激光和自动压力机）越来越多地用于制造阶段，但大多数工作（包括安装、维护和复杂的物理操作）无法通过数字工具执行。

title: Skincare specialists
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical, hands-on treatments like facials, massages, and hair removal that require real-time human presence and manual dexterity. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like skin analysis, product recommendations, and business management, it cannot replace the tactile and interpersonal nature of the primary service.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项工作的核心涉及物理、动手治疗，如面部护理、按摩和脱毛，需要实时人员在场和手动灵巧。虽然人工智能可以协助完成皮肤分析、产品推荐和业务管理等外围任务，但它无法取代主要服务的触觉和人际本质。

title: Small engine mechanics
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical manipulation of mechanical components, manual dexterity, and real-world troubleshooting in unpredictable environments. While AI can assist with diagnostic software and technical documentation, it cannot perform the physical labor of disassembling engines, replacing parts, or conducting hands-on repairs.
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及机械部件的物理操作、手动灵活性以及在不可预测的环境中进行实际故障排除。虽然人工智能可以协助诊断软件和技术文档，但它无法执行拆卸发动机、更换零件或进行手动维修的体力劳动。

title: Social and community service managers
exposure_rationale: This role involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, such as grant writing, data analysis, and budget management, which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, the core responsibilities of community stakeholder engagement, staff supervision, and navigating complex human crises provide a buffer that requires physical presence and high-level emotional intelligence.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及大量数字知识工作，例如资助写作、数据分析和预算管理，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。然而，社区利益相关者参与、员工监督和应对复杂的人类危机等核心职责提供了缓冲，需要实际存在和高水平的情商。

title: Social and human service assistants
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of digital administrative work and high-touch interpersonal service. AI can significantly automate the 'knowledge work' components, such as researching community resources, assisting with complex benefit applications, and coordinating service schedules. However, the core of the job requires physical presence in homes or clinics and deep emotional intelligence to support clients in crisis, which provides a substantial buffer against full automation.
category_cn: 社区和社会服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是数字化管理工作和高接触性人际服务的混合体。人工智能可以显着自动化“知识工作”组件，例如研究社区资源、协助复杂的福利申请以及协调服务计划。然而，这项工作的核心需要亲自到家或诊所，并需要深厚的情商来支持处于危机中的客户，这为全面自动化提供了巨大的缓冲。

title: Social workers
exposure_rationale: Social work involves a high degree of interpersonal interaction, empathy, and crisis management in physical environments, which provides a strong barrier against full automation. However, AI will significantly impact the profession by automating administrative tasks like case documentation, assisting in resource research, and providing diagnostic support tools for clinical practitioners.
category_cn: 社区和社会服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 社会工作涉及物理环境中高度的人际互动、同理心和危机管理，这为完全自动化提供了强大的障碍。然而，人工智能将通过自动化管理任务（例如病例记录）、协助资源研究以及为临床医生提供诊断支持工具来显着影响该行业。

title: Sociologists
exposure_rationale: Sociology is a knowledge-intensive field where core tasks like data analysis, literature reviews, and report writing are highly susceptible to AI enhancement. While qualitative field research and interpersonal interviews provide a buffer, the shift toward digital data collection and AI-driven statistical modeling significantly increases worker productivity and reshapes the research process.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 社会学是一个知识密集型领域，数据分析、文献综述和报告撰写等核心任务非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。虽然定性实地研究和人际访谈提供了缓冲，但向数字数据收集和人工智能驱动的统计模型的转变显着提高了工作人员的生产力并重塑了研究过程。

title: Software developers, quality assurance analysts, and testers
exposure_rationale: This occupation is fundamentally digital, with core tasks like coding, debugging, and test automation being primary use cases for Large Language Models. While high-level system architecture and complex stakeholder communication provide some insulation, AI is drastically increasing individual productivity, which will likely lead to significant restructuring of entry-level roles and QA functions.
title_cn: 软件开发人员、质量保证分析师和测试员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业从根本上来说是数字化的，编码、调试和测试自动化等核心任务是大型语言模型的主要用例。虽然高级系统架构和复杂的利益相关者沟通提供了一定的隔离，但人工智能正在极大地提高个人生产力，这可能会导致入门级角色和质量保证功能的重大重组。

title: Solar photovoltaic installers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is highly physical, involving manual labor, climbing roofs, and using hand tools in unpredictable outdoor environments. While AI might assist with peripheral tasks like system design optimization or site measurements via computer vision, the actual installation and maintenance require human dexterity and physical presence that current and near-future AI/robotics cannot replicate.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心是高度体力劳动，涉及体力劳动、攀爬屋顶以及在不可预测的户外环境中使用手动工具。虽然人工智能可能会通过计算机视觉协助完成系统设计优化或现场测量等外围任务，但实际的安装和维护需要人类的灵活性和物理存在，而当前和不久的将来人工智能/机器人无法复制。

title: Special education teachers
exposure_rationale: AI will significantly streamline the digital and administrative aspects of the role, such as drafting Individualized Education Programs (IEPs), adapting lesson plans, and tracking student data. However, the core of the job requires intense physical presence, emotional intelligence, and real-time behavioral management for students with complex disabilities, which AI cannot replicate.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 人工智能将显着简化该角色的数字和管理方面，例如起草个性化教育计划（IEP）、调整课程计划和跟踪学生数据。然而，这项工作的核心需要对患有复杂残疾的学生进行强烈的体力投入、情商和实时行为管理，而这是人工智能无法复制的。

title: Special effects artists and animators
exposure_rationale: This occupation is almost entirely digital, with core tasks like 3D modeling, rendering, and animation being directly disrupted by generative AI and automated rigging tools. While high-level creative direction and complex team collaboration remain human-centric, AI is rapidly automating the 'routine' aspects of CGI and visual effects, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total number of workers needed for large-scale productions.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业几乎完全是数字化的，3D 建模、渲染和动画等核心任务直接被生成人工智能和自动装配工具所干扰。虽然高水平的创意方向和复杂的团队协作仍然以人为中心，但人工智能正在迅速实现 CGI 和视觉效果的“常规”方面的自动化，从而显着提高个人生产力并减少大规模制作所需的工人总数。

title: Speech-language pathologists
exposure_rationale: Speech-language pathology involves a significant amount of digital-adjacent work, such as analyzing speech patterns, documenting progress, and developing treatment plans, all of which are highly susceptible to AI enhancement. However, the core of the job requires physical presence for swallowing therapy, real-time interpersonal coaching, and high-stakes clinical judgment that limits full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 言语病理学涉及大量数字相关工作，例如分析言语模式、记录进展和制定治疗计划，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。然而，这项工作的核心需要吞咽治疗的实际存在、实时人际指导以及限制完全自动化的高风险临床判断。

title: Stationary engineers and boiler operators
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical maintenance, manual repairs, and hands-on troubleshooting of heavy mechanical equipment in unpredictable physical environments. While AI and automated control systems can enhance monitoring and data logging, they cannot perform the physical tasks of overhauling valves, lubricating parts, or crawling inside boilers for inspections.
title_cn: 固定式工程师和锅炉操作员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及在不可预测的物理环境中对重型机械设备进行物理维护、手动维修和手动故障排除。虽然人工智能和自动化控制系统可以增强监控和数据记录，但它们无法执行检修阀门、润滑部件或爬进锅炉内部进行检查等物理任务。

title: Substance abuse, behavioral disorder, and mental health counselors
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a mix of high-level knowledge work and intense interpersonal interaction. While AI can significantly assist with digital tasks like documentation, treatment planning, and monitoring progress, the core of the job requires human empathy, crisis intervention, and the navigation of complex emotional and physical environments that AI cannot yet replicate.
title_cn: 药物滥用、行为障碍和心理健康咨询师
category_cn: 社区和社会服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业是高水平知识工作和激烈的人际互动的结合。虽然人工智能可以显着协助完成文档记录、治疗计划和监控进展等数字任务，但这项工作的核心需要人类同理心、危机干预以及人工智能尚无法复制的复杂情感和物理环境的导航。

title: Surgical assistants and technologists
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is highly physical, requiring manual dexterity, sterile technique, and real-time presence in an operating room. While AI and robotics can assist with surgical precision or inventory management, the role remains centered on hands-on patient care and physical equipment handling that cannot be digitized.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心是高度体力劳动，需要灵巧的双手、无菌技术以及实时出现在手术室中。虽然人工智能和机器人技术可以协助提高手术精度或库存管理，但其作用仍然集中在无法数字化的实际患者护理和物理设备处理上。

title: Survey researchers
exposure_rationale: Survey research is a fundamentally digital knowledge occupation involving background research, survey design, statistical analysis, and report generation—all areas where LLMs and specialized AI tools excel. The BLS already projects a decline in employment due to data mining and big data efficiencies, and the rapid advancement of AI in synthesizing qualitative data and automating complex statistical workflows makes this role highly susceptible to significant restructuring and labor reduction.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 调查研究本质上是一种数字知识职业，涉及背景研究、调查设计、统计分析和报告生成——法学硕士和专业人工智能工具擅长的所有领域。美国劳工统计局已经预测，由于数据挖掘和大数据效率，就业率将下降，而人工智能在合成定性数据和自动化复杂统计工作流程方面的快速进步，使得这一角色极易受到重大重组和劳动力减少的影响。

title: Surveying and mapping technicians
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital data processing. While AI and automation (via drones and GIS software) significantly enhance data analysis, map creation, and calculation tasks, the role still requires a physical presence to navigate rugged terrain, set markers, and operate equipment in the real world.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是实地考察和数字数据处理的混合体。虽然人工智能和自动化（通过无人机和 GIS 软件）显着增强了数据分析、地图创建和计算任务，但该角色仍然需要亲自在现实世界中导航崎岖的地形、设置标记和操作设备。

title: Surveyors
exposure_rationale: Surveying is a hybrid occupation that combines significant physical fieldwork with digital data processing. While AI and automation (via drones and GIS) are rapidly increasing productivity in the mapping and analysis phases, the core requirements of physical site visits, navigating rugged terrain, and providing legally certified human testimony in court create a substantial barrier to full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 测量是一种混合职业，将大量的物理现场工作与数字数据处理结合起来。虽然人工智能和自动化（通过无人机和地理信息系统）正在迅速提高测绘和分析阶段的生产力，但实地考察、崎岖地形导航以及在法庭上提供经过法律认证的人类证词的核心要求对完全自动化造成了巨大障碍。

title: Tax examiners and collectors, and revenue agents
exposure_rationale: This occupation is highly exposed because its core tasks—reviewing financial documents, identifying discrepancies, and interpreting tax law—are digital information-processing tasks where AI excels. While revenue agents handling complex corporate audits and collectors performing field investigations require human judgment and interpersonal skills, a significant portion of the routine examination and data verification work is already being automated or enhanced by sophisticated algorithms.
title_cn: 税务审查员、征收员和税务代理
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一职业受到高度关注，因为其核心任务——审查财务文件、识别差异和解释税法——是人工智能擅长的数字信息处理任务。虽然处理复杂的公司审计的税务代理人和进行实地调查的收款员需要人类判断和人际交往能力，但例行检查和数据验证工作的很大一部分已经实现自动化或通过复杂的算法得到增强。

title: Taxi drivers, shuttle drivers, and chauffeurs
exposure_rationale: While the core task of driving is highly susceptible to automation through autonomous vehicle technology (AI), the job currently requires significant physical presence for tasks like loading luggage, assisting passengers with disabilities, and performing vehicle maintenance. The transition to fully driverless fleets faces regulatory and technical hurdles in complex environments, but the long-term trajectory for this digital-adjacent physical task is one of high potential displacement.
title_cn: 出租车司机、班车司机和司机
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然驾驶的核心任务很容易通过自动驾驶车辆技术 (AI) 实现自动化，但目前这项工作需要大量人员在场才能完成装载行李、协助残疾乘客和执行车辆维护等任务。向完全无人驾驶车队的过渡在复杂的环境中面临着监管和技术障碍，但这种与数字相邻的物理任务的长期轨迹是高潜在位移之一。

title: Teacher assistants
exposure_rationale: Teacher assistants have moderate exposure because AI can significantly automate their administrative and instructional support tasks, such as grading, lesson preparation, and providing personalized tutoring through AI agents. However, a large portion of the role involves physical supervision, behavioral management, and assisting students with special needs or personal hygiene, which require a physical human presence that AI cannot replace.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 助教的接触机会适中，因为人工智能可以显着自动化他们的管理和教学支持任务，例如评分、备课以及通过人工智能代理提供个性化辅导。然而，该角色很大一部分涉及身体监督、行为管理以及帮助有特殊需要或个人卫生的学生，这些都需要人工智能无法替代的实际人类存在。

title: Technical writers
exposure_rationale: Technical writing is a fully digital occupation centered on synthesizing complex information into clear documentation, a core strength of Large Language Models. AI can already draft manuals, summarize technical specs, and generate code documentation, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total number of human writers needed for routine documentation tasks.
exposure_rationale_cn: 技术写作是一种完全数字化的职业，其核心是将复杂的信息合成为清晰的文档，这是大型语言模型的核心优势。人工智能已经可以起草手册、总结技术规范并生成代码文档，从而显着提高个人生产力并减少日常文档任务所需的人类编写人员总数。

title: Telecommunications technicians
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is physical labor, including climbing towers, installing hardware, and manual troubleshooting in unpredictable environments, which provides a strong barrier against AI automation. While AI can assist with remote diagnostics, network optimization, and predictive maintenance, the physical necessity of splicing cables and mounting equipment ensures the role remains primarily human-driven.
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心是体力劳动，包括爬塔、安装硬件以及在不可预测的环境中进行手动故障排除，这为AI自动化提供了强大的壁垒。虽然人工智能可以协助远程诊断、网络优化和预测性维护，但拼接电缆和安装设备的物理必要性确保了该角色仍然主要由人类驱动。

title: Tellers
exposure_rationale: Tellers face high exposure because their core tasks—processing routine financial transactions and verifying information—are digital in nature and highly susceptible to automation through AI and advanced self-service technology. While the physical handling of cash provides a slight buffer, the rapid shift toward mobile banking, AI-driven fraud detection, and interactive video kiosks is significantly reducing the need for human intervention in these roles.
category_cn: 办公室和行政支持类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 出纳员面临很高的风险，因为他们的核心任务（处理日常金融交易和验证信息）本质上是数字化的，并且非常容易通过人工智能和先进的自助服务技术实现自动化。虽然现金的物理处理提供了轻微的缓冲，但向移动银行、人工智能驱动的欺诈检测和交互式视频亭的快速转变正在显着减少对这些角色的人工干预的需求。

title: Top executives
exposure_rationale: Top executives perform high-level knowledge work including financial analysis, strategic planning, and contract review, all of which are highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, the core of the role involves human-centric responsibilities like leadership, high-stakes negotiation, and accountability to boards or the public, which provide a significant buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 高层管理人员从事高级知识工作，包括财务分析、战略规划和合同审查，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强的影响。然而，该角色的核心涉及以人为本的职责，例如领导力、高风险谈判以及对董事会或公众的责任，这为完全自动化提供了重要的缓冲。

title: Tour and travel guides
exposure_rationale: While AI can automate the digital aspects of the job—such as researching history, planning itineraries, and providing multilingual translations—the core of the role requires physical presence and real-time human interaction. Guides must physically escort groups through unpredictable environments, manage group dynamics, and provide a personal, empathetic experience that digital tools cannot fully replicate.
category_cn: 个人护理和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然人工智能可以实现工作的数字化方面的自动化，例如研究历史、规划行程和提供多语言翻译，但该角色的核心需要实际存在和实时人机交互。导游必须亲自护送团体穿越不可预测的环境，管理团体动态，并提供数字工具无法完全复制的个性化、同理心体验。

title: Training and development managers
exposure_rationale: This role is predominantly digital and knowledge-based, involving the creation of instructional content, data-driven needs assessments, and budget management—all areas where AI is highly capable. While the role requires significant human-centric leadership and stakeholder collaboration, AI can automate the generation of training materials, personalize learning paths, and analyze program effectiveness, substantially increasing the productivity of each manager.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这一角色主要是数字化和基于知识的，涉及教学内容的创建、数据驱动的需求评估和预算管理——人工智能在所有领域都具有强大的能力。虽然该角色需要大量以人为本的领导力和利益相关者协作，但人工智能可以自动生成培训材料、个性化学习路径并分析项目有效性，从而大幅提高每位经理的生产力。

title: Training and development specialists
exposure_rationale: Much of the core work, such as designing training manuals, creating online learning modules, and assessing needs through data, is digital and highly susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. While the role requires interpersonal skills for live delivery and collaboration, AI can now generate curriculum, simulate training scenarios, and personalize learning paths, significantly increasing individual productivity and potentially reducing the number of specialists needed for content creation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 许多核心工作，例如设计培训手册、创建在线学习模块以及通过数据评估需求，都是数字化的，并且非常容易受到人工智能自动化和增强的影响。虽然该角色需要实时交付和协作的人际交往能力，但人工智能现在可以生成课程、模拟培训场景和个性化学习路径，从而显着提高个人生产力，并有可能减少内容创建所需的专家数量。

title: Transportation, storage, and distribution managers
exposure_rationale: This role involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, such as logistics planning, budgeting, and supply chain optimization, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven efficiency gains. However, the core job also requires physical presence for facility inspections, safety compliance monitoring, and high-stakes interpersonal leadership in unpredictable environments like warehouses and railyards, providing a buffer against full automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该角色涉及大量数字知识工作，例如物流规划、预算和供应链优化，这些工作非常容易受到人工智能驱动的效率提升的影响。然而，核心工作还需要在仓库和铁路站等不可预测的环境中进行设施检查、安全合规性监控和高风险的人际领导，为全面自动化提供缓冲。

title: Travel agents
exposure_rationale: The core functions of a travel agent—researching destinations, comparing prices, building itineraries, and processing bookings—are entirely digital and involve information synthesis that AI can now perform instantly. While high-end human agents provide personalized judgment and crisis management, AI's ability to handle complex natural language queries and real-time logistics makes the vast majority of the occupation's routine tasks highly susceptible to automation.
exposure_rationale_cn: 旅行社的核心功能——研究目的地、比较价格、制定行程和处理预订——完全是数字化的，并且涉及人工智能现在可以立即执行的信息合成。虽然高端人工代理提供个性化判断和危机管理，但人工智能处理复杂自然语言查询和实时物流的能力使得绝大多数职业的日常任务非常容易实现自动化。

title: Tutors
exposure_rationale: Tutors primarily engage in knowledge transfer, explanation, and feedback—tasks where generative AI and personalized learning algorithms excel. While the interpersonal and motivational aspects of tutoring provide some protection, the core work product is digital/informational, and AI's ability to provide 24/7, low-cost, personalized instruction for standardized tests and core subjects creates significant displacement risk.
category_cn: 教育、培训和图书馆类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 导师主要从事知识转移、解释和反馈——生成式人工智能和个性化学习算法擅长的任务。虽然辅导的人际和动机方面提供了一些保护，但核心工作产品是数字/信息化的，而人工智能为标准化考试和核心科目提供 24/7、低成本、个性化指导的能力造成了巨大的替代风险。

title: Umpires, referees, and other sports officials
exposure_rationale: The occupation is a hybrid of physical presence and objective data processing. While computer vision and AI can already automate 'calls' (like strike zones or out-of-bounds) with higher accuracy than humans, the role still requires physical presence to manage player conduct, ensure safety, and handle real-time interpersonal disputes on the field.
title_cn: 裁判员和其他体育官员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是身体存在和客观数据处理的混合体。虽然计算机视觉和人工智能已经可以比人类更准确地自动执行“呼叫”（例如好球区或出界），但该角色仍然需要实际存在来管理球员行为、确保安全并处理场上的实时人际纠纷。

title: Urban and regional planners
exposure_rationale: Urban planners perform heavy knowledge work including data analysis, GIS mapping, and report writing, all of which are highly susceptible to AI enhancement and automation. However, the role requires significant physical site inspections and high-stakes interpersonal negotiation with government officials and the public, which provides a buffer against total automation.
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 城市规划者从事繁重的知识工作，包括数据分析、GIS 绘图和报告编写，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强和自动化的影响。然而，该角色需要进行大量的现场检查以及与政府官员和公众进行高风险的人际谈判，这为全面自动化提供了缓冲。

title: Veterinarians
exposure_rationale: Veterinary work is a hybrid of physical procedures and complex diagnostic knowledge work. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy through image analysis (X-rays/ultrasounds) and treatment planning, the core of the job requires physical surgery, manual examinations, and high-stakes interpersonal communication with pet owners that cannot be automated.
exposure_rationale_cn: 兽医工作是物理程序和复杂诊断知识工作的混合体。虽然人工智能将通过图像分析（X射线/超声波）和治疗计划显着提高诊断准确性，但这项工作的核心需要物理手术、手动检查以及无法自动化的与宠物主人的高风险人际沟通。

title: Veterinary assistants and laboratory animal caretakers
exposure_rationale: The core duties of this occupation are almost entirely physical and manual, involving the handling, feeding, and restraining of live animals in unpredictable environments. While AI might assist with peripheral administrative tasks or diagnostic data entry, it cannot replace the physical presence and manual dexterity required for animal care, sterilization, and surgical assistance.
title_cn: 兽医助理和实验动物护理员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心职责几乎完全是体力和体力，包括在不可预测的环境中处理、喂养和限制活体动物。虽然人工智能可能有助于外围管理任务或诊断数据输入，但它无法取代动物护理、绝育和手术协助所需的物理存在和手动灵巧性。

title: Veterinary technologists and technicians
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical tasks that AI cannot perform, such as restraining animals, administering anesthesia, performing surgery prep, and providing emergency first aid. However, AI has significant exposure in the diagnostic and administrative aspects of the job, including analyzing lab results, interpreting X-rays, and managing patient records, which may increase individual productivity.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及人工智能无法执行的体力任务，例如约束动物、进行麻醉、进行手术准备和提供紧急急救。然而，人工智能在工作的诊断和管理方面有很大的影响，包括分析实验室结果、解释 X 射线和管理患者记录，这可能会提高个人生产力。

title: Waiters and waitresses
exposure_rationale: While AI and automation are increasingly handling digital tasks like order-taking and payments via kiosks or mobile apps, the core of the job remains physical and interpersonal. The physical requirements of carrying trays, clearing tables, and providing real-time human hospitality in a dynamic environment create a significant barrier to full AI replacement.
category_cn: 食品准备和服务类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 虽然人工智能和自动化越来越多地处理数字任务，例如通过信息亭或移动应用程序接受订单和付款，但工作的核心仍然是物理和人际交往。搬运托盘、清理桌子以及在动态环境中提供实时人性化接待等物理要求为人工智能的全面替代造成了重大障碍。

title: Water and wastewater treatment plant and system operators
exposure_rationale: The occupation is a hybrid of physical labor and digital monitoring, with AI and advanced automation already contributing to a projected 7% decline in employment. While AI can optimize chemical dosing, analyze sensor data, and manage complex system flows, the role still requires physical presence for equipment maintenance, manual sampling, and emergency response to mechanical failures.
title_cn: 水和污水处理厂和系统操作员
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是体力劳动和数字监控的混合体，人工智能和先进的自动化已经导致就业率预计下降 7%。虽然人工智能可以优化化学剂量、分析传感器数据和管理复杂的系统流程，但该角色仍然需要物理存在来进行设备维护、手动采样和对机械故障的紧急响应。

title: Water transportation workers
exposure_rationale: The core of the work is physical and requires real-time presence in unpredictable maritime environments, involving manual tasks like equipment maintenance, cargo handling, and emergency response. While AI can assist with navigation, fuel optimization, and predictive maintenance for engineers, the high-stakes physical safety requirements and the need for human intervention in complex docking or mechanical failures limit overall exposure.
category_cn: 运输和物料搬运类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该工作的核心是体力工作，需要在不可预测的海上环境中实时存在，涉及设备维护、货物装卸、应急响应等手动任务。虽然人工智能可以协助工程师进行导航、燃料优化和预测性维护，但高风险的物理安全要求以及复杂对接或机械故障中人为干预的需要限制了整体暴露。

title: Web developers and digital designers
exposure_rationale: This occupation is entirely digital, with core tasks like writing code (HTML, JavaScript), designing layouts, and creating prototypes being areas where AI has demonstrated high proficiency. AI tools can now generate functional code from natural language and create sophisticated visual mockups, significantly increasing individual productivity and potentially reducing the number of developers needed for standard projects.
title_cn: Web开发人员和数字设计师
exposure_rationale_cn: 这个职业完全是数字化的，编写代码（HTML、JavaScript）、设计布局和创建原型等核心任务是人工智能表现出高熟练度的领域。人工智能工具现在可以从自然语言生成功能代码并创建复杂的视觉模型，从而显着提高个人生产力，并有可能减少标准项目所需的开发人员数量。

title: Welders, cutters, solderers, and brazers
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is highly physical, requiring manual dexterity, physical stamina, and real-time adaptation to unpredictable environments like construction sites or repair shops. While AI and robotics can automate routine assembly-line welding, the specialized, non-routine tasks and the need for physical presence in varied locations provide a strong barrier against AI displacement.
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心是高度体力的，需要手工灵活性、体力，以及实时适应建筑工地或修理厂等不可预测的环境。虽然人工智能和机器人技术可以实现常规装配线焊接的自动化，但专门的非常规任务以及在不同地点的物理存在的需要为人工智能的替代提供了强大的障碍。

title: Wholesale and manufacturing sales representatives
exposure_rationale: This occupation is heavily focused on information processing, communication, and data analysis, all of which are highly susceptible to AI enhancement and automation. While high-stakes B2B negotiations and physical trade shows provide a buffer, AI can now handle lead generation, personalized outreach, price optimization, and technical product explanations, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total number of representatives needed.
title_cn: 批发和制造业销售代表
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业主要专注于信息处理、通信和数据分析，所有这些都非常容易受到人工智能增强和自动化的影响。虽然高风险的 B2B 谈判和实体贸易展览提供了缓冲，但人工智能现在可以处理潜在客户开发、个性化推广、价格优化和技术产品解释，从而显着提高个人生产力并减少所需的代表总数。

title: Wind turbine technicians
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves high-stakes physical labor, including climbing 200-foot towers, rappelling, and performing manual repairs in confined spaces. While AI can assist with remote monitoring and predictive maintenance diagnostics, the physical requirement to replace components and perform manual inspections in unpredictable outdoor environments provides a strong barrier to automation.
category_cn: 安装、维护和维修类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业的核心涉及高风险的体力劳动，包括攀爬 200 英尺高的塔楼、绳降以及在有限空间内进行手工维修。虽然人工智能可以协助远程监控和预测性维护诊断，但在不可预测的户外环境中更换组件和执行手动检查的物理要求为自动化提供了强大的障碍。

title: Woodworkers
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical manipulation of materials, manual dexterity, and real-time sensory monitoring in a workshop environment, which are resistant to AI. While AI can optimize digital design (CAD) and CNC programming, the physical assembly, finishing, and machine maintenance require a human presence that limits overall exposure.
exposure_rationale_cn: 这项工作的核心涉及对材料的物理操作、手工灵巧性以及车间环境中的实时感官监控，这些都是对人工智能有抵抗力的。虽然人工智能可以优化数字设计 (CAD) 和 CNC 编程，但物理装配、精加工和机器维护需要人工参与，这限制了整体暴露。

title: Writers and authors
exposure_rationale: The core work product of writers and authors is entirely digital and text-based, which aligns perfectly with the primary capabilities of Large Language Models. AI can now generate drafts, conduct research, and perform editing tasks across various formats like blogs, copy, and scripts, significantly increasing productivity while simultaneously threatening to automate many entry-level and routine writing roles.
exposure_rationale_cn: 作家和作者的核心工作产品完全是数字化和基于文本的，这与大型语言模型的主要功能完美契合。人工智能现在可以生成草稿、进行研究，并执行博客、文案和脚本等各种格式的编辑任务，显着提高生产力，同时威胁到许多入门级和日常写作角色的自动化。

title: Zoologists and wildlife biologists
exposure_rationale: This occupation is a hybrid of physical fieldwork and digital knowledge work. AI significantly impacts the data-heavy aspects of the job, such as analyzing GIS data, processing camera trap imagery, and modeling population dynamics, but it cannot replace the physical requirements of collecting biological specimens, handling wild animals, or navigating remote outdoor environments.
title_cn: 动物学家和野生生物学家
category_cn: 生命、物理和社会科学类职业
exposure_rationale_cn: 该职业是实地考察和数字知识工作的混合体。人工智能极大地影响了工作中数据密集的方面，例如分析 GIS 数据、处理相机陷阱图像和建模人口动态，但它无法取代收集生物标本、处理野生动物或在偏远的室外环境中导航的物理要求。
